meaning: 我（第一人稱主格代名詞）
sentences: I go to school every day and enjoy learning new things. 我每天去上學，喜歡學習新事物。
I think it is important to be honest with others. 我認為對別人誠實是很重要的。

meaning: 英文字母表的第九個字母
sentences: The letter i appears twice in the word "innovation". 字母 i 在「innovation」這個單字中出現了兩次。
In mathematics, the letter i often represents the imaginary unit. 在數學中，字母 i 常用來表示虛數單位。
I am learning English because I want to travel the world. 我正在學英文，因為我想環遊世界。
I did all the work by myself without any help. 我沒有任何幫助，獨自完成了所有工作。

meaning: 與 Iacchus（古希臘厄琉西斯秘儀中戴奧尼索斯的稱號）有關的；狂歡的
sentences: The ancient chorus sang Iacchic hymns during the Eleusinian procession. 古代合唱團在厄琉西斯遊行中唱起與 Iacchus 相關的讚歌。
Scholars study the Iacchic rites to understand Greek mystery religions. 學者研究 Iacchic 儀式以了解希臘神秘宗教。

meaning: Iacchus 的另一種拼法；古希臘厄琉西斯秘儀中戴奧尼索斯的稱號
sentences: Iacchos was called upon by worshippers during the great Eleusinian festival. Iacchos 在盛大的厄琉西斯節慶中受到信徒的呼喚。
The name Iacchos echoed through the sacred procession to Eleusis. Iacchos 這個名字在前往厄琉西斯的神聖遊行中迴響。

meaning: 古希臘神祇，厄琉西斯秘儀中與戴奧尼索斯相關的神靈
sentences: Iacchus was honored with torches and songs at the night festival. Iacchus 在夜間節慶中以火炬與歌聲受到頌揚。
Ancient texts describe Iacchus as a guide through the mysteries of life and death. 古代文獻描述 Iacchus 為引導人們穿越生死奧秘的嚮導。

meaning: 莎士比亞戲劇《辛白林》中的義大利反派人物名
sentences: Iachimo tricks Posthumus into doubting Imogen's faithfulness. Iachimo 欺騙波休默斯，使他懷疑伊摩根的忠誠。
The character Iachimo is one of Shakespeare's most cunning villains. Iachimo 這個角色是莎士比亞最狡猾的反派之一。

meaning: 治療學；研究藥物與治療方法的學科
sentences: Iamatology examines which remedies are most effective for various ailments. 治療學研究哪些藥方對各種疾病最有效。
Early physicians contributed to iamatology through careful observation and experimentation. 早期醫師透過仔細觀察與實驗為治療學做出貢獻。

meaning: 抑揚格；詩歌中由一個非重讀音節加一個重讀音節組成的韻律單位
sentences: Shakespeare's sonnets are written primarily in iambic pentameter, with five iambs per line. 莎士比亞的十四行詩主要以抑揚格五音步寫成，每行有五個抑揚格。
A student of poetry must first learn to identify an iamb before studying complex meters. 詩歌學生必須先學會辨認抑揚格，才能研究複雜的韻律。

meaning: 希臘神話人物，潘恩與厄科之女，以幽默使得墨特爾重展笑顏
sentences: According to myth, Iambe cheered Demeter with her jests during the goddess's mourning. 根據神話，Iambe 在女神哀悼期間用玩笑話使得墨特爾振作。
The name Iambe is thought to be connected to the origin of iambic verse. Iambe 這個名字被認為與抑揚格詩體的起源有關。

meaning: 古希臘詩歌中由抑揚格二音步與揚抑格五音步組合而成的複合韻律
sentences: The iambelegus was a rare metrical form used by ancient Greek lyric poets. Iambelegus 是古希臘抒情詩人使用的罕見韻律形式。
Scholars of classical prosody study the iambelegus to understand early Greek poetry. 古典韻律學者研究 iambelegus 以了解早期希臘詩歌。

meaning: iambus 的複數形式；多個抑揚格；古希臘的諷刺詩
sentences: Archilochus was famous for his sharp iambi attacking personal enemies. 阿基洛科斯以其針對個人敵人的犀利抑揚格諷刺詩聞名。
The iambi of ancient Greece served as social commentary and personal satire. 古希臘的抑揚格諷刺詩作為社會評論與個人諷刺的工具。

meaning: 抑揚格的；以抑揚格寫成的
sentences: The poem follows an iambic pattern with a stress on every second syllable. 這首詩遵循抑揚格模式，每隔一個音節有一個重音。
Drama in ancient Athens was often written in iambic trimeter to mimic natural speech. 古雅典的戲劇常以抑揚格三音步寫成，以模仿自然語言。

meaning: 以抑揚格方式地；在韻律上以抑揚格呈現地
sentences: The actor delivered the lines iambically, giving the speech a natural rhythm. 演員以抑揚格方式朗誦台詞，賦予這段話自然的節奏。
The verse was constructed iambically, following the strict rules of classical prosody. 這首詩以抑揚格構成，遵循古典韻律學的嚴格規則。

meaning: 抑揚格詩人；撰寫抑揚格諷刺詩的詩人
sentences: The ancient iambist used sharp wit to mock the powerful figures of his day. 這位古代抑揚格詩人用犀利的機智嘲諷當時的權貴人物。
As a skilled iambist, he was both celebrated and feared for his cutting verses. 作為一位技藝精湛的抑揚格詩人，他既因犀利詩句受到讚譽，也令人畏懼。

meaning: 以抑揚格寫作；把（詩句）改寫為抑揚格形式
sentences: He tried to iambize the ancient text to fit the requirements of the stage production. 他試圖將古文改寫成抑揚格形式，以符合舞台劇的要求。
Some translators choose to iambize Homer's epics to preserve their rhythmic quality. 有些翻譯者選擇將荷馬史詩改寫為抑揚格形式，以保留其韻律質感。

meaning: 抑揚格諷刺詩的作者；古希臘抑揚格詩人
sentences: Hipponax is remembered as one of the greatest iambographers of ancient Greece. 希波納克斯被譽為古希臘最偉大的抑揚格諷刺詩作者之一。
The iambographer often used coarse language to deliver biting social criticism. 抑揚格諷刺詩人常使用粗俗語言來發表尖銳的社會批評。

meaning: 抑揚格；詩歌中由一個輕讀音節加一個重讀音節組成的韻腳單位
sentences: Each iambus consists of one unstressed syllable followed by one stressed syllable. 每個抑揚格由一個非重讀音節加一個重讀音節組成。
The iambus is the most common metrical foot in English poetry. 抑揚格是英語詩歌中最常見的韻律單位。

meaning: 伊恩（男性名字，為蘇格蘭蓋爾語版本的 John）
sentences: Ian has been a popular given name in Scotland for many generations. 伊恩在蘇格蘭數代以來一直是廣受歡迎的名字。
My colleague Ian always arrives early and stays late to finish his work. 我的同事伊恩總是早到晚走以完成工作。

meaning: 紫螺屬；一種在開闊大洋中漂浮生活的腹足類軟體動物屬名
sentences: Ianthina snails drift across the open ocean clinging to rafts of bubbles. 紫螺依附在泡沫筏上在開闊的大洋中漂流。
The beautiful violet shell of Ianthina makes it one of the most striking pelagic mollusks. 紫螺美麗的紫色外殼使其成為最引人注目的遠洋軟體動物之一。
The rare mineral displayed an ianthine hue that fascinated the geologist. 這種罕見礦物呈現出迷人的紫羅蘭色，令地質學家著迷。
The poet described the twilight sky as ianthine, glowing with soft violet light. 詩人將暮色天空描述為紫羅蘭色的，散發著柔和的紫色光芒。

meaning: 碘鈾礦；一種含鈾的罕見礦物，呈紫黑色
sentences: Ianthinite is a rare uranium-bearing mineral with a deep violet-black color. Ianthinite 是一種含鈾的罕見礦物，呈深紫黑色。
Geologists discovered ianthinite in the uranium-rich ore deposits of the region. 地質學家在該地區富含鈾的礦床中發現了 ianthinite。

meaning: 亞努斯（Janus 的拉丁語形式）；羅馬神話中的門神與新生之神，通常描繪為雙面神
sentences: Ianus, the two-faced god, was worshipped at the beginning of every new undertaking. 雙面神亞努斯受到人們在每次新事業開始時的崇拜。
The month of January takes its name from the Roman god Ianus. 一月份的英文名稱源自羅馬神祇亞努斯。

meaning: 夏威夷本土小型鳥類，夏威夷語名稱，學名為 Acrocephalus familiaris
sentences: The iao is a small songbird native to the Hawaiian island of Maui. Iao 是毛伊島原生的小型鳴禽。
Conservation efforts have helped protect the iao from extinction due to habitat loss. 保育工作幫助保護 iao 免於因棲地喪失而滅絕。

meaning: 伊阿珀托斯；希臘神話中的泰坦神，也是土星的第三大衛星名稱
sentences: In Greek mythology, Iapetus was a Titan and the father of Prometheus. 在希臘神話中，伊阿珀托斯是泰坦神，也是普羅米修斯的父親。
Scientists study Iapetus, Saturn's moon, to understand the formation of the outer solar system. 科學家研究土星的衛星伊阿珀托斯，以了解外太陽系的形成。

meaning: 伊阿皮吉斯人；古代居住於義大利東南部（阿普利亞地區）的民族總稱
sentences: The Iapyges were among the earliest known inhabitants of southeastern Italy. 伊阿皮吉斯人是最早已知的義大利東南部居民之一。
Archaeological finds reveal that the Iapyges had a rich material culture before Roman expansion. 考古發現揭示伊阿皮吉斯人在羅馬擴張前擁有豐富的物質文化。

meaning: 伊阿皮吉亞的；與古義大利東南部伊阿皮吉斯人或其文化相關的
sentences: Iapygian pottery styles show both local traditions and influences from Greek colonies. 伊阿皮吉亞陶器風格呈現本地傳統與希臘殖民地影響的融合。
The Iapygian dialects were distinct from Latin and other Italic languages. 伊阿皮吉亞方言與拉丁語和其他義大利語言截然不同。

meaning: 伊阿皮吉斯人（Iapyges 的拉丁語複數形式）；古義大利東南部的族群
sentences: Roman historians referred to the people of Apulia as the Iapygii. 羅馬歷史學家稱阿普利亞的人民為伊阿皮吉斯人。
The Iapygii maintained their distinct culture for centuries despite Greek and Roman influence. 伊阿皮吉斯人儘管受到希臘和羅馬的影響，仍保持了數百年的獨特文化。

meaning: 塗油療法的；與透過塗抹油脂或藥膏治療疾病相關的
sentences: The physician recommended an iatraliptic treatment using medicated ointments for the patient's skin condition. 醫師建議使用藥用軟膏的塗油療法來治療患者的皮膚病。
Iatraliptic methods were commonly used in ancient medicine to administer drugs through the skin. 塗油療法在古代醫學中常用於透過皮膚施藥。

meaning: 塗油治療學；透過塗抹油脂或藥膏於皮膚來治療疾病的醫學實踐
sentences: Iatraliptics was practiced in ancient Greece as a way to deliver healing compounds to the body. 塗油治療學在古希臘作為一種將療癒成分送入身體的方式而被實踐。
Modern transdermal drug delivery systems echo the principles of ancient iatraliptics. 現代透皮給藥系統呼應了古代塗油治療學的原理。

meaning: 醫學的；與醫師或醫療相關的
sentences: The iatric profession demands both technical knowledge and compassionate care. 醫療行業需要技術知識與富有同情心的照護。
Students entering iatric fields must complete years of rigorous training. 進入醫療領域的學生必須完成多年嚴格的訓練。

meaning: 醫學的；醫療的（iatric 的另一種形式）
sentences: The iatrical tradition of a culture shapes how its people approach illness and healing. 一個文化的醫療傳統影響其人民應對疾病與治療的方式。
She pursued an iatrical career because she wanted to help people recover their health. 她追求醫療職業，因為她想幫助人們恢復健康。

meaning: 醫療化學的；與醫療化學派相關的（iatrochemical 的較短形式）
sentences: The iatrochemic school of thought flourished in Europe during the sixteenth century. 醫療化學思想流派在十六世紀的歐洲蓬勃發展。
Iatrochemic practitioners believed that disease and health were fundamentally chemical processes. 醫療化學實踐者相信疾病與健康從根本上是化學過程。

meaning: 醫療化學的；與以化學方式解釋與治療疾病的學說相關的
sentences: Paracelsus developed an iatrochemical theory that linked bodily functions to chemical reactions. 帕拉塞爾蘇斯發展出一種醫療化學理論，將身體功能與化學反應聯繫起來。
The iatrochemical approach challenged the older humoral theory of medicine. 醫療化學方法挑戰了較古老的體液醫學理論。

meaning: 醫療化學家；信奉並實踐醫療化學理論的人
sentences: The famous iatrochemist Van Helmont argued that chemical processes governed all life functions. 著名醫療化學家范·海爾蒙特認為化學過程支配所有生命功能。
As an iatrochemist, he prepared mineral-based medicines that were both innovative and controversial. 作為一位醫療化學家，他配製以礦物為基礎的藥物，既創新又具爭議性。

meaning: 醫療化學；十六至十七世紀試圖以化學原理解釋疾病與治療的學說
sentences: Iatrochemistry was a pivotal movement that helped lay the groundwork for modern pharmacology. 醫療化學是一個重要的運動，幫助奠定現代藥理學的基礎。
Paracelsus is considered the father of iatrochemistry for his revolutionary ideas on medicine and chemistry. 帕拉塞爾蘇斯因其在醫學與化學上的革命性思想被視為醫療化學之父。

meaning: 醫學論述的；與醫學科學或研究相關的
sentences: The professor delivered an iatrological lecture on the history of ancient medical practices. 教授發表了一篇關於古代醫療實踐歷史的醫學論述演講。
Iatrological texts from ancient Greece reveal a sophisticated understanding of the human body. 來自古希臘的醫學論述文本揭示了對人體的精深理解。

meaning: 醫學科學；對醫療知識的系統性研究
sentences: Iatrology encompasses all branches of medicine from surgery to pharmacology. 醫學科學涵蓋從外科到藥理學的所有醫學分支。
The development of iatrology has been shaped by centuries of careful observation and experimentation. 醫學科學的發展由數百年的仔細觀察與實驗所塑造。

meaning: 天文醫學的；與結合占星術和數學原理來解釋及治療疾病相關的
sentences: The iatromathematical tradition held that celestial bodies influenced human health. 天文醫學傳統認為天體影響人類健康。
Iatromathematical physicians would cast horoscopes before prescribing treatments to their patients. 天文醫學醫師在為患者開具治療方案前會先占星推算。

meaning: 天文醫學家；運用占星術與數學來實踐醫療的人
sentences: The iatromathematician studied the positions of the planets before recommending a cure. 天文醫學家在推薦療法前先研究行星的位置。
Few today would consult an iatromathematician, but such practitioners were respected in Renaissance Europe. 今天很少有人會諮詢天文醫學家，但此類醫師在文藝復興時期的歐洲受到尊重。

meaning: 天文醫學；一種古老的醫學體系，運用占星術與數學原理解釋人體健康
sentences: Iatromathematics was widely practiced in medieval and Renaissance medicine before being replaced by empirical science. 天文醫學在中世紀和文藝復興醫學中廣泛實踐，後來被實證科學所取代。
The study of iatromathematics reveals how ancient peoples connected the cosmos to human biology. 對天文醫學的研究揭示了古代人如何將宇宙與人類生物學聯繫起來。

meaning: 機械醫學的；與用機械原理解釋身體功能和疾病相關的
sentences: The iatromechanical school compared the human body to a complex machine governed by physical laws. 機械醫學學派將人體比作受物理定律支配的複雜機器。
Iatromechanical thinkers like Borelli studied muscles and movement using principles of mechanics. 像博雷利這樣的機械醫學思想家運用力學原理研究肌肉與運動。

meaning: 機械醫學家；相信並實踐機械醫學理論的人
sentences: As an iatromechanist, he believed that the heart functioned like a pump obeying physical laws. 作為一位機械醫學家，他相信心臟像遵守物理定律的泵一樣運作。
The iatromechanist rejected chemical explanations of disease in favor of mechanical ones. 機械醫學家拒絕以化學解釋疾病，而傾向於機械解釋。

meaning: 物理醫學的；與用物理學原理解釋生命現象和疾病相關的
sentences: The iatrophysical approach viewed the body as a system governed by pressure, flow, and forces. 物理醫學方法將身體視為由壓力、流動和力所支配的系統。
Iatrophysical theories gained prominence in the seventeenth century alongside advances in physics. 物理醫學理論在十七世紀隨著物理學的進步而變得突出。

meaning: 物理醫學家；將物理學原理應用於醫學的人
sentences: The iatrophysicist used measurements of blood pressure to explain circulatory diseases. 物理醫學家用血壓測量來解釋循環系統疾病。
As an iatrophysicist, she combined the latest findings in physics with clinical medicine. 作為一位物理醫學家，她將最新的物理學發現與臨床醫學相結合。

meaning: 物理醫學；十七世紀以物理學原理解釋生命功能與疾病的醫學理論
sentences: Iatrophysics emerged in the seventeenth century as scientists began applying Newtonian principles to medicine. 物理醫學在十七世紀隨著科學家開始將牛頓原理應用於醫學而興起。
The study of iatrophysics contributed to the development of physiology as a scientific discipline. 物理醫學的研究促進了生理學作為一門科學學科的發展。

meaning: 醫技學；醫學知識的實際應用技術
sentences: Iatrotechnics covers the practical skills required in clinical medical practice. 醫技學涵蓋臨床醫療實踐所需的實際技能。
Training in iatrotechnics includes procedures such as bandaging, suturing, and administering injections. 醫技學訓練包括包紮、縫合和注射等程序。

meaning: IBA（國際律師協會）的縮寫；或各種組織的簡稱
sentences: The IBA sets global standards for the legal profession across many countries. IBA 為許多國家的法律專業制定全球標準。
She attended the iba conference to network with lawyers from around the world. 她參加了 IBA 會議，與來自世界各地的律師交流。

meaning: 伊巴德（Ibadi）的形容詞形；與伊斯蘭伊巴德派相關的
sentences: Ibad communities have maintained their distinct religious practices for over a thousand years. 伊巴德社群維持其獨特的宗教習俗已超過千年。
The Ibad tradition represents one of the oldest surviving branches of Islam. 伊巴德傳統代表了伊斯蘭教中現存最古老的分支之一。

meaning: 伊巴德派信徒；伊斯蘭教中一個溫和古老教派的成員
sentences: The Ibadite community in Oman has preserved its unique religious and cultural heritage for centuries. 阿曼的伊巴德派社群數百年來保存了其獨特的宗教和文化遺產。
An Ibadite scholar explained the differences between their tradition and other Islamic schools of thought. 一位伊巴德派學者解釋了其傳統與其他伊斯蘭思想流派之間的差異。

meaning: 伊班族；婆羅洲（特別是馬來西亞砂拉越）最大的原住民族群
sentences: The Iban people of Sarawak are known for their intricate weaving traditions and longhouse communities. 砂拉越的伊班族以其精美的編織傳統和長屋社區聞名。
Iban warriors were historically renowned for their bravery and skill in the forests of Borneo. 伊班戰士在歷史上以其在婆羅洲森林中的勇氣和技能聞名。

meaning: 伊巴納語；菲律賓呂宋島北部伊班納族人的語言或民族
sentences: The Ibanag language is spoken by communities in the Cagayan Valley of the Philippines. 伊巴納語由菲律賓卡加揚河谷的社群使用。
Researchers study the Ibanag oral traditions to preserve this endangered linguistic heritage. 研究人員研究伊巴納口述傳統以保存這種瀕危的語言遺產。

meaning: 伊比利亞人（古稱）；古代伊比利半島的原住民族
sentences: Ancient writers referred to the native inhabitants of the Iberian Peninsula as the Iberes. 古代作家稱伊比利半島的原住民為伊比利亞人。
The Iberes developed a unique culture that later blended with Phoenician and Greek influences. 伊比利亞人發展出獨特的文化，後來與腓尼基和希臘影響融合。

meaning: 伊比利亞人（Iberes 的拉丁語複數形式）
sentences: Roman historians wrote accounts of the Iberi as fierce and independent peoples. 羅馬歷史學家將伊比利亞人描述為剽悍而獨立的民族。
Archaeological evidence shows that the Iberi had advanced metalworking skills. 考古證據顯示伊比利亞人擁有先進的金屬加工技術。

meaning: 伊比利亞；歐洲西南部的半島，包含現今的西班牙和葡萄牙；也是高加索地區的古國名
sentences: Iberia has a rich cultural heritage shaped by centuries of diverse civilizations. 伊比利亞擁有由數百年多元文明所塑造的豐富文化遺產。
The ancient kingdom of Iberia in the Caucasus was a center of early Christianity. 高加索地區的古代伊比利亞王國是早期基督教的中心。

meaning: 伊比利亞的；伊比利半島（西班牙和葡萄牙）的；或古代伊比利亞人的
sentences: The Iberian Peninsula is famous for its diverse landscapes, from mountains to sunny coasts. 伊比利半島以其從山脈到陽光海岸的多元地貌而聞名。
Iberian wines and olive oils are exported to markets around the world. 伊比利亞葡萄酒和橄欖油出口到全球各地市場。

meaning: 伊比利亞的；與伊比利亞語言或文化相關的
sentences: The Iberic inscriptions found in Spain remain only partially deciphered by scholars. 在西班牙發現的伊比利亞銘文仍只有部分被學者解讀。
Iberic art shows a fascinating blend of native and Mediterranean influences. 伊比利亞藝術呈現出本土與地中海影響的迷人融合。

meaning: 屈曲花屬；一種開小花的十字花科植物屬，常作為觀賞花卉栽種
sentences: Iberis plants produce clusters of white or purple flowers that brighten garden borders. 屈曲花屬植物開出白色或紫色的花簇，為花園邊緣增添色彩。
Gardeners often plant Iberis as ground cover because it grows low and spreads easily. 園丁常將屈曲花作為地被植物種植，因為它生長低矮且容易蔓延。

meaning: 伊比利亞主義；主張伊比利半島（西班牙和葡萄牙）政治統一的思想
sentences: Iberism emerged as a political movement in the nineteenth century seeking unity between Spain and Portugal. 伊比利亞主義在十九世紀作為一種尋求西班牙和葡萄牙統一的政治運動而興起。
Supporters of Iberism argued that the two Iberian nations shared deep historical and cultural ties. 伊比利亞主義的支持者認為兩個伊比利半島國家有深厚的歷史和文化聯繫。

meaning: 伊比利亞岩；一種來自伊比利半島的火成岩類型
sentences: Iberite samples were collected from the exposed rock formations along the Spanish coast. 伊比利亞岩樣本從西班牙海岸的裸露岩層中採集。
Geologists classify iberite based on its mineral composition and texture. 地質學家根據其礦物成分和紋理對伊比利亞岩進行分類。

meaning: 野山羊；一種居住在山區、雄性長有大彎角的野生山羊
sentences: The ibex is famous for its ability to climb almost vertical rocky cliffs with ease. 野山羊以其能輕鬆攀登幾乎垂直岩壁的能力而聞名。
Conservation programs have helped restore ibex populations in the Alps and other mountain regions. 保育計畫幫助恢復了阿爾卑斯山和其他山區的野山羊種群數量。

meaning: ibex 的複數形式；野山羊（複數）
sentences: The ibices roamed freely across the high mountain passes in spring. 這群野山羊在春天自由漫步於高山隘口。
Scientists tagged several ibices to track their seasonal migration patterns. 科學家為幾頭野山羊戴上標記，以追蹤其季節性遷徙模式。

meaning: 同前；出處同上（引用同一資料來源時使用的縮寫，源自拉丁語 ibidem）
sentences: The footnote read "ibid., p. 45," referring readers back to the same source. 腳注寫著「ibid., p. 45」，將讀者引回同一來源。
In academic writing, ibid is used to avoid repeating a full citation. 在學術寫作中，ibid 用於避免重複完整引用。

meaning: 朱鷺科；包含朱鷺和琵鷺的鳥類科名
sentences: Birds of the family Ibididae are found in wetlands across tropical and subtropical regions. 朱鷺科的鳥類分布於熱帶和亞熱帶地區的濕地。
The sacred ibis, a member of Ibididae, was venerated in ancient Egypt. 聖朱鷺，朱鷺科的成員，在古埃及受到崇敬。

meaning: 朱鷺亞科；朱鷺科中包含真正朱鷺的亞科
sentences: Species within Ibidinae are characterized by their long curved bills adapted for probing mud. 朱鷺亞科的物種以其適合探入泥地的長彎嘴著稱。
Ornithologists study Ibidinae to understand the evolutionary relationships among wading birds. 鳥類學家研究朱鷺亞科以了解涉禽類之間的進化關係。

meaning: 朱鷺屬的；與朱鷺類鳥相關的
sentences: The ibidine bill is perfectly shaped for extracting invertebrates from soft mud. 朱鷺類的喙形狀完美，適合從軟泥中提取無脊椎動物。
Ibidine species often nest in large colonies near lakes and marshes. 朱鷺類物種常在湖泊和沼澤附近以大型群落築巢。

meaning: 小朱鷺屬（舊分類）；現歸入螺旋蘭屬的一類蘭科植物
sentences: Ibidium was historically used as a genus name for certain orchid species. Ibidium 在歷史上曾用作某些蘭科植物的屬名。
Botanists reclassified Ibidium specimens into the genus Spiranthes during the twentieth century. 植物學家在二十世紀將 Ibidium 標本重新分類到螺旋蘭屬。

meaning: 伊比勞族；菲律賓呂宋島中部的少數民族
sentences: The Ibilao people maintain traditional practices and beliefs rooted in their highland culture. 伊比勞族人維持著植根於高地文化的傳統習俗和信仰。
Anthropologists have documented the unique oral literature of the Ibilao community. 人類學家記錄了伊比勞社群獨特的口述文學。

meaning: 朱鷺；一種長腿長嘴的大型涉禽，常見於熱帶濕地
sentences: The scarlet ibis uses its long curved bill to search for food in shallow water. 緋紅朱鷺用其長彎嘴在淺水中覓食。
Ancient Egyptians associated the ibis with Thoth, the god of wisdom and writing. 古埃及人將朱鷺與智慧和書寫之神托特相聯繫。

meaning: 鷸嘴鷸；一種居住在喜馬拉雅山麓河床的鳥類，外貌類似朱鷺
sentences: The ibisbill is a rare bird found along stony mountain rivers in Central Asia. 鷸嘴鷸是一種在中亞多石山河中發現的稀有鳥類。
Birdwatchers travel great distances to catch a glimpse of the elusive ibisbill. 賞鳥者長途跋涉只為一睹難以捉摸的鷸嘴鷸。

meaning: 伊博族；奈及利亞東南部的主要民族；伊博語
sentences: The Ibo people have a rich tradition of storytelling, art, and community governance. 伊博族人有豐富的說故事、藝術和社群治理傳統。
Chinua Achebe wrote about Ibo culture in his famous novel Things Fall Apart. 欽努阿·阿切貝在其著名小說《分崩離析》中寫到了伊博文化。

meaning: 伊博鋰礦；一種含鋰的稀有礦物
sentences: Ibolium was identified by mineralogists studying rare lithium-bearing minerals. Ibolium 是由礦物學家在研究含鋰稀有礦物時鑑定的。
The discovery of ibolium in the rock sample excited the research team. 岩石樣本中 ibolium 的發現令研究團隊興奮。

meaning: 水蠟樹；日本常見的一種木犀科灌木，常用於庭園綠籬
sentences: Ibota privet is commonly planted as a hedge in Japanese gardens. 水蠟樹常被種植為日本庭園中的綠籬。
The small white flowers of the ibota shrub have a pleasant fragrance in early summer. 水蠟樹灌木的小白花在初夏散發宜人的芳香。

meaning: 易卜生式的；符合挪威劇作家亨里克·易卜生風格或主題的
sentences: The play had an Ibsenian quality, exploring hidden family secrets and social hypocrisy. 這齣戲具有易卜生式的特質，探索隱秘的家庭祕密和社會虛偽。
Her portrayal of the conflicted heroine was deeply Ibsenian in its psychological depth. 她對這位矛盾女主角的刻畫在心理深度上具有深刻的易卜生式風格。

meaning: 易卜生的；與易卜生相關的（Ibsenian 的變體形式）
sentences: Critics praised the Ibsenic themes of the new drama, particularly its focus on individual freedom. 評論家讚揚了新戲劇的易卜生主題，尤其是其對個人自由的關注。
The Ibsenic tradition of realist drama has had a lasting influence on modern theatre. 易卜生式現實主義戲劇傳統對現代戲劇產生了持久影響。

meaning: 略帶易卜生風格的；有些類似易卜生作品特質的
sentences: The novel felt somewhat Ibsenish, with its dark themes and morally complex characters. 這部小說感覺有些易卜生風格，帶有黑暗主題和道德複雜的人物。
Her directorial style was described as Ibsenish by audience members familiar with his work. 熟悉其作品的觀眾將她的導演風格描述為帶有易卜生特色。

meaning: 易卜生主義；以易卜生戲劇為基礎的現實主義社會批評思想或藝術主張
sentences: Ibsenism spread across Europe in the late nineteenth century as his plays challenged social norms. 易卜生主義在十九世紀末隨著他的戲劇挑戰社會規範而在歐洲傳播。
George Bernard Shaw was an early champion of Ibsenism in the English-speaking world. 蕭伯納是英語世界中早期的易卜生主義倡導者。

meaning: 易卜生主義者；仰慕或效法易卜生戲劇風格與主題的人
sentences: As a dedicated Ibsenite, she organized readings of his lesser-known plays for the literary club. 作為一位忠實的易卜生主義者，她為文學俱樂部組織了他鮮為人知戲劇的朗讀活動。
The Ibsenites of the 1890s championed realism and the exploration of social problems on stage. 1890年代的易卜生主義者倡導現實主義以及在舞台上探討社會問題。

meaning: 紅喉卡拉鷹屬；一種分布於南美洲的猛禽屬
sentences: Ibycter americanus, known as the red-throated caracara, feeds mainly on wasp nests. 美洲紅喉卡拉鷹主要以黃蜂巢為食。
Ornithologists studying Ibycter behavior have noted its remarkable social cooperation. 研究紅喉卡拉鷹屬行為的鳥類學家注意到其顯著的社會合作性。

meaning: 伊比科斯；公元前六世紀古希臘抒情詩人
sentences: Ibycus is remembered for his passionate love poetry and his unusual legend involving cranes. 伊比科斯以其熱情的愛情詩和涉及仙鶴的奇特傳說而被銘記。
Scholars piece together the work of Ibycus from fragments preserved in ancient texts. 學者從古代文本中保存的殘片拼湊出伊比科斯的作品。

meaning: 茶茱萸科；一種分布於熱帶地區的植物科
sentences: Icacinaceae is a family of flowering plants found mainly in tropical forests. 茶茱萸科是主要分布於熱帶森林的開花植物科。
Botanists study Icacinaceae to understand the biodiversity of tropical plant communities. 植物學家研究茶茱萸科以了解熱帶植物群落的生物多樣性。

meaning: 茶茱萸科的；屬於或類似茶茱萸科植物的
sentences: The icacinaceous shrub was collected from the rainforest for taxonomic study. 這種茶茱萸科灌木從雨林中採集用於分類學研究。
Identifying icacinaceous plants requires careful examination of their flowers and fruit. 鑑別茶茱萸科植物需要仔細檢查其花朵和果實。

meaning: 可可李；一種生長於熱帶沿海地區的灌木，果實可食用
sentences: The icaco plant grows naturally along tropical beaches and is valued for its edible fruit. 可可李植物自然生長於熱帶海灘，其可食用果實受到重視。
Local communities harvest icaco fruit to make jams and traditional medicines. 當地社區採收可可李果實製作果醬和傳統藥物。

meaning: 冰糖樹屬（現已併入紫金牛屬）；熱帶美洲的一類灌木屬名
sentences: Icacorea species were historically classified separately before being merged with Ardisia. Icacorea 物種在歷史上被單獨分類，後來才併入紫金牛屬。
The plants formerly known as Icacorea are now studied under the broader genus Ardisia. 以前稱為 Icacorea 的植物現在在更廣泛的紫金牛屬下研究。

meaning: 伊卡里亞；希臘東愛琴海的一個島嶼；傳說中伊卡洛斯墜落之地
sentences: Icaria is a Greek island famous for the legend of Icarus and its longevity-focused community. 伊卡里亞是一個以伊卡洛斯傳說和注重長壽的社區而聞名的希臘島嶼。
Researchers have studied the diet and lifestyle of Icaria's residents to understand healthy aging. 研究人員研究伊卡里亞居民的飲食和生活方式以了解健康老齡化。

meaning: 伊卡洛斯的；與神話中因飛得太高而墜落的伊卡洛斯相關的；比喻過於冒險的
sentences: His ambitions were described as Icarian — impressive but ultimately doomed to fail. 他的抱負被描述為伊卡洛斯式的——令人印象深刻，但最終注定失敗。
The young inventor had an Icarian spirit, always pushing beyond the boundaries of what seemed possible. 這位年輕發明家有伊卡洛斯般的精神，總是突破看似可能的界限。

meaning: 伊卡利亞主義；由卡貝特創立的烏托邦共產主義社會思想
sentences: Icarianism was a utopian socialist movement founded by Étienne Cabet in the nineteenth century. 伊卡利亞主義是十九世紀由艾蒂安·卡貝特創立的烏托邦社會主義運動。
Followers of Icarianism attempted to establish ideal communities in France and North America. 伊卡利亞主義的追隨者試圖在法國和北美建立理想社區。

meaning: 伊卡洛斯；希臘神話中戴上蠟翼飛向太陽、因翼融化而墜海的人物
sentences: The story of Icarus is a timeless warning about the dangers of excessive ambition. 伊卡洛斯的故事是對過度野心危險的永恆警示。
Like Icarus, he ignored the advice of those wiser than him and paid a heavy price. 就像伊卡洛斯一樣，他無視比他更有智慧的人的建議，付出了沉重代價。
The lake is covered with a thick layer of ice in winter. 湖面在冬天覆蓋著一層厚厚的冰。
Would you like some ice in your soda? 你的汽水要加冰塊嗎？
You can use "ice axe" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「ice axe」。
We used "ice axe" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「ice axe」。
You can use "ice bucket" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「ice bucket」。
We used "ice bucket" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「ice bucket」。
We used "ice cream" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「ice cream」。
I heard "ice cream" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「ice cream」，就把它記進筆記本。
We used "ice cube" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「ice cube」。
"ice cube" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「ice cube」非常好用。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "ice folly" for next week. 老師要我們把「ice folly」背起來，下週要用。
"ice folly" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「ice folly」非常好用。
The guide wrote down ice-cold with the note "面冰凍的,冰涼的". 導覽員把 ice-cold 記下來，並註記「面冰凍的,冰涼的」。
The article mentioned ice-cold in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 ice-cold。
The ship hit a massive iceberg and began to sink in the cold water. 船撞上了一座巨大的冰山，開始在冷水中沈沒。
The problem we are facing is just the tip of the iceberg, unfortunately. 我們面臨的問題可惜只是冰山一角。

meaning: 冰光；由海冰反射而在天空出現的白色光芒，水手用以判斷前方是否有冰
sentences: Sailors spotted an iceblink on the horizon and knew that pack ice lay ahead. 水手在地平線上發現了冰光，知道前方有浮冰群。
The iceblink warned the crew to slow down and navigate with extreme caution. 冰光警告船員放慢速度並格外謹慎地導航。

meaning: 冰上帆船；一種在冰面上以帆推進的小型船形滑行器
sentences: The iceboat glided across the frozen lake at speeds that amazed all the spectators. 冰上帆船以令所有觀眾驚嘆的速度滑過冰凍的湖面。
Racing an iceboat requires skill, nerve, and a thorough understanding of wind direction. 駕駛冰上帆船競賽需要技巧、膽識以及對風向的深刻理解。

meaning: 冰骨；牛或羊的骨盆骨（比喻或舊式術語）
sentences: The butcher carefully removed the icebone before preparing the joint of beef. 屠夫在準備牛肉塊之前仔細去除了冰骨。
Some traditional recipes call for scoring the icebone to allow even cooking. 一些傳統食譜要求在冰骨上劃刻以便均勻烹飪。

meaning: 被冰封住的；被冰困住無法行進的
sentences: The ship became icebound in the Arctic and had to wait for spring to move again. 這艘船在北極被冰封住，不得不等到春天才能再次移動。
The icebound harbor paralyzed trade for three long months during the harsh winter. 冰封的港口在嚴冬期間癱瘓了整整三個月的貿易。

meaning: 冰箱（舊式，以冰塊保冷）；現也泛指冰箱或冷凍庫
sentences: Before electric refrigerators, every household kept food fresh in an icebox filled with ice blocks. 在電冰箱出現之前，每個家庭都用裝有冰塊的冰箱保存食物新鮮。
She stored the leftover soup in the icebox to prevent it from spoiling overnight. 她把剩下的湯放入冰箱，防止它隔夜變質。

meaning: 破冰船；設計用來在冰封水域開闢航路的船隻；也指打破冷場的話題或活動
sentences: The powerful icebreaker cleared a path through the frozen sea for the supply ships. 這艘強大的破冰船在冰封的海面為補給船開闢了一條航路。
The teacher used a fun game as an icebreaker on the first day of class. 老師在第一天上課時用一個有趣的遊戲作為破冰活動。

meaning: 冰帽；覆蓋極地或高山頂部的大面積永久性冰層
sentences: The polar icecap is melting at an alarming rate due to rising global temperatures. 由於全球氣溫上升，極地冰帽正在以令人擔憂的速度融化。
Scientists drill into the icecap to extract ice cores that reveal thousands of years of climate history. 科學家鑽入冰帽提取冰芯，揭示數千年的氣候歷史。

meaning: 冰上技藝；在冰上行進或操作的技術；冰上工藝
sentences: The Arctic explorer's icecraft skills allowed her to navigate safely across frozen tundra. 北極探險家的冰上技藝讓她能夠安全穿越冰凍苔原。
Mastering icecraft is essential for anyone planning a polar expedition. 對任何計劃極地探險的人來說，掌握冰上技藝至關重要。
Our team iceds this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會iced這個步驟。
We had to iced quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速iced。
I heard "iced water" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「iced water」，就把它記進筆記本。
After practice, I could use "iced water" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「iced water」。

meaning: 冰瀑；冰川中快速流動的冰崩段；也指冰川末端的懸掛冰塊群
sentences: The climbers faced the most dangerous section of the route — the notorious Khumbu Icefall. 攀登者面對路線上最危險的部分——惡名昭彰的孔布冰瀑。
An icefall is one of the most unstable and hazardous features on a glacier. 冰瀑是冰川上最不穩定、最危險的地形之一。

meaning: 冰魚；一種生活在南極洲附近寒冷水域的魚類，血液中缺乏紅血球
sentences: The Antarctic icefish is remarkable for its transparent blood, which lacks red blood cells. 南極洲冰魚以其透明的血液而引人注目，其血液中缺乏紅血球。
Biologists study the icefish to understand how life adapts to extreme cold environments. 生物學家研究冰魚以了解生命如何適應極端寒冷的環境。

meaning: 冰庫；用於儲存冰塊的建築；現代也指冷凍倉庫
sentences: Before refrigeration was invented, townspeople relied on the icehouse to keep food cool in summer. 在冰箱發明之前，鎮民依賴冰庫在夏天保持食物涼爽。
The old icehouse by the river was converted into a restaurant by the new owner. 河邊的舊冰庫被新主人改建成一家餐廳。

meaning: 冰冷地形的土地或地區。
sentences: The term iceland refers to a land or region of icy terrain. 冰島一詞是指冰冷地形的土地或地區。
The lesson introduced iceland as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了冰島作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 冰島人；冰島的居民或冰島裔人士
sentences: An Icelander told me that the midnight sun in summer never ceases to amaze visitors. 一位冰島人告訴我，夏天的午夜太陽從來不會停止讓遊客驚嘆。
Every Icelander takes pride in the island's rich Viking heritage and literary sagas. 每位冰島人都為島嶼豐富的維京遺產和文學薩迦感到自豪。

meaning: 冰島的；冰島人的（Icelandic 的舊式或詩意說法）
sentences: The Icelandian landscape of volcanoes and glaciers attracts visitors from around the world. 冰島火山和冰川的地貌吸引來自世界各地的遊客。
Old travel writings use the term Icelandian to describe the people and culture of Iceland. 舊時的旅遊文學使用 Icelandian 這個術語描述冰島的人民和文化。

meaning: 冰島的；冰島語的；冰島文化的
sentences: Icelandic is the official language of Iceland and is closely related to Old Norse. 冰島語是冰島的官方語言，與古諾爾斯語關係密切。
The Icelandic sagas are considered some of the greatest works of medieval literature. 冰島薩迦被視為中世紀文學中最偉大的作品之一。

meaning: 冰葉植物；一種因葉片表面閃閃發光如冰晶而得名的多肉植物
sentences: The iceleaf plant sparkles in sunlight due to the water-filled cells on its leaf surface. 冰葉植物因其葉片表面充滿水的細胞而在陽光下閃閃發光。
Gardeners in warm climates grow iceleaf as a decorative succulent in rock gardens. 溫暖氣候的園丁在岩石花園中種植冰葉作為裝飾性多肉植物。
The normally icy harbor was iceless this winter due to unusually warm temperatures. 由於氣溫異常溫暖，這個通常結冰的港口今年冬天沒有冰。
She preferred her drink iceless so the flavor would not be diluted. 她偏好不加冰的飲料，以免風味被稀釋。

meaning: 冰蟾魚科；一種北太平洋冷水域的底棲魚類科
sentences: Fish of the family Icelidae are adapted to cold deep waters of the North Pacific. 冰蟾魚科的魚類適應北太平洋的寒冷深水。
Marine biologists study Icelidae to understand deep-sea fish ecology. 海洋生物學家研究冰蟾魚科以了解深海魚類生態學。

meaning: 像冰一樣的；具有冰的特性或外觀的
sentences: The clear mineral had an icelike transparency that made it hard to see. 這種透明礦物具有冰般的透明度，使其難以看見。
The frozen waterfall had an icelike stillness that made it look like a painting. 這座冰凍的瀑布有著冰般的靜止，使其看起來像一幅畫。

meaning: 送冰工人；以前負責送冰到各家庭的工人；也指在冰上工作的人
sentences: Before electric refrigerators, the iceman delivered blocks of ice to homes every morning. 在電冰箱出現之前，送冰工人每天早上將冰塊送到各個家庭。
The famous Ötzi is often called the Iceman because his body was found preserved in glacier ice. 著名的奧茲常被稱為冰人，因為他的身體被發現保存在冰川冰中。

meaning: 伊切尼人；古羅馬時代英國東部的一個凱爾特部落，以布狄卡女王聞名
sentences: The Iceni tribe, led by Queen Boudicca, revolted against Roman rule in 60 CE. 伊切尼部落在布狄卡女王的領導下於公元60年起義反抗羅馬統治。
Archaeological finds from Iceni territory reveal a sophisticated culture before Roman conquest. 伊切尼領土的考古發現揭示了羅馬征服之前的複雜文化。

meaning: 冰震；冰川或冰層因熱脹冷縮或移動而產生的震動
sentences: The explorers heard a sudden cracking sound — an icequake shaking the glacier beneath them. 探險者聽到突然的破裂聲——一場冰震震動了他們腳下的冰川。
Scientists monitor icequakes to track the movement and stability of polar ice sheets. 科學家監測冰震以追蹤極地冰蓋的移動和穩定性。

meaning: 冰根；某些植物的俗稱，因其根部儲存大量水分或在冬季存活而得名
sentences: The iceroot plant survives harsh winters by storing water in its deep, cold-tolerant roots. 冰根植物通過在其耐寒的深根中儲存水分來度過嚴冬。
Herbal practitioners historically used iceroot as a remedy for fever. 草藥醫師在歷史上使用冰根作為退燒藥方。

meaning: 介殼蟲屬；一類危害農作物的柑橘害蟲屬
sentences: Icerya purchasi, known as the cottony cushion scale, devastated California's citrus industry in the 1880s. 棉狀介殼蟲在1880年代對加州的柑橘業造成了毀滅性破壞。
Biological control using vedalia beetles successfully reduced Icerya infestations. 利用澳洲瓢蟲的生物防治成功減少了介殼蟲的侵害。

meaning: 冰上工程；在冰上進行的工作或冰製裝飾品
sentences: Intricate icework decorated the windows of the palace during the winter festival. 精美的冰雕裝飾在冬季節慶期間點綴著宮殿的窗戶。
The icework along the roof eaves created a beautiful but dangerous fringe of icicles. 屋簷上的冰作業形成了美麗但危險的冰柱花邊。
The taste of the ich was richer than I expected. ich的味道比我想像中更濃郁。
The chef added fresh ich to the special menu. 主廚把新鮮的ich加入今日特餐。

meaning: 白尾獴屬；一種分布於非洲的獴科動物屬
sentences: Ichneumia albicauda, the white-tailed mongoose, is the largest mongoose species in Africa. 白尾獴是非洲最大的獴科物種。
The Ichneumia is a nocturnal predator that feeds on insects, small mammals, and birds. 白尾獴屬是一種夜間捕食者，以昆蟲、小型哺乳動物和鳥類為食。

meaning: 獴；一種以捕蛇著稱的小型肉食性哺乳動物；也指一類寄生蜂（姬蜂）
sentences: The ichneumon was revered in ancient Egypt for its ability to kill dangerous snakes and crocodile eggs. 獴在古埃及因其殺死危險蛇類和鱷魚蛋的能力而受到崇敬。
The ichneumon wasp lays its eggs inside caterpillars, where its larvae develop and feed. 姬蜂將卵產在毛毛蟲體內，其幼蟲在那裡發育並進食。

meaning: 被姬蜂寄生的；（昆蟲）被姬蜂在其體內產卵的
sentences: The ichneumoned caterpillar continued to eat leaves while the wasp larvae developed inside it. 被姬蜂寄生的毛毛蟲在黃蜂幼蟲在其體內發育時繼續吃葉子。
Biologists observed that ichneumoned insects often behave normally until the larvae emerge. 生物學家觀察到被寄生的昆蟲在幼蟲出現之前通常行為正常。

meaning: 姬蜂科（舊分類用名）；一類寄生性黃蜂的舊式總稱
sentences: Early naturalists grouped parasitic wasps under the name Ichneumones before modern classification. 早期博物學家在現代分類之前將寄生黃蜂歸入 Ichneumones 這個名稱。
The Ichneumones were known even in ancient times for their parasitic behavior. 姬蜂科甚至在古代就以其寄生行為而聞名。

meaning: 姬蜂科的；屬於姬蜂科的寄生蜂
sentences: The ichneumonid wasp is an important natural pest controller in forests and gardens. 姬蜂科黃蜂是森林和花園中重要的天然害蟲控制者。
Researchers use ichneumonid wasps as biological control agents against crop pests. 研究人員使用姬蜂科黃蜂作為對抗農作物害蟲的生物防治劑。

meaning: 姬蜂科；世界上最大的昆蟲科之一，全為寄生性黃蜂
sentences: Ichneumonidae is one of the largest insect families, with over 25,000 described species. 姬蜂科是最大的昆蟲科之一，有超過25,000個已描述物種。
Species of Ichneumonidae are found on every continent except Antarctica. 姬蜂科物種分布於除南極洲外的每個大洲。

meaning: 姬蜂科的成員；屬於姬蜂科的黃蜂
sentences: Each ichneumonidan species targets a specific host insect for laying its eggs. 每個姬蜂科物種針對特定寄主昆蟲產卵。
The ichneumonidan plays a vital role in controlling insect populations in natural ecosystems. 姬蜂科成員在自然生態系統中扮演控制昆蟲族群的重要角色。

meaning: 姬蜂總科（舊分類用名）；包含姬蜂及相關寄生蜂的較高分類群
sentences: Historical entomologists used Ichneumonides to group all parasitic wasps with long ovipositors. 歷史上的昆蟲學家用 Ichneumonides 來歸類所有具有長產卵管的寄生黃蜂。
Modern taxonomy has replaced Ichneumonides with more precisely defined superfamilies. 現代分類學已用更精確定義的總科取代了 Ichneumonides。

meaning: 外形似姬蜂的；具有姬蜂外觀特徵的
sentences: The ichneumoniform wasp was initially misidentified due to its resemblance to true ichneumons. 這種外形似姬蜂的黃蜂最初因其與真正姬蜂的相似性而被誤認。
Some ichneumoniform insects use mimicry to deter predators. 一些外形似姬蜂的昆蟲利用擬態來嚇阻捕食者。

meaning: 被姬蜂寄生的；（寄主昆蟲）被姬蜂幼蟲佔據的
sentences: The ichneumonized larva moved sluggishly as the parasitic wasps consumed it from within. 被姬蜂寄生的幼蟲行動遲緩，因為寄生黃蜂從內部消耗了它。
Farmers welcome ichneumonized caterpillars as a sign that natural pest control is working. 農民歡迎被寄生的毛毛蟲作為天然害蟲防治起作用的跡象。

meaning: 似姬蜂的；類似姬蜂科的；屬於姬蜂總科的
sentences: The ichneumonoid wasps share a common ancestor and similar parasitic lifestyles. 姬蜂總科的黃蜂擁有共同的祖先和相似的寄生生活方式。
An ichneumonoid wasp emerged from the cocoon, signaling that the host caterpillar had died. 一隻姬蜂總科的黃蜂從繭中出現，表明寄主毛毛蟲已經死亡。

meaning: 姬蜂總科；包含姬蜂科和繭蜂科的膜翅目寄生黃蜂總科
sentences: Ichneumonoidea is one of the most species-rich superfamilies in the animal kingdom. 姬蜂總科是動物界物種最豐富的總科之一。
Members of Ichneumonoidea are essential for maintaining balance in forest ecosystems. 姬蜂總科的成員對於維持森林生態系統的平衡至關重要。

meaning: 姬蜂學；研究姬蜂科黃蜂的昆蟲學分支
sentences: Ichneumonology has advanced rapidly with the use of genetic analysis to distinguish species. 隨著遺傳分析用於區分物種，姬蜂學迅速發展。
An expert in ichneumonology can identify hundreds of species by their body shape and coloring. 姬蜂學專家可以通過體形和顏色識別數百種物種。

meaning: 具有姬蜂特徵的；類似姬蜂行為的（罕用字）
sentences: The ichneumous behavior of the wasp species made it a valuable ally in pest management. 這種黃蜂物種的姬蜂行為使其成為害蟲管理中的寶貴盟友。
Ancient writers described ichneumous creatures as clever hunters of eggs and small prey. 古代作家將具有姬蜂特徵的生物描述為卵和小型獵物的聰明獵手。

meaning: 與追蹤或足跡研究相關的（罕用學術詞）
sentences: The ichneutic analysis of the fossil trackways revealed the gait of ancient dinosaurs. 對化石足跡的追蹤研究分析揭示了古代恐龍的步態。
Ichneutic methods help paleontologists reconstruct the behavior of prehistoric animals. 足跡研究方法幫助古生物學家重建史前動物的行為。

meaning: 化石足跡；古代生物留下的足跡或痕跡的化石
sentences: The ichnite found in the sandstone was identified as a footprint from a large theropod dinosaur. 在砂岩中發現的化石足跡被鑑定為大型獸腳類恐龍的足印。
An ichnite tells scientists not just what an animal looked like, but how it moved. 化石足跡不僅告訴科學家動物的外貌，還告訴他們動物如何移動。

meaning: 平面圖的；與建築或地形平面圖繪製相關的
sentences: The architect produced an ichnographic drawing showing the floor plan of the ancient temple. 建築師製作了一張顯示古廟平面圖的平面圖繪製圖。
Ichnographic surveys are essential for understanding the layout of archaeological sites. 平面圖測量對於了解考古遺址的佈局至關重要。

meaning: 平面圖的；涉及平面繪圖的（ichnographic 的較長形式）
sentences: The ichnographical records from the excavation provided a detailed map of the buried city. 挖掘的平面圖記錄提供了埋藏城市的詳細地圖。
The museum displayed ichnographical reproductions of famous ancient buildings. 博物館展示了著名古代建築的平面圖複製品。

meaning: 以平面圖方式；就平面繪圖而言
sentences: The site was documented ichnographically before any excavation began. 在任何挖掘開始之前，該遺址以平面圖方式進行了記錄。
The building was ichnographically represented in the city's historical archive. 這座建築在城市的歷史檔案中以平面圖方式呈現。

meaning: 平面圖學；建築物或場所的地平面圖；地形圖繪製學
sentences: Ichnography is the practice of drawing the ground plan of a building or site. 平面圖學是繪製建築物或場所地平面圖的實踐。
The architect's ichnography revealed the clever symmetry of the ancient Roman villa. 建築師的平面圖揭示了古羅馬別墅巧妙的對稱性。

meaning: 足跡化石；動物在古代沉積物中留下足跡的化石
sentences: The ichnolite preserved in limestone gave clues about the weight and speed of the dinosaur. 保存在石灰岩中的足跡化石提供了關於恐龍體重和速度的線索。
Paleontologists collected every ichnolite found at the site to reconstruct the animals' path. 古生物學家收集了在遺址發現的每一個足跡化石，以重建動物的路徑。

meaning: 化石足跡學；研究化石足跡和痕跡的科學（遺跡化石學的舊稱）
sentences: Ichnolithology helps scientists understand animal behavior millions of years ago. 化石足跡學幫助科學家了解數百萬年前的動物行為。
Early studies in ichnolithology focused mainly on dinosaur footprints discovered in European rocks. 早期的化石足跡學研究主要集中在歐洲岩石中發現的恐龍足跡。

meaning: 足跡化石的；與岩石中的化石痕跡相關的
sentences: The ichnolitic layer of the rock formation revealed a rich diversity of ancient life. 岩層的足跡化石層揭示了豐富多樣的古代生命。
Geologists identified several ichnolitic surfaces during the construction survey. 地質學家在建設調查期間發現了幾個足跡化石面。

meaning: 遺跡學的；與研究化石足跡和痕跡的科學相關的
sentences: The ichnological evidence at the site suggested a herd of large plant-eating dinosaurs had passed through. 遺址的遺跡學證據表明一群大型草食性恐龍曾經過此地。
Ichnological data complements skeletal fossils by revealing how ancient animals actually moved. 遺跡學數據通過揭示古代動物實際移動方式來補充骨骼化石。

meaning: 遺跡學；研究動物足跡、痕跡及其他活動痕跡化石的科學
sentences: Ichnology studies trace fossils such as footprints, burrows, and feeding marks to reconstruct past behaviors. 遺跡學研究足跡、洞穴和進食痕跡等痕跡化石，以重建過去的行為。
Advances in ichnology have revealed surprising details about how prehistoric creatures interacted. 遺跡學的進步揭示了史前生物如何相互作用的驚人細節。

meaning: 足跡占卜；透過觀察人或動物足跡來預測未來的占卜術
sentences: Ichnomancy was practiced by some cultures as a method of divination based on studying footprints. 足跡占卜在某些文化中作為一種基於研究足跡的占卜方法而實踐。
The shaman performed ichnomancy before the hunt, reading the tracks left by animals. 薩滿在狩獵前進行足跡占卜，解讀動物留下的足跡。

meaning: icho 的一種；日語中銀杏樹的方言稱謂
sentences: The icho trees lining the avenue turned brilliant gold every autumn. 大道兩旁的銀杏樹每到秋天都變得金燦燦的。
In Japanese culture, the icho is celebrated for its resilience and autumn beauty. 在日本文化中，銀杏以其韌性和秋天的美麗而受到讚揚。

meaning: 伊喬格蘭；鄂圖曼帝國宮廷中服侍蘇丹的年輕侍從
sentences: The ichoglan received special training in court etiquette, languages, and military skills. 伊喬格蘭接受宮廷禮儀、語言和軍事技能的特殊訓練。
Rising from ichoglan to vizier was a common path to power in the Ottoman court. 從伊喬格蘭晉升為維齊爾是鄂圖曼宮廷中通往權力的常見途徑。

meaning: 神仙血；希臘神話中眾神體內流動的液體；也指傷口流出的稀薄膿液
sentences: In Greek mythology, ichor flowed through the veins of the gods instead of blood. 在希臘神話中，神仙血在眾神的血管中流淌，而非血液。
The doctor was concerned when ichor continued to seep from the wound despite treatment. 醫生擔憂的是，儘管進行了治療，傷口仍繼續滲出稀薄膿液。

meaning: 如神仙血的；含有稀薄膿液的；（傷口）滲出水樣分泌物的
sentences: The physician noted that the ichorous discharge from the wound suggested a slow-healing infection. 醫師注意到傷口流出的稀薄膿液分泌物表明感染癒合緩慢。
Ancient writers described the wounds of gods as ichorous rather than bloody. 古代作家將神的傷口描述為流出神仙血而非血液的。

meaning: 稀薄膿液的持續滲出；傷口持續流出水樣分泌物的病理狀態
sentences: The patient suffered from ichorrhea, with watery fluid constantly seeping from the surgical wound. 患者患有稀薄膿液滲出症，手術傷口不斷滲出水樣液體。
Ichorrhea was a sign that the healing process had been disrupted or infected. 稀薄膿液滲出是癒合過程受到干擾或感染的跡象。

meaning: 敗血症（舊稱）；血液中含有膿性或毒性物質的病理狀態
sentences: Before germ theory was established, physicians used the term ichorrhemia to describe blood poisoning. 在細菌理論建立之前，醫師使用 ichorrhemia 一詞來描述血液中毒。
Ichorrhemia was often fatal in the nineteenth century before the advent of antibiotics. 在抗生素出現之前，ichorrhemia 在十九世紀常常是致命的。

meaning: 魚素；魚卵中富含磷的球蛋白質
sentences: Ichthulin is a phosphoprotein found in fish eggs that provides nutrients for developing embryos. Ichthulin 是魚卵中的磷蛋白，為發育中的胚胎提供營養。
Biochemists study ichthulin to understand the nutritional composition of fish eggs. 生物化學家研究 ichthulin 以了解魚卵的營養成分。

meaning: 魚素的；與魚卵中磷蛋白質相關的
sentences: The ichthulinic acid was extracted from salmon eggs for laboratory analysis. 從鮭魚卵中提取了魚素酸進行實驗室分析。
Researchers found that ichthulinic compounds are rich sources of phosphorus and amino acids. 研究人員發現魚素化合物是磷和氨基酸的豐富來源。

meaning: 魚（希臘語）；早期基督教的魚形符號，由希臘字首縮寫組成
sentences: The ichthus was used as a secret symbol by early Christians to identify themselves to each other. 早期基督徒使用魚形符號作為秘密符號相互識別。
You can still see the ichthus symbol on car bumpers as a sign of Christian faith today. 今天你仍然可以在汽車保險桿上看到魚形符號，作為基督信仰的標誌。
The ichthyal specimens in the museum collection came from oceans around the world. 博物館收藏中的魚類標本來自世界各地的海洋。
Ichthyal anatomy differs significantly between freshwater and saltwater species. 淡水和鹹水物種之間的魚類解剖結構差異顯著。

meaning: 魚類的；具有魚類特徵的
sentences: The ancient fossil revealed a creature with ichthyic features adapted to an aquatic environment. 古代化石揭示了一種具有適應水生環境的魚類特徵的生物。
The biologist described the animal as ichthyic in its body shape and swimming motion. 生物學家將這種動物在體形和游泳動作上描述為具有魚類特徵的。

meaning: 魚中毒；因食用有毒魚類或過量魚肉而引起的中毒症狀
sentences: Ichthyism occurs when certain toxic fish are consumed, causing nausea and neurological symptoms. 魚中毒發生在食用某些有毒魚類時，引起噁心和神經系統症狀。
Coastal communities are warned about the risk of ichthyism during certain seasons when fish may carry toxins. 沿海社區在某些魚類可能攜帶毒素的季節被警告魚中毒的風險。

meaning: 魚中毒（ichthyism 的拉丁文形式）；與食用有毒魚類相關的中毒
sentences: Historical medical texts refer to ichthyismus as a common hazard for fishing communities. 歷史醫學文本將 ichthyismus 稱為漁業社區的常見危害。
Cases of ichthyismus were documented by ship physicians during long ocean voyages. ichthyismus 的案例由船上醫師在長途海洋航行中記錄。

meaning: 魚化；使某物具有魚類特徵的過程
sentences: The ichthyization of the amphibian lineage is documented in the fossil record. 兩棲動物譜系的魚化過程在化石記錄中有所記載。
Scientists traced the ichthyization process through millions of years of evolution. 科學家追蹤了數百萬年演化中的魚化過程。

meaning: 已魚化的；被賦予魚類特徵的
sentences: The ichthyized fossil showed a creature transitioning from land to water. 已魚化的化石呈現出一種從陸地向水中過渡的生物。
Some ancient amphibians became increasingly ichthyized as they adapted to aquatic life. 一些古代兩棲動物在適應水生生活時變得越來越具有魚類特徵。

meaning: 魚蛙類的；兼具魚類和兩棲類特徵的
sentences: The ichthyobatrachian specimen bridged the gap between fish and early amphibians. 這件兼具魚蛙特徵的標本填補了魚類和早期兩棲動物之間的空缺。
Paleontologists classified the fossil as ichthyobatrachian due to its mixed anatomical features. 古生物學家因其混合的解剖特徵而將此化石分類為魚蛙類。

meaning: 魚頭類；古代傳說中人身魚頭的生物群
sentences: Medieval maps sometimes depicted the Ichthyocephali as inhabitants of distant seas. 中世紀地圖有時將魚頭人描繪為遠海的居民。
The Ichthyocephali appeared in classical literature as mythological sea creatures. 魚頭類在古典文學中以神話海洋生物的形象出現。

meaning: 魚頭的；具有魚類頭部特徵的
sentences: Ancient myths described ichthyocephalous sea gods ruling over the ocean depths. 古代神話描述魚頭海神統治著海洋深處。
The ichthyocephalous idol was found in the ruins of a coastal temple. 這個魚頭偶像在沿海神廟的廢墟中被發現。

meaning: 魚膠；從魚的鰾中提取的膠質物質（ichthyocolla 的縮寫）
sentences: Ichthyocol was traditionally used to clarify wine and beer by removing suspended particles. 魚膠傳統上用於通過去除懸浮顆粒來澄清葡萄酒和啤酒。
The conservator used ichthyocol to repair the fragile pages of the ancient manuscript. 修復師使用魚膠修復古代手稿的脆弱頁面。

meaning: 魚鰾膠；從大魚魚鰾提取的天然膠質，用於澄清液體和黏合
sentences: Ichthyocolla has been used for centuries to clarify beverages and restore old paintings. 魚鰾膠數百年來用於澄清飲料和修復舊畫作。
The recipe called for ichthyocolla as a binding agent in the preparation of the herbal remedy. 這個配方要求使用魚鰾膠作為草藥製劑的黏合劑。

meaning: 魚類糞化石；魚類糞便形成的化石
sentences: The ichthyocoprolite provided valuable clues about the diet of ancient fish. 魚類糞化石提供了關於古代魚類飲食的寶貴線索。
Paleontologists found ichthyocoprolites alongside fish fossils in the Jurassic sediment. 古生物學家在侏羅紀沉積物中的魚類化石旁發現了魚類糞化石。

meaning: 魚形目；某些分類系統中用於歸類魚形脊椎動物的群組
sentences: Early naturalists placed fish-like vertebrates within the broad grouping of Ichthyodea. 早期博物學家將魚形脊椎動物納入廣義的魚形目分類。
The boundaries of Ichthyodea were debated as fossil discoveries revealed new species. 隨著化石發現揭示新物種，魚形目的邊界受到爭議。

meaning: 魚獵龍科；已滅絕的白堊紀大型掠食性魚類科
sentences: Ichthyodectidae were large predatory fish that dominated shallow seas during the Cretaceous period. 魚獵龍科是白堊紀時期主宰淺海的大型掠食性魚類。
Fossils of Ichthyodectidae have been found on multiple continents, showing their wide distribution. 魚獵龍科的化石在多個大洲被發現，顯示其廣泛的分布。

meaning: 魚形的；屬於魚形動物的
sentences: The ichthyodian creature swam through Devonian seas with remarkable efficiency. 這種魚形生物以驚人的效率游過泥盆紀的海洋。
Its ichthyodian body plan allowed it to pursue prey at high speed. 其魚形的身體結構使其能夠高速追逐獵物。

meaning: 具有魚齒的；有魚類般牙齒的動物
sentences: The ichthyodont fossil revealed a creature with rows of sharp, fish-like teeth. 魚齒動物化石揭示了一種具有成排尖銳魚齒的生物。
Paleontologists classified the specimen as an ichthyodont based on its distinctive dental structure. 古生物學家根據其獨特的牙齒結構將標本分類為魚齒動物。

meaning: 魚刺化石；魚類背鰭或胸鰭硬棘的化石
sentences: The ichthyodorulite found in the quarry helped identify the species of ancient shark. 採石場發現的魚刺化石幫助鑑別了古代鯊魚的物種。
Many ichthyodorulites are well-preserved because the bony spines resist weathering better than soft tissue. 許多魚刺化石保存完好，因為骨質棘比軟組織更能抵抗風化。

meaning: 魚類相；某一地區或特定時期的魚類種群總稱
sentences: The ichthyofauna of the Amazon River basin is the most diverse in the world. 亞馬遜河流域的魚類相是世界上最多樣化的。
Scientists documented the ichthyofauna of the lake before the dam construction began. 科學家在水壩建設開始前記錄了湖泊的魚類相。

meaning: 魚形的；具有魚的外形的
sentences: The ichthyoform shape of the submarine allowed it to move silently through the water. 潛水艇的魚形外觀使其能夠無聲地在水中移動。
Engineers studied ichthyoform designs to improve the hydrodynamics of underwater vehicles. 工程師研究魚形設計以改善水下載具的水動力學。

meaning: 魚類學描述者；撰寫魚類描述或圖鑑的人
sentences: As a dedicated ichthyographer, he spent decades illustrating and describing new fish species. 作為一位熱忱的魚類描述者，他花了數十年繪製和描述新魚種。
The 18th-century ichthyographer produced detailed engravings of tropical fish collected during ocean voyages. 十八世紀的魚類描述者製作了在海洋航行中收集的熱帶魚類的詳細版畫。

meaning: 魚類圖譜；記載魚類描述和圖像的著作
sentences: The ancient ichthyographia contained hand-painted illustrations of Mediterranean fish species. 這部古代魚類圖譜包含地中海魚類的手繪插圖。
Ichthyographia published in the Renaissance period helped classify hundreds of known fish species. 文藝復興時期出版的魚類圖譜幫助對數百種已知魚類進行分類。

meaning: 魚類描述的；與魚類圖譜或描述相關的
sentences: The ichthyographic work produced by the naturalist was a standard reference for a century. 這位博物學家製作的魚類描述著作是一個世紀的標準參考資料。
Ichthyographic illustrations from the 1700s remain valuable for understanding historical fish diversity. 1700年代的魚類描述插圖對於了解歷史魚類多樣性仍然有價值。

meaning: 魚類描述學；系統描述魚類的科學或著作
sentences: Ichthyography laid the groundwork for modern ichthyology by documenting known fish species in detail. 魚類描述學通過詳細記錄已知魚類為現代魚類學奠定了基礎。
The museum's rare library contained several important works on ichthyography from the early modern period. 博物館珍貴圖書館藏有數部近代早期關於魚類描述學的重要著作。
The ichthyoid creature discovered in the Devonian shale puzzled scientists for years. 在泥盆紀頁岩中發現的魚形生物困擾科學家多年。
Its ichthyoid profile made it perfectly suited for fast movement through water. 其魚形輪廓使其非常適合在水中快速移動。

meaning: 類魚的；具有魚類外觀或特性的（ichthyoid 的另一形式）
sentences: The ichthyoidal body of the ancient reptile suggested it had returned to life in the sea. 這種古代爬行動物的類魚體型表明它已重返海洋生活。
Biologists noted ichthyoidal adaptations in the marine mammal's streamlined shape. 生物學家注意到這種海洋哺乳動物流線型外形中的類魚適應性。

meaning: 魚形總目；包含所有魚形脊椎動物的高級分類群（已廢棄用法）
sentences: Historical classification systems placed all fish-like animals under the broad umbrella of Ichthyoidea. 歷史分類系統將所有魚形動物置於廣義的魚形總目下。
Modern taxonomy replaced Ichthyoidea with more precise groupings based on evolutionary relationships. 現代分類學以基於進化關係的更精確分組取代了魚形總目。

meaning: 魚石脂；從頁岩油中提取的黑色藥用物質，用於治療皮膚病
sentences: Ichthyol ointment was widely prescribed in the early twentieth century for skin infections and inflammation. 魚石脂藥膏在二十世紀初被廣泛用於治療皮膚感染和炎症。
The dermatologist applied Ichthyol to reduce the swelling and draw out the infection. 皮膚科醫師塗抹魚石脂以消腫並清除感染。

meaning: 崇拜魚的；與魚類崇拜相關的
sentences: Ancient Egyptian sects were sometimes described as ichthyolatrous because of their veneration of sacred fish. 古埃及派系有時因其對神聖魚類的崇敬而被描述為崇拜魚的。
Ichthyolatrous traditions are found in various coastal cultures that depended on fishing for survival. 在各種依賴捕魚為生的沿海文化中都能找到魚類崇拜的傳統。

meaning: 魚類崇拜；對魚類的宗教崇拜
sentences: Ichthyolatry was practiced in ancient Egypt, where certain fish were considered sacred to specific gods. 魚類崇拜在古埃及流行，某些魚類被視為特定神靈的聖物。
Anthropologists have documented ichthyolatry in isolated island cultures that revere the sea and its creatures. 人類學家記錄了崇敬海洋及其生物的孤立島嶼文化中的魚類崇拜。

meaning: 魚化石；魚類遺骸形成的化石
sentences: The ichthyolite embedded in the cliff face was over 65 million years old. 嵌入懸崖面的魚化石已有超過六千五百萬年的歷史。
Amateur fossil hunters discovered an ichthyolite while hiking along the riverbank. 業餘化石獵人在沿河岸徒步時發現了一塊魚化石。

meaning: 含魚化石的；與魚化石相關的
sentences: The ichthyolitic limestone layers revealed a thriving marine ecosystem from millions of years ago. 含魚化石的石灰岩層揭示了數百萬年前繁盛的海洋生態系統。
The geologist identified the formation as ichthyolitic based on the abundant fish remains embedded in the rock. 地質學家根據岩石中豐富的魚類遺骸將地層鑑定為含魚化石的。

meaning: 魚類學的；與魚類學相關的（ichthyological 的縮寫形式）
sentences: The ichthyologic survey of the river basin took three years to complete. 河流盆地的魚類學調查耗時三年才完成。
Ichthyologic research has identified hundreds of new species in the past decade. 魚類學研究在過去十年中鑑定了數百個新物種。

meaning: 魚類學的；與研究魚類的科學相關的
sentences: The university's ichthyological collection contains specimens from rivers across three continents. 該大學的魚類學收藏包含來自三大洲河流的標本。
Ichthyological studies are essential for managing fish populations and protecting aquatic biodiversity. 魚類學研究對於管理魚類種群和保護水生生物多樣性至關重要。

meaning: 從魚類學角度；就魚類學而言
sentences: Ichthyologically speaking, the river is one of the richest in Asia in terms of species diversity. 從魚類學角度來看，這條河流在物種多樣性方面是亞洲最豐富的之一。
The species is ichthyologically significant because it represents an entirely new genus. 這個物種在魚類學上具有重要意義，因為它代表了一個全新的屬。

meaning: 魚類學家；專門研究魚類的科學家
sentences: The ichthyologist spent six months cataloguing the fish species found in the Amazon delta. 這位魚類學家花了六個月對亞馬遜三角洲發現的魚類物種進行分類。
As an ichthyologist, she discovered over thirty previously unknown species during her career. 作為一位魚類學家，她在職業生涯中發現了超過三十個以前未知的物種。

meaning: 魚類學；研究魚類的科學分支
sentences: Ichthyology covers the anatomy, behavior, ecology, and classification of fish. 魚類學涵蓋魚類的解剖學、行為、生態學和分類學。
She chose ichthyology as her specialization after a childhood fascination with tropical fish. 她在童年時對熱帶魚的著迷之後選擇了魚類學作為專業。

meaning: 魚占；通過觀察魚的內臟或行為來占卜未來的占卜術
sentences: Ichthyomancy was practiced in ancient Mesopotamia, where priests read omens from fish entrails. 魚占在古代美索不達米亞實踐，祭司從魚的內臟中讀取預兆。
The fisherman performed ichthyomancy by observing the behavior of fish before a voyage. 漁夫在出航前通過觀察魚的行為進行魚占。
The ichthyomantic priest studied the movement of sacred fish to predict the coming harvest. 魚占祭司研究神聖魚類的動向以預測即將到來的收穫。
Ancient texts describe ichthyomantic practices at temples near rivers and lakes. 古代文本描述了在河流和湖泊附近神廟中的魚占習俗。

meaning: 魚形亞綱；蚓螈目的舊稱，一類無腿的穴居兩棲動物
sentences: The Ichthyomorpha were once thought to be primitive amphibians due to their fish-like body plan. 魚形亞綱曾因其魚形體型而被認為是原始兩棲動物。
Modern classification has replaced the term Ichthyomorpha with more precise taxonomic names. 現代分類學已用更精確的分類名稱取代了魚形亞綱這個術語。

meaning: 魚形的；以魚的形狀呈現的
sentences: The ancient temple featured ichthyomorphic carvings of fish gods along its walls. 古廟的牆壁上有魚形神像的雕刻。
Ichthyomorphic vessels were used in ritual ceremonies in many coastal civilizations. 魚形容器在許多沿海文明的儀式中使用。

meaning: 魚形的；具有魚類外觀的（同 ichthyomorphic）
sentences: The ichthyomorphous deity was worshipped by fishermen seeking safe passage at sea. 魚形神靈受到祈求海上安全通道的漁民的崇拜。
The creature's ichthyomorphous body was perfectly adapted for life in deep ocean trenches. 這種生物的魚形身體完美地適應了深海溝中的生活。

meaning: 魚類命名學；魚類物種的命名規則與慣例
sentences: Ichthyonomy establishes the rules by which new fish species receive their scientific names. 魚類命名學建立了新魚類物種獲得科學名稱的規則。
A dispute in ichthyonomy arose when two researchers independently named the same species differently. 當兩位研究人員獨立地以不同名稱命名同一物種時，魚類命名學中出現了爭議。

meaning: 魚類古生物學；研究魚類化石的科學
sentences: Ichthyopaleontology has revealed how fish evolved from ancient jawless ancestors over millions of years. 魚類古生物學揭示了魚類如何在數百萬年中從古代無顎祖先進化而來。
The professor specialized in ichthyopaleontology and had written extensively on Devonian fish fauna. 這位教授專注於魚類古生物學，並廣泛撰寫了關於泥盆紀魚類動物群的文章。

meaning: 食魚的；以魚為主食的（人或動物）
sentences: The ichthyophagan tribe lived on a diet almost entirely composed of fresh and dried fish. 這個食魚部落的飲食幾乎完全由新鮮和乾魚組成。
Polar bears are ichthyophagan predators that rely heavily on fish during summer months. 北極熊是食魚捕食者，在夏季嚴重依賴魚類為食。

meaning: 食魚者；古代記載中以魚為主食的民族
sentences: Ancient geographers referred to coastal peoples of the Red Sea region as the Ichthyophagi. 古代地理學家將紅海地區的沿海民族稱為食魚者。
The Ichthyophagi built their entire culture around the harvest and preservation of fish. 食魚者圍繞魚類的捕撈和保存建立了整個文化。

meaning: 食魚的；與以魚為食的習慣相關的
sentences: The ichthyophagian diet of the coastal village provided rich protein with minimal farming. 沿海村莊的食魚飲食以最少的農耕提供了豐富的蛋白質。
Ichthyophagian customs are still observed in certain island communities during religious festivals. 在某些島嶼社區的宗教節日中仍然遵循食魚習俗。

meaning: 食魚者；習慣以魚類為主食的人
sentences: The dedicated ichthyophagist ate fish at every meal and knew hundreds of ways to prepare it. 這位忠實的食魚者每餐都吃魚，知道數百種烹製方法。
Researchers studied ichthyophagists in northern coastal communities to understand their unique nutritional health. 研究人員研究北部沿海社區的食魚者以了解其獨特的營養健康狀況。

meaning: 以魚為食；養成食魚習慣
sentences: Communities near the river naturally ichthyophagize, relying on the abundant freshwater fish. 靠近河流的社區自然而然地以魚為食，依賴豐富的淡水魚。
The explorers had to ichthyophagize when their food supplies ran out during the polar expedition. 探險者在極地探險中食物供應耗盡時不得不以魚為食。

meaning: 食魚的；以魚類為主要食物的
sentences: Penguins are ichthyophagous birds that dive deep into the ocean to catch fish. 企鵝是深入海洋捕魚的食魚鳥類。
The ichthyophagous lifestyle of the coastal people shaped their entire culture and economy. 沿海居民的食魚生活方式塑造了他們的整個文化和經濟。

meaning: 食魚習慣；以魚為主要食物的飲食方式
sentences: Ichthyophagy has been a cornerstone of nutrition for island peoples throughout history. 食魚習慣在歷史上一直是島嶼民族營養的基石。
Studies show that ichthyophagy is associated with lower rates of heart disease in certain populations. 研究表明，食魚習慣與某些人群中較低的心臟病發病率相關。

meaning: 魚類愛好者；對魚類有特別喜愛的人
sentences: As an ichthyophile, she kept a large freshwater aquarium filled with exotic tropical fish. 作為一位魚類愛好者，她養了一個裝滿異國熱帶魚的大型淡水魚缸。
The ichthyophile spent weekends visiting fish markets and aquariums to observe rare species. 這位魚類愛好者在週末走訪魚市場和水族館觀察稀有物種。

meaning: 魚類恐懼症；對魚類的強烈恐懼或厭惡
sentences: Her ichthyophobia made it impossible for her to visit the aquarium with her family. 她的魚類恐懼症使她無法與家人參觀水族館。
Ichthyophobia can develop after a frightening encounter with fish in childhood. 魚類恐懼症可能在童年時與魚類的令人恐懼的相遇後發展起來。

meaning: 魚眼石；一種形似魚眼的礦物，即方解石的一種
sentences: The ichthyophthalmite crystals in the rock face glittered like a thousand fish eyes. 岩面中的魚眼石晶體閃爍著如千眼魚眼般的光芒。
Collectors prize ichthyophthalmite for its distinctive pearlescent appearance and rounded form. 收藏家珍視魚眼石其獨特的珠光外觀和圓潤形狀。

meaning: 白點病；由小瓜蟲引起的魚類寄生蟲病，常見於水族箱中
sentences: Ichthyophthiriasis is one of the most common diseases threatening fish kept in home aquariums. 白點病是威脅家庭水族箱中魚類最常見的疾病之一。
Aquarists treat ichthyophthiriasis by raising water temperature and adding medication to the tank. 水族愛好者通過提高水溫和在魚缸中添加藥物來治療白點病。

meaning: 魚類販賣業；魚類買賣的行業
sentences: Ichthyopolism was a vital trade in ancient Mediterranean cities that relied on preserved fish exports. 魚類販賣業是古代地中海城市中依靠醃製魚類出口的重要貿易。
The rise of ichthyopolism along the coast led to the development of specialized fishing and drying techniques. 沿海魚類販賣業的興起促進了專業捕魚和乾製技術的發展。
The ichthyopolist at the harbor market sold fresh catch every morning before sunrise. 港口市場的魚販每天日出前出售新鮮漁獲。
In ancient Rome, the ichthyopolist occupied an important social and economic role in the city. 在古羅馬，魚販在城市中扮演著重要的社會和經濟角色。

meaning: 魚形脊椎動物；泛指包含魚類和兩棲類的低等脊椎動物
sentences: The ichthyopsid lineage includes both ancient fish and their amphibian descendants. 魚形脊椎動物譜系包括古代魚類及其兩棲類後裔。
Palaeontologists trace the evolution of limbs from fins in ichthyopsid ancestors. 古生物學家追蹤魚形脊椎動物祖先中四肢從鰭的演化過程。

meaning: 魚形綱；包含魚類和兩棲類的脊椎動物高級分類群（舊式分類）
sentences: The Ichthyopsida classification grouped aquatic and semi-aquatic vertebrates based on shared features. 魚形綱分類根據共同特徵將水生和半水生脊椎動物歸為一組。
Modern phylogenetics has largely replaced the Ichthyopsida grouping with clade-based classifications. 現代系統發生學已基本上用支序分類法取代了魚形綱的分組。

meaning: 魚形脊椎動物的；屬於或類似魚形綱的
sentences: The ichthyopsidan body plan is characterized by an aquatic lifestyle and gill respiration. 魚形脊椎動物的體型特徵是水生生活方式和鰓呼吸。
Ichthyopsidan fossils form a critical record of early vertebrate evolution in water. 魚形脊椎動物化石構成了水中早期脊椎動物演化的關鍵記錄。

meaning: 魚龍目；已滅絕的中生代海生爬行動物目，外形似魚
sentences: Ichthyopterygia were fully aquatic reptiles that resembled dolphins in their streamlined body shape. 魚龍目是外形流線型、類似海豚的完全水生爬行動物。
Fossils of Ichthyopterygia have been found with preserved outlines showing their fish-like form. 魚龍目的化石已被發現並保存了顯示其魚形外觀的輪廓。

meaning: 魚龍目的；屬於魚龍目的海生爬行動物
sentences: The ichthyopterygian reptile hunted fish and cephalopods in Mesozoic seas. 魚龍目爬行動物在中生代海洋中獵食魚類和頭足類動物。
Ichthyopterygian fossils show that some species gave birth to live young in the water. 魚龍目化石顯示一些物種在水中進行胎生分娩。

meaning: 魚龍鰭；魚龍目的槳狀前肢（複數 ichthyopterygia）
sentences: The ichthyopterygium was a highly modified limb that functioned like a flipper for steering. 魚龍鰭是高度改造的肢體，作為舵形鰭腳使用。
Fossils preserve the ichthyopterygium in remarkable detail, revealing how the digits fused together. 化石以驚人的細節保存了魚龍鰭，揭示了趾骨如何融合在一起。

meaning: 魚鳥；已滅絕的白堊紀鳥類，有牙齒，能飛行
sentences: Ichthyornis is an extinct toothed bird from the Cretaceous period that could fly and swim. 魚鳥是白堊紀已滅絕的有齒鳥類，能夠飛行和游泳。
The discovery of Ichthyornis fossils provided early evidence for the evolutionary link between birds and dinosaurs. 魚鳥化石的發現為鳥類與恐龍之間的演化聯繫提供了早期證據。

meaning: 魚鳥目；包含已滅絕魚鳥屬的鳥類目
sentences: The Ichthyornithes order contains some of the best-known toothed birds from the Late Cretaceous. 魚鳥目包含一些晚白堊紀最著名的有齒鳥類。
Fossils assigned to Ichthyornithes have helped scientists understand early avian evolution. 被歸入魚鳥目的化石幫助科學家了解早期鳥類演化。

meaning: 魚鳥的；與魚鳥目相關的
sentences: The ichthyornithic fossil revealed a transitional form between non-avian dinosaurs and modern birds. 魚鳥類化石揭示了非鳥類恐龍和現代鳥類之間的過渡形式。
Ichthyornithic skeletal features show a mix of dinosaurian and avian characteristics. 魚鳥類骨骼特徵顯示恐龍特徵和鳥類特徵的混合。

meaning: 魚鳥科；已滅絕的有齒飛行鳥類科
sentences: Ichthyornithidae were seabirds with powerful wings and small sharp teeth adapted for catching fish. 魚鳥科是具有強大翅膀和小而尖銳牙齒的海鳥，適合捕魚。
The family Ichthyornithidae thrived in the shallow inland seas of North America during the Cretaceous. 魚鳥科在白堊紀期間在北美的淺內陸海中繁盛生長。

meaning: 魚鳥目（目級分類）；有齒飛行鳥類的目級分類
sentences: Ichthyornithiformes represents a key order in understanding the evolution of modern birds. 魚鳥目是了解現代鳥類演化的關鍵目。
The order Ichthyornithiformes shows that early birds retained teeth long after they developed flight. 魚鳥目顯示早期鳥類在發展出飛行能力後很長時間仍保留了牙齒。

meaning: 似魚鳥的；具有魚鳥類特徵的
sentences: The ichthyornithoid specimen shared key dental features with the classic Ichthyornis specimens. 這件似魚鳥的標本與典型魚鳥標本具有相同的關鍵牙齒特徵。
Paleontologists debated whether to classify the new fossil as ichthyornithoid or assign it to a new group. 古生物學家討論是否將新化石分類為似魚鳥類或將其歸入新群體。

meaning: 魚龍；已滅絕的中生代海生爬行動物，外形似魚或海豚
sentences: The ichthyosaur was a powerful ocean predator that resembled a modern dolphin in shape. 魚龍是一種強大的海洋捕食者，外形類似現代海豚。
Fossils of ichthyosaurs have been found with their stomach contents still preserved. 魚龍的化石已被發現，其胃內容物仍然保存完好。

meaning: 魚龍目；中生代海生爬行動物目
sentences: Ichthyosauria evolved from land reptiles that gradually returned to aquatic life. 魚龍目從逐漸返回水生生活的陸生爬行動物演化而來。
The diversity within Ichthyosauria suggests they occupied many different ecological niches in ancient seas. 魚龍目內部的多樣性表明它們在古代海洋中佔據了許多不同的生態位。
The ichthyosaurian body plan converged remarkably with that of modern dolphins. 魚龍目的體型與現代海豚的體型有顯著的趨同演化。
Ichthyosaurian remains have been discovered on nearly every continent, proving their global distribution. 魚龍類遺骸已在幾乎每個大洲被發現，證明其全球分布。

meaning: 魚龍科的；屬於魚龍科的
sentences: The ichthyosaurid specimen was recovered from Jurassic marine deposits in England. 魚龍科標本從英格蘭的侏羅紀海洋沉積物中取回。
Ichthyosaurid fossils often show excellent preservation due to rapid burial in fine sediments. 魚龍科化石通常由於在細沉積物中迅速掩埋而顯示出極佳的保存狀態。

meaning: 魚龍科；真正魚龍的科級分類
sentences: Ichthyosauridae represents the core family of marine reptiles known as ichthyosaurs. 魚龍科代表被稱為魚龍的核心海洋爬行動物科。
Species within Ichthyosauridae ranged from small dolphin-sized forms to giants over fifteen meters long. 魚龍科的物種從小型海豚大小的形態到超過十五米長的巨型物種不等。

meaning: 似魚龍的；具有魚龍類特徵的
sentences: The ichthyosauroid animal lived alongside true ichthyosaurs but belonged to a different lineage. 這種似魚龍的動物與真正的魚龍共同生活，但屬於不同的譜系。
Its ichthyosauroid adaptations allowed it to thrive in similar marine environments. 其似魚龍的適應性使其能夠在類似的海洋環境中繁盛生存。

meaning: 魚龍屬；最著名的魚龍屬，生存於早侏羅紀
sentences: Ichthyosaurus was one of the first prehistoric reptiles to be scientifically described in the 19th century. 魚龍屬是十九世紀最早被科學描述的史前爬行動物之一。
The complete skeleton of an Ichthyosaurus was famously discovered by fossil hunter Mary Anning. 魚龍屬的完整骨骼由化石獵人瑪麗·安寧著名地發現。

meaning: 魚鱗癬；一種遺傳性皮膚病，皮膚乾燥、粗厚並呈鱗狀
sentences: Ichthyosis causes dry, scaly skin that can be managed with regular moisturizing treatment. 魚鱗癬導致乾燥、鱗狀皮膚，可通過定期保濕治療來控制。
Children born with ichthyosis require special skin care routines to prevent cracking and infection. 患有魚鱗癬的兒童需要特殊的皮膚護理程序來防止破裂和感染。

meaning: 魚類毒素中毒；接觸或食用魚類毒素引起的中毒反應（ichthyism 的變體）
sentences: Ichthyosism was reported among sailors who ate improperly preserved fish during long voyages. 在長途航行中吃了保存不當魚類的水手中出現了魚類毒素中毒的報告。
Symptoms of ichthyosism include nausea, skin rash, and in severe cases neurological effects. 魚類毒素中毒的症狀包括噁心、皮疹，嚴重情況下會有神經系統影響。

meaning: 魚鱗癬的；與魚鱗癬相關的
sentences: The patient's ichthyotic skin required daily application of emollient cream. 患者的魚鱗癬皮膚需要每天塗抹潤膚霜。
Ichthyotic conditions vary widely in severity, from mild dryness to severe scaling. 魚鱗癬病情在嚴重程度上差異很大，從輕微乾燥到嚴重脫屑不等。

meaning: 魚類解剖者（舊稱）；從事魚類解剖研究的人的舊式群稱
sentences: The Ichthyotomi of early natural history societies dissected fish to understand their anatomy. 早期自然史學會的魚類解剖者解剖魚類以了解其解剖結構。
Records of the Ichthyotomi contributed to the foundation of comparative vertebrate anatomy. 魚類解剖者的記錄為比較脊椎動物解剖學的基礎做出了貢獻。

meaning: 魚類解剖學家；專門解剖研究魚類的科學家
sentences: The ichthyotomist carefully dissected the specimen to document every internal organ. 魚類解剖學家仔細解剖標本以記錄每個內臟器官。
As an experienced ichthyotomist, she could identify species differences from internal anatomy alone. 作為一位經驗豐富的魚類解剖學家，她僅憑內部解剖就能識別物種差異。

meaning: 魚類解剖的；與魚類解剖相關的
sentences: The ichthyotomous research at the laboratory produced detailed anatomical atlases of freshwater fish. 實驗室的魚類解剖研究製作了詳細的淡水魚解剖圖譜。
Ichthyotomous techniques have been refined over centuries of scientific observation. 魚類解剖技術在數百年的科學觀察中不斷完善。

meaning: 魚類解剖學；解剖和研究魚類內部結構的科學
sentences: Ichthyotomy revealed that the swim bladder evolved from a primitive lung in ancestral fish. 魚類解剖學揭示了魚鰾是從祖先魚類的原始肺部演化而來的。
Students of ichthyotomy learn to identify species by the arrangement of their internal organs. 魚類解剖學學生學習通過內臟排列來識別物種。

meaning: 魚毒素；魚類體內含有的毒性物質
sentences: The pufferfish produces a powerful ichthyotoxin called tetrodotoxin that can be fatal to humans. 河豚產生一種稱為河豚毒素的強效魚毒素，對人類可能致命。
Researchers study ichthyotoxin to develop antidotes for cases of fish poisoning. 研究人員研究魚毒素以開發魚類中毒的解毒劑。

meaning: 魚毒中毒；因接觸或食用含毒魚類而引起的中毒症狀
sentences: Cases of ichthyotoxism are common in tropical regions where certain reef fish carry toxins. 在某些珊瑚礁魚類攜帶毒素的熱帶地區，魚毒中毒案例很常見。
The hospital treated several cases of ichthyotoxism after a local fish market sold contaminated fish. 在當地魚市出售受污染魚類後，醫院治療了幾例魚毒中毒案例。

meaning: 魚類標本製作術；保存魚類標本以供展示的技藝
sentences: Ichthytaxidermy requires careful treatment of the fish skin and scales to achieve a lifelike result. 魚類標本製作需要仔細處理魚皮和魚鱗以達到栩栩如生的效果。
The museum's ichthytaxidermy collection displayed hundreds of species from around the world. 博物館的魚類標本收藏展示了來自世界各地的數百個物種。

meaning: 伊楚草；南美安地斯高原上的一種典型高山草本植物
sentences: Ichu grass covers vast stretches of the Andean plateau and is used for thatching roofs. 伊楚草覆蓋著安地斯高原的廣闊地帶，用於屋頂茅草覆蓋。
Llamas and alpacas graze on ichu grass at elevations exceeding four thousand meters. 駱馬和羊駝在超過四千米的海拔高度上吃伊楚草。

meaning: 冰卡樹；一種產自南美洲的樹脂樹，其樹脂用於製藥和香料
sentences: The icica tree produces a fragrant resin that indigenous peoples have used for centuries in ritual and medicine. 冰卡樹產生芳香樹脂，原住民幾個世紀以來一直在儀式和醫療中使用。
Botanists collected icica samples in the Amazon basin to study its chemical properties. 植物學家在亞馬遜盆地採集冰卡樹樣本以研究其化學性質。

meaning: 冰柱；由水滴沿表面流下後結凍而形成的錐形冰體
sentences: A long icicle hung from the roof and sparkled in the morning sunlight. 一根長長的冰柱懸掛在屋頂上，在晨光中閃閃發光。
Children reached up to break off icicles from the frozen drain pipe to taste the ice. 孩子們伸手從冰凍的排水管上折下冰柱來嘗一嘗冰的味道。

meaning: 結了冰柱的；掛著冰柱的
sentences: The icicled branches of the pine tree looked like a winter wonderland painting. 松樹結了冰柱的枝條看起來像一幅冬日仙境的畫作。
The icicled eaves of the old barn dripped steadily as the afternoon temperature rose. 舊穀倉結了冰柱的屋簷隨著下午氣溫升高而不斷滴水。

meaning: 冰冷地；冷漠地；以冷淡的方式
sentences: She replied icily when asked about the argument, making clear she had not forgiven him. 當被問及那場爭論時，她冷冰冰地回答，明確表示她還沒有原諒他。
The wind blew icily across the open field, forcing the hikers to wrap their scarves tighter. 風冰冷地吹過開闊的田野，迫使徒步者把圍巾裹得更緊。

meaning: 冰冷；冷漠；寒冷的感覺或態度
sentences: The iciness of the mountain water shocked the swimmers who jumped in. 山中水的冰冷讓跳入的游泳者感到震驚。
There was an iciness in her voice that told him the conversation was over. 她聲音中的冷漠告訴他這次對話已經結束了。
We had to icing quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速icing。
The nurse decided to icing after reading the new policy. 護理師讀完新政策後決定要icing。
We used "icing sugar" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「icing sugar」。
You can use "icing sugar" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「icing sugar」。
He is a global music icon who has inspired millions of people around the world. 他是一位全球性的音樂偶像，激勵了世界各地數百萬人。
Please click on the folder icon to open the documents related to the project. 請單擊文件夾圖示以打開與該專案相關的文件。

meaning: 伊科尼亞的；與土耳其城市科尼亞（古稱 Iconium）相關的
sentences: Iconian history dates back thousands of years, making Konya one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities. 伊科尼亞的歷史可追溯至數千年前，使科尼亞成為最古老的持續有人居住城市之一。
The Iconian region was an important center of early Christianity and Silk Road trade. 伊科尼亞地區是早期基督教和絲路貿易的重要中心。

meaning: 獨特的、特徵性的、身份的象徵。
sentences: an iconic move in martial arts 武術中的標誌性動作
Something described as iconic is distinctive, characteristic, indicative of identity. 被描述為標誌性的東西是獨特的、有特色的、表明身份的。

meaning: 圖像的；符合圖像特徵的（iconic 的舊式或正式形式）
sentences: The iconical representation in the church mosaic showed the saint in a traditional pose. 教堂馬賽克中的圖像呈現以傳統姿勢展示了聖人。
Scholars study iconical traditions to understand how religious art developed across cultures. 學者研究圖像傳統以了解宗教藝術如何在不同文化中發展。

meaning: 圖像主義；使用圖像或象徵符號表達思想的做法
sentences: Iconism in medieval art served to communicate religious stories to those who could not read. 中世紀藝術中的圖像主義用於向不識字的人傳達宗教故事。
Modern advertising relies heavily on iconism to create memorable brand identities. 現代廣告大量依賴圖像主義來創造令人難忘的品牌形象。

meaning: 反偶像崇拜；打破偶像或傳統信念的行為；破除舊習
sentences: The Renaissance was a period of intellectual iconoclasm that challenged centuries of religious doctrine. 文藝復興是挑戰數百年宗教教義的思想破舊立新時期。
His iconoclasm in science led to discoveries that overturned long-accepted theories. 他在科學上的破除舊習導致了推翻長期公認理論的發現。

meaning: 破除偶像者；打破傳統或信念的人；反傳統者
sentences: She was an iconoclast who questioned every assumption her professors made in class. 她是一個破除偶像者，質疑教授在課堂上的每一個假設。
The artist was celebrated as an iconoclast for rejecting all conventional styles of painting. 這位藝術家因拒絕所有傳統繪畫風格而被譽為反傳統者。

meaning: 打破偶像的；反傳統的；挑戰既定觀念的
sentences: His iconoclastic ideas about education shocked the school board but inspired many students. 他關於教育的破舊立新思想震驚了學校委員會，但激勵了許多學生。
The iconoclastic filmmaker ignored genre conventions and created something entirely original. 這位反傳統的電影製作人無視類型慣例，創作出完全原創的作品。

meaning: 以破除偶像的方式；反傳統地
sentences: She spoke iconoclastically about the flaws in the company's long-standing management culture. 她以破舊立新的方式談論公司長期管理文化的缺陷。
The composer iconoclastically abandoned all harmonic rules to create music of pure noise. 這位作曲家以反傳統的方式放棄所有和聲規則，創作出純噪音音樂。

meaning: 偶像破壞主義；系統性地反對宗教圖像或傳統的思想體系
sentences: Iconoclasticism tore through the Byzantine Empire in the 8th and 9th centuries, destroying countless religious images. 偶像破壞主義在八、九世紀席捲拜占庭帝國，摧毀了無數宗教圖像。
Modern iconoclasticism often targets cultural monuments and symbols seen as representing oppression. 現代偶像破壞主義通常針對被視為代表壓迫的文化紀念碑和符號。

meaning: 圖像崇拜者；支持崇拜宗教圖像的人（反對破除偶像者）
sentences: The iconodule defended the use of religious images as aids to worship during the Byzantine controversy. 圖像崇拜者在拜占庭爭論期間為使用宗教圖像作為崇拜輔助工具進行辯護。
As an iconodule, the monk devoted his life to creating and veneration of sacred icons. 作為一位圖像崇拜者，這位修士將一生奉獻給創作和崇拜神聖圖像。

meaning: 崇拜圖像的；支持崇拜宗教圖像的
sentences: The iconodulic tradition of the Eastern Orthodox Church holds that icons are windows to the divine. 東正教的崇拜圖像傳統認為聖像是通往神聖的窗口。
Iconodulic theology teaches that venerating an image is not the same as worshipping it. 崇拜圖像神學教導說崇敬圖像不等同於崇拜它。

meaning: 圖像崇拜主義者；支持崇拜宗教圖像的信徒
sentences: The iconodulist argued that sacred images helped the faithful to focus their prayers. 圖像崇拜主義者認為神聖圖像幫助信徒集中禱告。
During the Byzantine Iconoclasm, iconodulists risked persecution for defending their veneration of icons. 在拜占庭偶像破壞運動期間，圖像崇拜主義者為維護其對聖像的崇拜而冒著迫害的風險。

meaning: 圖像崇拜；對宗教圖像的崇拜實踐
sentences: Iconoduly was at the center of the theological debate that divided the Byzantine Church for over a century. 圖像崇拜是將拜占庭教會分裂超過一個世紀的神學辯論的核心。
The practice of iconoduly remains central to worship in the Eastern Orthodox tradition today. 圖像崇拜的實踐在今天仍然是東正教傳統中崇拜的核心。

meaning: 圖像記錄；圖像或象徵符號的描述；圖解說明
sentences: The iconograph on the temple wall depicted the life story of the deity in sequential images. 神廟牆上的圖像記錄以連續圖像描述了神靈的生平故事。
Researchers used the iconograph as a key source for understanding the religious beliefs of the ancient culture. 研究人員將圖像記錄作為了解古代文化宗教信仰的重要來源。

meaning: 圖像誌學家；研究或描述圖像和象徵符號的學者或藝術家
sentences: The iconographer spent years studying Byzantine art to master the traditional methods of icon painting. 圖像誌學家花了多年研究拜占庭藝術，以掌握傳統圖像繪畫方法。
As a skilled iconographer, she decoded the symbolic language embedded in the cathedral's murals. 作為一位技藝精湛的圖像誌學家，她解讀了大教堂壁畫中蘊含的象徵語言。

meaning: 圖像誌的；與圖像或象徵體系的研究相關的
sentences: The iconographic analysis of the painting revealed hidden religious symbolism unknown to casual viewers. 這幅畫的圖像誌分析揭示了一般觀眾所不知道的隱藏宗教象徵主義。
Scholars use iconographic methods to interpret the meaning behind ancient visual art. 學者使用圖像誌方法來解讀古代視覺藝術背後的含義。

meaning: 圖像誌的（iconographic 的較長形式）；與藝術圖像研究相關的
sentences: The book provided an iconographical guide to Christian symbolism in medieval art. 這本書提供了中世紀藝術中基督教象徵主義的圖像誌指南。
The museum curator prepared an iconographical catalog for the new exhibition of religious paintings. 博物館館長為新的宗教畫展覽準備了圖像誌目錄。

meaning: 圖像誌學家；專門研究圖像和象徵圖像學的學者
sentences: The iconographist identified the figure in the fresco as Saint Catherine from her distinctive attributes. 圖像誌學家從獨特的屬性中識別出壁畫中的人物是聖凱瑟琳。
Working as an iconographist requires deep knowledge of both art history and religious traditions. 從事圖像誌學家工作需要對藝術史和宗教傳統都有深刻的了解。

meaning: 圖像誌；研究視覺圖像和象徵符號的學科；特定主題的圖像體系
sentences: The iconography of the Last Supper has been interpreted in hundreds of different artistic styles. 最後的晚餐的圖像誌已被數百種不同的藝術風格所詮釋。
Mastering the iconography of a culture helps researchers decode the meaning of its art and symbols. 掌握一種文化的圖像誌幫助研究人員解讀其藝術和符號的含義。

meaning: 圖像崇拜者；崇拜宗教圖像或偶像的人
sentences: The iconolater prayed before the painted icon every morning as part of his devotional practice. 圖像崇拜者每天早晨在彩繪聖像前祈禱，作為其虔誠修行的一部分。
Critics of icon veneration accused the iconolater of confusing the image with the divine itself. 反對聖像崇敬的批評者指責圖像崇拜者混淆了圖像與神聖本身。

meaning: 崇拜圖像的；涉及對圖像的宗教崇拜的
sentences: The iconolatrous sect was condemned by reformers who saw image worship as idolatry. 崇拜圖像的教派被視圖像崇拜為偶像崇拜的改革者所譴責。
Iconolatrous practices were deeply embedded in the culture of medieval Eastern Christianity. 崇拜圖像的習俗深深植根於中世紀東方基督教文化中。

meaning: 圖像崇拜；對宗教圖像的崇拜（有時帶有貶義）
sentences: Protestant reformers condemned iconolatry as a form of idolatry incompatible with true faith. 新教改革者譴責圖像崇拜為與真正信仰不相容的偶像崇拜形式。
Defenders of iconolatry argued that venerating an image is not the same as worshipping a false god. 圖像崇拜的捍衛者認為崇敬圖像並不等同於崇拜假神。

meaning: 圖像學的；與研究藝術作品中象徵和意義相關的
sentences: The iconological interpretation of the painting revealed its political as well as religious message. 這幅畫的圖像學解讀揭示了其政治和宗教信息。
Iconological analysis goes beyond surface description to uncover the deeper meaning of images. 圖像學分析超越表面描述，揭示圖像更深層的含義。

meaning: 圖像學家；研究藝術作品中象徵和意義的學者
sentences: The iconologist traced the origin of the lotus symbol from ancient Egypt to Renaissance Europe. 圖像學家追蹤了蓮花象徵從古埃及到文藝復興歐洲的起源。
As an iconologist, she published groundbreaking studies on the symbolic language of medieval manuscripts. 作為一位圖像學家，她發表了關於中世紀手稿象徵語言的開創性研究。

meaning: 圖像學；研究藝術作品中象徵、主題和意義的學科
sentences: Iconology distinguishes itself from iconography by seeking to interpret the deeper cultural meaning of images. 圖像學通過尋求解讀圖像更深層的文化意義，將自身與圖像誌區別開來。
The scholar Erwin Panofsky greatly advanced the field of iconology in the twentieth century. 學者厄文·潘諾夫斯基在二十世紀大大推進了圖像學領域的發展。

meaning: 反對圖像崇拜的；與反對宗教圖像使用相關的
sentences: The iconomachal movement sought to purify the church by removing all painted and carved images. 反圖像運動試圖通過移除所有繪畫和雕刻圖像來淨化教會。
Iconomachal arguments resurfaced during the Protestant Reformation centuries after the Byzantine controversy. 在拜占庭爭論幾個世紀後，反圖像論點在新教改革期間重新浮現。

meaning: 反圖像崇拜者；反對在宗教崇拜中使用圖像的人
sentences: The iconomachist called for the removal of all saints' images from the walls of the church. 反圖像崇拜者呼籲從教堂牆壁上移除所有聖人圖像。
As an iconomachist, he wrote pamphlets arguing that images distracted worshippers from true devotion. 作為一位反圖像崇拜者，他撰寫小冊子，認為圖像使信徒分心，無法真正虔誠。

meaning: 反圖像崇拜運動；宗教上反對使用和崇拜圖像的鬥爭
sentences: The Byzantine iconomachy lasted for over a century and deeply divided the Christian church. 拜占庭反圖像運動持續了一個多世紀，深刻分裂了基督教會。
Iconomachy challenged not just art practices but the very nature of how humans relate to the divine. 反圖像運動不僅挑戰了藝術實踐，還挑戰了人類與神聖關係的本質。

meaning: 圖像狂熱；對收藏或崇拜圖像的過度迷戀
sentences: His iconomania led him to fill every room of his house with paintings and devotional images. 他的圖像狂熱使他用畫作和虔誠圖像填滿了家中的每個房間。
Art historians have studied iconomania as both a religious and psychological phenomenon. 藝術史學家將圖像狂熱作為宗教和心理現象來研究。

meaning: 圖像文字的；以圖像表示聲音或詞語的（介於象形與表音之間）
sentences: Iconomatic writing systems use pictures to represent sounds rather than ideas directly. 圖像文字書寫系統使用圖片表示聲音而非直接表示概念。
Scholars identify iconomatic elements in the early stages of many ancient writing systems. 學者在許多古代書寫系統的早期階段識別出圖像文字元素。

meaning: 以圖像文字方式；以圖像表示聲音的方式
sentences: The ancient scribes wrote iconomatically, using bird images to represent the sound associated with the bird's name. 古代抄寫員以圖像文字方式書寫，使用鳥類圖像表示與鳥名相關的聲音。
The inscription was constructed iconomatically, blending pictorial and phonetic elements. 這段銘文以圖像文字方式構建，融合了圖像和語音元素。

meaning: 圖像文字主義；以圖像表示語音的書寫原則
sentences: Iconomaticism played an important role in the transition from purely pictographic to phonetic writing. 圖像文字主義在從純象形文字到語音文字的轉變中發揮了重要作用。
The study of iconomaticism helps linguists understand how ancient peoples developed complex writing systems. 圖像文字主義的研究幫助語言學家了解古代人民如何發展複雜的書寫系統。

meaning: 圖像命名描述；用圖像書寫或記錄名稱的方法
sentences: Iconomatography was used in ancient cultures to record proper names that could not be spelled phonetically. 圖像命名描述在古代文化中用於記錄無法用語音拼寫的專有名詞。
The Egyptians employed iconomatography extensively when writing foreign royal names in hieroglyphics. 埃及人在用象形文字書寫外國皇室名稱時廣泛使用圖像命名描述。

meaning: 圖像測量儀；測量圖像大小或估計距離的光學儀器
sentences: The photographer used an iconometer to calculate the correct distance for the portrait shot. 攝影師使用圖像測量儀計算人像拍攝的正確距離。
An iconometer was a practical tool for early photographers working without modern focusing systems. 圖像測量儀是早期攝影師在沒有現代對焦系統時使用的實用工具。

meaning: 圖像測量的；與使用圖像測量儀相關的
sentences: The iconometric method allowed photographers to calculate the size of their subject without guesswork. 圖像測量方法使攝影師能夠在不猜測的情況下計算被拍攝主體的大小。
Iconometric devices were important accessories in professional photography studios of the 19th century. 圖像測量裝置是十九世紀專業攝影工作室的重要配件。

meaning: 圖像測量的（iconometric 的較長形式）
sentences: The iconometrical approach to composition helped early photographers frame their subjects precisely. 圖像測量的構圖方法幫助早期攝影師精確地為被拍攝主體取景。
Iconometrical calculations were essential before automatic focusing technology became available. 在自動對焦技術出現之前，圖像測量計算至關重要。

meaning: 以圖像測量方式；通過圖像測量
sentences: The portrait was composed iconometrically to ensure correct proportions of the subject. 這幅肖像以圖像測量方式構圖，以確保被拍攝主體的正確比例。
The photographer verified the focal length iconometrically before taking the group photograph. 攝影師在拍攝集體照之前以圖像測量方式驗證了焦距。

meaning: 圖像測量學；通過圖像測量距離或大小的技術
sentences: Iconometry was an important practical skill for portrait photographers in the pre-digital era. 圖像測量學在數位時代之前是人像攝影師的重要實用技能。
The principles of iconometry are still taught in photography history courses as part of optics education. 圖像測量學的原理仍然在攝影歷史課程中作為光學教育的一部分講授。

meaning: 圖像愛好者；對宗教圖像或藝術圖像有特別熱愛的人
sentences: As an iconophile, he traveled across Greece to photograph and study Orthodox icons. 作為一位圖像愛好者，他走遍希臘拍攝和研究東正教聖像。
The iconophile's collection of medieval religious images was donated to the national museum. 這位圖像愛好者的中世紀宗教圖像收藏被捐贈給了國家博物館。

meaning: 圖像愛好主義；對宗教或藝術圖像的熱愛和支持
sentences: Iconophilism emerged as a theological position defending the use of sacred images in worship. 圖像愛好主義作為一種神學立場，捍衛在崇拜中使用神聖圖像的做法。
The spread of iconophilism helped preserve centuries of religious art during periods of persecution. 圖像愛好主義的傳播幫助在迫害時期保存了數百年的宗教藝術。

meaning: 圖像愛好者；支持並熱愛宗教或藝術圖像的人
sentences: The iconophilist argued passionately that religious images could inspire and deepen faith. 圖像愛好者熱情地認為宗教圖像可以激發並深化信仰。
As an iconophilist, she wrote extensively about the spiritual power of Eastern Christian icons. 作為一位圖像愛好者，她廣泛撰寫了關於東方基督教聖像精神力量的文章。

meaning: 圖像愛好；對宗教或藝術圖像的熱愛和支持
sentences: Iconophily flourished in the Byzantine Empire during periods when iconoclasm was suppressed. 圖像愛好在偶像破壞運動被壓制的時期在拜占庭帝國蓬勃發展。
Her iconophily led her to restore and preserve hundreds of ancient painted religious panels. 她的圖像愛好使她修復和保存了數百件古代彩繪宗教畫板。

meaning: 圖像製作者；製作宗教圖像或聖像的人
sentences: The iconoplast prepared the wooden panel with layers of gesso before beginning to paint the icon. 圖像製作者在開始繪製聖像之前，用多層石膏粉處理木板。
Skilled iconoplasts followed centuries-old traditions of composition, color, and symbolism. 技藝精湛的圖像製作者遵循了數百年的構圖、色彩和象徵主義傳統。

meaning: 光電攝像管；早期電視攝像機使用的電子圖像採集裝置
sentences: Vladimir Zworykin invented the iconoscope, which became a key component of early television cameras. 弗拉基米爾·茲沃里金發明了光電攝像管，這成為早期電視攝像機的關鍵組成部分。
The iconoscope converted light into electrical signals, making live television broadcasting possible. 光電攝像管將光轉換為電信號，使現場電視廣播成為可能。

meaning: 聖像屏（簡稱）；東正教教堂中分隔聖所和主堂的圖像屏障
sentences: The iconostas in the old church was covered with golden icons depicting saints and biblical scenes. 舊教堂中的聖像屏覆蓋著描繪聖人和聖經場景的金色圖像。
Entering the nave, worshippers faced the iconostas and began their prayers before the icons. 進入中殿，信眾面對聖像屏並在圖像前開始祈禱。

meaning: 聖像屏（希臘文形式）；東正教教堂聖像屏的另一種稱呼
