She illustratively compared the situation to a well-known fable. 她舉例說明地將這種情況與一個著名的寓言進行比較。
The speaker illustratively showed how the policy had failed in practice. 演講者以說明的方式展示了該政策在實踐中如何失敗。

meaning: 畫畫的人（尤其是書籍或雜誌上的插畫）。
sentences: Mary is one of the best illustrators of children's books in the country. 瑪麗是全國最好的兒童讀物插畫家之一。
The term illustrator refers to a person who draws pictures (especially illustrations in books or magazines). 插畫家一詞是指畫圖畫（尤其是書籍或雜誌上的插圖）的人。

meaning: 用於說明的；具有圖解功能的
sentences: The illustratory charts in the report clarified the trends. 報告中的說明性圖表澄清了趨勢。
She included illustratory case studies to support her argument. 她納入了說明性案例研究來支持她的論點。
The illustratress created vibrant images for the children's book. 這位女性插圖畫家為兒童書籍創作了生動的圖像。
She was celebrated as the finest illustratress of her generation. 她被譽為她那一代最出色的女性插圖畫家。

meaning: 著名的；傑出的（法語借詞）
sentences: The illustre scientist received the Nobel Prize for her discoveries. 這位著名的科學家因其發現而獲得諾貝爾獎。
He was an illustre member of the Academy of Sciences. 他是科學院的一位傑出成員。
The illustricity of the ancient city attracted scholars from around the world. 這座古城的著名性吸引了來自世界各地的學者。
The poet gained illustricity only after his death. 這位詩人在死後才獲得著名性。
She came from an illustrious family with generations of scientists. 她來自一個世代都有科學家的著名家族。
His illustrious career spanned five decades. 他輝煌的職業生涯跨越了五個十年。
He served illustriously in the military before entering politics. 他在從政前曾傑出地服役於軍隊。
The architect is illustriously known for designing award-winning buildings. 這位建築師因設計獲獎建築而享有盛譽。
The illustriousness of the institution attracted top talent from around the world. 這所機構的聲譽吸引了來自世界各地的頂尖人才。
Few could match the illustriousness of her contributions to medicine. 很少有人能比得上她對醫學的卓越貢獻。
Ancient Romans would illutate themselves in mud baths for health benefits. 古羅馬人會以泥浴方式進行治療以獲取健康益處。
The therapist advised the patient to illutate in medicinal mud. 治療師建議患者用藥用泥漿進行泥浴治療。
Illutation was a common remedy in ancient medicinal practices. 泥浴療法在古代醫療實踐中是一種常見的療法。
The spa offered illutation as part of its wellness program. 這個水療中心將泥浴療法作為其健康計畫的一部分。

meaning: 淋溶堆積的；與土壤淋溶堆積層有關的
sentences: The illuvial layer of the soil is rich in minerals washed down from above. 土壤的淋溶堆積層富含從上方沖刷下來的礦物質。
Geologists study illuvial deposits to understand soil formation processes. 地質學家研究淋溶堆積物以了解土壤形成過程。

meaning: （土壤）發生淋溶堆積；以淋溶作用積累
sentences: Minerals tend to illuviate into the lower soil layers over time. 礦物質隨時間傾向於淋溶堆積到較低的土壤層。
Clay particles illuviate downward when rainfall is abundant. 當降雨充足時，黏土顆粒向下淋溶堆積。

meaning: 淋溶堆積作用（礦物質從上層土壤移至下層的過程）
sentences: Illuviation is responsible for the formation of hardpan layers in some soils. 淋溶堆積作用是某些土壤中硬盤層形成的原因。
Scientists study illuviation to understand nutrient movement in ecosystems. 科學家研究淋溶堆積作用以了解生態系統中的養分移動。

meaning: 壞地；不好地（副詞，古體字）
sentences: He illy disguised his true intentions from those around him. 他不好地掩飾了他對周圍人的真實意圖。
The treaty was illy conceived from the start. 這項條約從一開始就計劃得不好。

meaning: 伊利里亞的；伊利里亞人（巴爾幹半島古民族）
sentences: The Illyrian tribes once dominated the western Balkans. 伊利里亞部落曾主宰西巴爾幹地區。
Archaeologists discovered Illyrian artifacts near the Adriatic coast. 考古學家在亞得里亞海岸附近發現了伊利里亞文物。

meaning: 伊利里亞語的；伊利里亞文化的
sentences: Illyric inscriptions have been found along the Adriatic coast. 在亞得里亞海岸發現了伊利里亞語銘文。
The Illyric dialects remain poorly understood by modern linguists. 現代語言學家對伊利里亞方言的了解仍然不足。

meaning: 鈦鐵礦（含鈦和鐵的礦物）
sentences: Ilmenite is a major source of titanium for industrial use. 鈦鐵礦是工業用鈦的主要來源。
Black sand beaches often contain significant deposits of ilmenite. 黑沙海灘通常含有大量鈦鐵礦沉積物。

meaning: 鈦鐵礦岩（富含鈦鐵礦的岩石）
sentences: Ilmenitite is a rock composed primarily of ilmenite crystals. 鈦鐵礦岩是主要由鈦鐵礦晶體組成的岩石。
Geologists identified ilmenitite deposits in the region's volcanic rock. 地質學家在該地區的火山岩中發現了鈦鐵礦岩沉積物。

meaning: 鈦鐵金紅石（含鈮的金紅石礦物）
sentences: Ilmenorutile is a rare niobium-bearing mineral related to rutile. 鈦鐵金紅石是一種罕見的含鈮礦物，與金紅石相關。
Mining companies seek ilmenorutile for its niobium content. 採礦公司因其鈮含量而尋找鈦鐵金紅石。

meaning: 伊洛卡諾人或其語言（菲律賓北部民族）
sentences: Ilocano is one of the major languages spoken in the northern Philippines. 伊洛卡諾語是菲律賓北部主要語言之一。
She grew up speaking Ilocano at home and Filipino at school. 她在家裡說伊洛卡諾語，在學校說菲律賓語。

meaning: 伊洛卡諾（Ilocano 的另一拼法）
sentences: Ilokano speakers can be found in many parts of the world. 伊洛卡諾語使用者分布在世界各地。
The Ilokano community has a rich oral storytelling tradition. 伊洛卡諾社區有豐富的口頭說故事傳統。

meaning: 伊洛科（伊洛卡諾語的另一名稱）
sentences: Iloko is spoken by millions of Filipinos, especially in the north. 伊洛科語被數百萬菲律賓人使用，尤其是在北部。
There are many poems and songs written in Iloko. 有許多詩歌和歌曲是用伊洛科語寫成的。

meaning: 伊龍戈特人（菲律賓呂宋島的原住民族）
sentences: The Ilongot are known for their headhunting traditions, which ended in the 20th century. 伊龍戈特人以獵頭傳統聞名，這一傳統在20世紀結束。
Anthropologist Renato Rosaldo studied the grief rituals of the Ilongot. 人類學家雷納托·羅薩爾多研究了伊龍戈特人的哀悼儀式。

meaning: 孤立群體；飛地（法語借詞，指孤立的語言或文化群體）
sentences: The village was a cultural ilot surrounded by a different ethnic majority. 這個村莊是一個被不同族裔多數包圍的文化飛地。
Linguists studied the ilot of speakers who preserved the ancient dialect. 語言學家研究了保存古代方言的孤立說話者群體。

meaning: 伊爾皮拉（澳洲原住民族群）
sentences: The Ilpirra are an Aboriginal group from central Australia. 伊爾皮拉人是來自澳洲中部的原住民群體。
Ilpirra traditions include distinctive ceremonial practices. 伊爾皮拉的傳統包括獨特的儀式習俗。

meaning: 伊爾瓦石（一種含鐵矽酸鹽礦物）
sentences: Ilvaite is a black iron silicate mineral first identified on the island of Elba. 伊爾瓦石是一種黑色鐵矽酸鹽礦物，最初在厄爾巴島被發現。
Collectors prize ilvaite for its lustrous black crystals. 收藏家珍視伊爾瓦石，因為它有光澤的黑色晶體。

meaning: 伊利亞（男性名，俄語形式的 Elijah）
sentences: Ilya is a common Russian first name with biblical origins. 伊利亞是一個有聖經淵源的常見俄語名字。
The novel's protagonist, Ilya, faces a series of moral dilemmas. 小說主角伊利亞面臨一系列道德困境。

meaning: 伊利桑瑟斯屬（玄參科植物屬）
sentences: Ilysanthes is a genus of wetland plants in the family Plantaginaceae. 伊利桑瑟斯屬是車前科的一種濕地植物屬。
Botanists reclassified several Ilysanthes species in the 20th century. 植物學家在20世紀重新分類了幾個伊利桑瑟斯屬物種。

meaning: 砂蟒屬（無毒蛇屬，分布於東南亞）
sentences: Ilysia is a genus of small burrowing snakes native to Southeast Asia. 伊利西亞屬是原產於東南亞的一種小型穴居蛇屬。
The Ilysia snake is harmless and rarely seen due to its secretive nature. 伊利西亞蛇是無害的，由於其隱秘的天性，很少被看到。
Ilysiidae is a small family of primitive burrowing snakes. 砂蟒科是一個小型原始穴居蛇科。
Herpetologists study Ilysiidae to understand the evolution of snakes. 爬蟲學家研究砂蟒科以了解蛇的進化。

meaning: 類砂蟒的；與砂蟒科相似的
sentences: The ilysioid body plan is adapted for burrowing through soil. 類砂蟒的身體結構適合在土壤中穿掘。
Ilysioid snakes share several anatomical features with their ancient ancestors. 類砂蟒的蛇與其古老的祖先共享幾個解剖學特徵。
Ima is a name used in several cultures, often meaning 'now' in Japanese. 伊瑪是一個在多種文化中使用的名字，在日語中通常意思是「現在」。
Ima Hogg was a famous Texas philanthropist and arts patron. 伊瑪·霍格是一位著名的德州慈善家和藝術贊助人。
The company is working hard to improve its brand image. 公司正努力提升其品牌形象。
The mirrors reflect a clear image of the beautiful scenery. 鏡子反射出美麗風景的清晰影像。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "image sensor" for next week. 老師要我們把「image sensor」背起來，下週要用。
We used "image sensor" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「image sensor」。
The tumor was clearly imageable using the new MRI technology. 使用新型磁共振成像技術，腫瘤可以清晰地成像。
Abstract concepts are not easily imageable in physical form. 抽象概念不容易以實體形式想象出來。
The imageless meditation focuses on pure awareness without visualization. 無形象的冥想專注於純粹的意識，不需要視覺化。
Some mystics describe God as imageless and beyond all representation. 一些神秘主義者將神描述為無形象的，超越所有表述。
The satellite imager captured detailed photos of the storm system. 衛星成像裝置拍攝了風暴系統的詳細照片。
The thermal imager detected heat signatures through the walls. 熱成像裝置通過牆壁探測到熱信號。
The imagerial depictions in the temple were remarkably detailed. 寺廟中的圖像描繪非常詳細。
Imagerial traditions vary greatly among different religious cultures. 圖像傳統在不同宗教文化中差異很大。

meaning: 以圖像方式；以偶像的形式
sentences: The deity was imagerially represented as a lion in ancient carvings. 這位神靈在古代雕刻中以圖像方式被表示為獅子。
The story was imagerially told through a series of murals. 這個故事通過一系列壁畫以圖像方式講述。

meaning: 想像或幻想的作品；錯誤的想法；想像中的幻象。
sentences: The term imagery refers to the work of the imagination or fancy; false ideas; imaginary phantasms. 意像一詞是指想像或幻想的作品；錯誤的想法；想像中的幻象。
The lesson introduced imagery as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了意像作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 可想象性；可構想的能力
sentences: The imaginability of space travel was limited before the 20th century. 在20世紀之前，太空旅行的可想象性是有限的。
The imaginability of a solution can help motivate problem-solving. 解決方案的可想象性有助於激勵問題解決。

meaning: 可以想像；可以想的。在考慮範圍內。
sentences: Something described as imaginable is able to be imagined; conceivable. Within the realm of consideration. 被描述為可想的事物是能夠被想像的；可以想像的。在考慮範圍之內。
The word imaginable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「可想像」這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 可想象性；可構想的性質
sentences: The imaginableness of the scenario made it a powerful teaching tool. 這個場景的可想象性使其成為強大的教學工具。
Writers explore the imaginableness of alternative histories. 作家探索替代歷史的可想象性。
This was the best outcome imaginably possible given the circumstances. 這是在這種情況下可以想象的最佳結果。
He handled the crisis as well as imaginably anyone could. 他對危機的處理，可以想象地，比任何人都好。

meaning: 成蟲的；與成蟲期相關的（昆蟲學）
sentences: The imaginal discs in larvae develop into adult structures during metamorphosis. 幼蟲中的成蟲盤在變態期間發育成成蟲結構。
Imaginal cells carry the genetic blueprint for the adult organism. 成蟲細胞攜帶成蟲組織的遺傳藍圖。

meaning: 有想象力的；善於想象的（古體詞）
sentences: The imaginant child created elaborate stories about mythical creatures. 這個富有想象力的孩子創作了關於神話生物的精心故事。
Writers of fantasy must be deeply imaginant to build believable worlds. 奇幻小說作家必須有豐富的想象力才能建構可信的世界。
He imaginarily placed himself in the shoes of the historical figure. 他在想象中將自己置於這位歷史人物的處境中。
The characters imaginarily traveled to distant galaxies in the story. 故事中的人物在想象中旅行到遙遠的星系。
The imaginariness of the scenario made it difficult to plan for. 這個場景的虛構性使其難以規劃。
Philosophers debate the imaginariness of numbers and abstract concepts. 哲學家討論數字和抽象概念的虛構性。
The little girl has several imaginary friends who she talks to. 那個小女孩有幾個她會與之交談的假想朋友。
The story is set in a beautiful imaginary world full of magic. 這個故事設定在一個充滿魔法的漂亮幻想（假想）世界。
The poet would imaginate entire worlds before setting pen to paper. 詩人在下筆之前會想象整個世界。
Children naturally imaginate stories when they play. 孩子們在玩耍時自然地想象故事。
Reading books is a great way to develop your creative imagination. 讀書是發展創意想像力的一種好方法。
The little girl has a very vivid imagination and tells amazing tales. 那個小女孩想像力非常豐富，會講精彩的故事。

meaning: 想象的；與想象力相關的
sentences: The child's imaginational play helped develop creative thinking skills. 孩子的想象性遊戲有助於培養創造性思維技能。
The imaginational capacity of humans sets them apart from other animals. 人類的想象能力使他們與其他動物不同。

meaning: 想象主義；以想象力為中心的哲學
sentences: Imaginationalism holds that reality is shaped by the mind's constructs. 想象主義認為現實是由心智的構建所塑造的。
The poet embraced imaginationalism as the core of his artistic philosophy. 這位詩人將想象主義作為其藝術哲學的核心。
She has a very imaginative mind and always comes up with ideas. 她非常有創意（富有想像力），總是能想出主意。
The movie has several imaginative scenes that everyone loved now. 這部電影現在有幾個每個人都喜愛的富有想像力的場景。
She imaginatively solved the problem using everyday household items. 她有創造性地用日常家用物品解決了這個問題。
The designer imaginatively repurposed old materials for the installation. 設計師創造性地將舊材料用於裝置藝術。
The imaginativeness of the young artist surprised all who saw her work. 這位年輕藝術家的想象力讓所有看到她作品的人都感到驚訝。
Imaginativeness is a quality that can be cultivated through exposure to diverse ideas. 想象力是一種可以通過接觸多樣化思想來培養的品質。
As an imaginator, she could visualize complex architectural structures in her mind. 作為一個有想象力的人，她能在腦海中構思複雜的建築結構。
Great inventors are often exceptional imaginators. 偉大的發明家往往是傑出的夢想家。
I can't imagine what it would be like to live on the moon. 我無法想像住在月球上會是什麼樣子。
Imagine that you have a million dollars; what would you do? 想像一下你有百萬美元；你會做什麼？
The imaginer of the project had a vision that others could not see. 這個項目的構思者有一個別人看不到的願景。
Every artist begins as an imaginer before becoming a creator. 每位藝術家在成為創作者之前都是一個想象者。

meaning: 想象；構想（imagino 的複數或第三人稱單數）
sentences: She imagines a world where everyone has equal opportunities. 她構想了一個每個人都有平等機會的世界。
He imagines the perfect vacation every time he is stressed. 每次壓力大時，他都會構想完美的假期。

meaning: 意象主義者；想象主義者
sentences: As an imaginist, she painted scenes from dreams rather than real life. 作為意象主義者，她描繪夢中的場景而非現實生活。
The imaginist movement in poetry emphasized vivid sensory imagery. 詩歌中的意象主義運動強調生動的感官意象。
The imaginous writer filled her books with fantastical landscapes. 這位富有想象力的作家在書中填滿了奇幻的風景。
Children are naturally imaginous, weaving stories from thin air. 孩子天生富有想象力，能憑空編織故事。

meaning: 意象派（20世紀初的詩歌運動）
sentences: Imagism was a poetic movement that emphasized clear, precise imagery. 意象派是一種強調清晰、精確意象的詩歌運動。
Ezra Pound was one of the key figures of Imagism in literature. 龐德是文學意象派的核心人物之一。

meaning: 意象派詩人；意象主義者
sentences: H.D. was an important imagist poet of the early 20th century. H.D. 是20世紀初重要的意象派詩人。
The imagist rejected flowery, abstract language in favor of concrete images. 意象主義者拒絕華麗、抽象的語言，偏愛具體的意象。
Her imagistic writing style drew comparisons to the great modernist poets. 她的意象式寫作風格被與偉大的現代主義詩人相提並論。
The imagistic film relied more on visuals than dialogue. 這部圖像式電影更多依賴視覺效果而非對話。

meaning: 成蟲（昆蟲最終成熟階段）；心理意象
sentences: After metamorphosis, the caterpillar becomes an imago — the adult butterfly. 變態後，毛毛蟲變成成蟲——成年蝴蝶。
In Jungian psychology, the imago refers to an unconscious image of a significant person. 在榮格心理學中，意象指的是對重要人物的無意識形象。

meaning: 在清真寺主持禮拜的人。
sentences: The term imam refers to one who leads the salat prayers in a mosque. 伊瑪目一詞指的是清真寺主持禮拜的人。
The lesson introduced imam as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了伊瑪目這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 伊瑪目職位；伊斯蘭教領袖的職責
sentences: The imamah is a central concept in Shia Islam regarding religious leadership. 伊瑪目職位是什葉派伊斯蘭教中關於宗教領導的核心概念。
Scholars debate the nature and authority of the imamah. 學者討論伊瑪目職位的性質和權威。

meaning: 伊瑪目的管轄範圍；伊瑪目的職位
sentences: The imamate of Muscat was a powerful political entity in the Arabian Peninsula. 馬斯喀特的伊瑪目管轄範圍曾是阿拉伯半島上一個強大的政治實體。
The concept of the imamate divides Sunni and Shia Islamic traditions. 伊瑪目職位的概念分隔了遜尼派和什葉派伊斯蘭傳統。

meaning: 伊瑪目殿（什葉派穆斯林的聚會場所）
sentences: The imambarah is a hall used by Shia Muslims for religious gatherings. 伊瑪目殿是什葉派穆斯林用於宗教聚會的大廳。
Lucknow in India is known for its grand imambarah architecture. 印度的勒克瑙以其宏偉的伊瑪目殿建築而聞名。

meaning: 伊瑪目的；與伊瑪目相關的
sentences: The imamic authority in Shia Islam is believed to be divinely ordained. 什葉派伊斯蘭教中的伊瑪目權威被認為是神聖賦予的。
Imamic succession has been a source of religious conflict historically. 伊瑪目的繼承在歷史上一直是宗教衝突的根源。
He assumed the imamship of the mosque after the previous leader retired. 在前任領袖退休後，他承擔了清真寺的伊瑪目職位。
The imamship carries both religious and community responsibilities. 伊瑪目的職位承擔著宗教和社區的雙重責任。

meaning: 垂笑君子蘭屬（舊稱，現多用 Clivia）
sentences: Imantophyllum is the older botanical name for plants now classified as Clivia. 垂笑君子蘭屬是現在被歸類為君子蘭屬植物的較舊植物學名稱。
The vibrant orange flowers of Imantophyllum make it a popular houseplant. 垂笑君子蘭的鮮豔橙色花朵使其成為受歡迎的室內植物。

meaning: 伊馬雷特（鄂圖曼帝國的旅客免費旅舍）
sentences: The imaret provided free food and lodging to travelers and the poor. 伊馬雷特為旅行者和窮人提供免費的食物和住宿。
Sultans often built imarets as acts of charity and piety. 蘇丹們常常建造伊馬雷特作為慈善和虔誠的行為。
The growing imbalances between the rich and poor first lead to more crime. 貧富之間日益嚴重的不平衡首先導致犯罪率上升。
The term imbalance refers to the property of not being in balance. 術語不平衡是指不平衡的性質。
The village elder would imban anyone who violated the sacred laws. 村莊長老會詛咒任何違反神聖法律的人。
In old texts, to imban meant to officially condemn or prohibit. 在古老的文獻中，詛咒意味著正式譴責或禁止。
Soldiers would imband their wounds with cloth in the battlefield. 士兵們在戰場上用布帶束縛傷口。
The musicians decided to imband and perform together. 音樂家們決定組成樂隊一起表演。

meaning: 帶有旗幟的；以旗幟裝飾的
sentences: The imbannered parade marched through the city to celebrate victory. 帶有旗幟的遊行隊伍穿越城市慶祝勝利。
The imbannered hall was decorated for the royal ceremony. 以旗幟裝飾的大廳為皇家典禮而裝點。
The cargo was imbarged at the docks before nightfall. 貨物在夜幕降臨前被裝入駁船。
Workers would imbarge goods for transport along the river. 工人們將貨物裝入駁船以沿河運輸。
The explorers chose to imbark before dawn to catch the tide. 探險者選擇在黎明前登船出發以趕上潮水。
All passengers were asked to imbark promptly. 所有乘客被要求迅速登船。
The farmers would imbarn the harvest before the first frost. 農民們在初霜之前將收穫儲存入穀倉。
It was wise to imbarn enough grain for the winter months. 在冬季之前儲存足夠的穀物是明智的。

meaning: 降低品質的；使卑賤的（古體詞）
sentences: The nobleman felt imbased by the menial tasks assigned to him. 這位貴族感到被分配的卑微任務使他降低了身份。
Medieval texts describe the imbased condition of serfs. 中世紀文獻描述了農奴的卑賤狀態。

meaning: 使私生子化；使墮落（古體詞）
sentences: Critics accused the adaptation of trying to imbastardize the original work. 批評者指責這個改編試圖使原著墮落。
Medieval law would imbastardize children born outside of wedlock. 中世紀法律會使婚外出生的孩子被視為私生子。

meaning: 地中海的海風（伊姆巴特風）
sentences: The imbat is a refreshing sea breeze that cools the Turkish coastal cities. 伊姆巴特風是一種清涼的海風，使土耳其沿海城市變得涼爽。
Sailors welcomed the imbat as it helped propel their ships. 水手們歡迎伊姆巴特風，因為它有助於推動船隻前行。

meaning: 傘樹（南美洲的一種快速生長樹木）
sentences: The imbauba tree grows rapidly in the rainforests of South America. 傘樹在南美洲的雨林中迅速生長。
Sloths are often found resting in the canopy of imbauba trees. 樹懶常常在傘樹的樹冠上休息。

meaning: 白癡；愚笨的人（imbecile 的縮短古體）
sentences: In old texts, the word imbe was used pejoratively to describe someone foolish. 在古老的文獻中，imbe 這個詞被貶義地用來描述愚蠢的人。
The use of imbe as an insult is considered offensive today. 使用 imbe 作為侮辱詞在今天被認為是冒犯性的。

meaning: 低能者；愚蠢的人（現代醫學已棄用此詞）
sentences: Using the word imbecile as a clinical term is no longer acceptable in modern medicine. 在現代醫學中，使用白癡這個詞作為臨床術語已不再被接受。
Historically, imbecile was used to categorize people with intellectual disabilities. 歷史上，白癡被用來分類有智力障礙的人。
He stared imbecilely at the complicated instructions. 他愚蠢地盯著複雜的說明。
She acted imbecilely under pressure, making poor decisions. 她在壓力下行事愚蠢，做出了糟糕的決定。
The plan was criticized as imbecilic by industry experts. 這個計劃被業界專家批評為極愚蠢的。
His imbecilic response to the crisis made matters worse. 他對危機的愚蠢回應使情況更糟。
Chronic stress can imbecilitate a person's ability to think clearly. 長期壓力會損害一個人清晰思考的能力。
The harsh conditions seemed to imbecilitate even the sharpest minds. 嚴酷的環境似乎能使最敏銳的頭腦也變得遲鈍。
The committee was shocked by the imbecility of the proposal. 委員會對這個提案的愚蠢感到震驚。
He regretted the imbecility of his earlier decision. 他為自己早先決定的愚蠢感到遺憾。
The surgeon had to imbed the device beneath the patient's skin. 外科醫生不得不將裝置嵌入病人的皮膚下。
The splinter was deeply imbedded in his finger. 刺深深地嵌入他的手指。

meaning: 不好戰的；愛好和平的（古體詞）
sentences: The imbellious tribe preferred diplomacy over armed conflict. 這個愛好和平的部落更喜歡外交而非武裝衝突。
He was considered imbellious by his warriors, who wanted to fight. 他被那些想要戰鬥的勇士們視為不好戰的。
The imber fell heavily throughout the night, flooding the streets. 大雨整夜猛烈地下著，淹沒了街道。
Poets used the word imber to evoke the power of a heavy downpour. 詩人使用 imber 這個詞來喚起大雨的力量。
Students imbibe knowledge from their teachers over many years. 學生們多年來從老師那裡吸收知識。
She likes to imbibe herbal tea in the morning. 她喜歡在早晨飲用草藥茶。
He was a regular imbiber of fine wines from around the world. 他是一位定期飲用世界各地優質葡萄酒的人。
As an eager imbiber of new ideas, she read voraciously. 作為一個熱衷吸收新思想的人，她廣泛閱讀。
The imbibition of water by seeds triggers germination. 種子對水的吸收引發了發芽。
Imbibition of alcohol in large quantities poses serious health risks. 大量飲用酒精會帶來嚴重的健康風險。
Imbibitional processes are vital for seed germination in plants. 吸水過程對植物種子的發芽至關重要。
The imbibitional properties of the polymer made it useful in absorbent materials. 這種聚合物的吸水特性使其在吸收材料中非常有用。

meaning: 有吸收作用的；與吸收相關的
sentences: The imbibitory capacity of the soil determines how well it retains moisture. 土壤的吸收能力決定了它保持水分的程度。
Imbibitory membranes allow controlled passage of fluids. 具有吸收作用的膜允許液體受控通過。

meaning: 比魯蘇樹（南美洲的一種棕櫚樹）
sentences: The imbirussu palm is found in the wetlands of South America. 比魯蘇棕櫚樹生長在南美洲的濕地中。
Indigenous communities use the imbirussu for building materials and food. 原住民社區使用比魯蘇製作建築材料和食物。

meaning: 使苦澀；使怨恨（embitter 的變體）
sentences: Years of disappointment served to imbitter him against the system. 多年的失望使他對這個體制感到怨恨。
She did not let her hardships imbitter her spirit. 她沒有讓艱辛使她的精神變得苦澀。
The imbitterment he felt after losing the case lasted for years. 他在輸掉案件後感到的怨恨持續了多年。
Imbitterment can cloud judgment and prevent healing. 苦澀感可以模糊判斷力並阻礙痊癒。
The council voted to imbolish the outdated regulations. 委員會投票廢除了過時的法規。
Reformers sought to imbolish the cruel practices of the old regime. 改革者試圖廢除舊制度的殘酷做法。

meaning: 一種非洲木本植物（學名 Parinari curatellifolia）
sentences: The imbondo tree is valued for its edible fruit in southern Africa. 伊邦多樹在南部非洲因其可食用果實而受到重視。
Local communities use imbondo wood for carving and construction. 當地社區使用伊邦多木材進行雕刻和建設。
The saint was renowned for his imbonity toward all who sought his help. 這位聖人以對所有尋求幫助者的善意而聞名。
Imbonity toward strangers was considered a virtue in many ancient cultures. 對陌生人的善意在許多古代文化中被視為美德。
The herald would imbordure the coat of arms with a red border. 紋章師會給紋章加上紅色邊框。
The illuminator chose to imbordure the manuscript page with floral motifs. 手稿彩繪師選擇用花卉圖案給手稿頁面加邊飾。

meaning: 選票放入袋中（古威尼斯選舉方式）
sentences: Imborsation was used in Venice to randomly select officials from a pool of candidates. 選票入袋法在威尼斯被用來從候選人池中隨機選出官員。
The process of imborsation was designed to reduce corruption in elections. 選票入袋法的過程旨在減少選舉中的腐敗。
She would imbosom her child during cold winter nights. 她在寒冷的冬夜將孩子摟入懷中。
He would imbosom the memory of their meeting for years to come. 他將把他們相遇的記憶珍藏心中多年。
The gardener decided to imbower the seating area with climbing vines. 園丁決定用攀緣植物遮蔽座位區。
The secluded path was imbowered by tall trees on both sides. 這條僻靜的小路兩側被高大的樹木遮蔽。

meaning: 吸入；以呼吸注入（古體詞）
sentences: The poet wrote of imbreathing the spirit of the mountains. 詩人寫道，以呼吸吸入山脈的靈魂。
She would imbreathe deeply of the sea air on her morning walks. 她在早晨散步時會深深地吸入海洋空氣。

meaning: 記入文件；簡短記錄（法律古體詞）
sentences: The notary was required to imbreviate all agreements made before witnesses. 公證人被要求將所有在證人面前達成的協議記入文件。
Scribes would imbreviate the terms of trade contracts in medieval Italy. 文書員會在中世紀義大利簡短記錄貿易合約的條款。

meaning: 凹形瓦；蓋瓦（古羅馬建築用瓦）
sentences: The imbrex was a curved roof tile used in ancient Roman architecture. 凹形瓦是古羅馬建築中使用的弧形屋瓦。
Archaeologists found dozens of imbrex fragments at the excavation site. 考古學家在挖掘現場發現了數十個凹形瓦碎片。

meaning: 疊覆的；鱗狀排列的；使疊覆
sentences: The fish's imbricate scales provide both protection and flexibility. 魚的鱗狀排列鱗片同時提供保護和靈活性。
The architect designed an imbricate pattern for the building's facade. 建築師為建築物的外立面設計了一種疊覆圖案。

meaning: 疊覆排列的；像瓦片般重疊的
sentences: The imbricated tiles on the roof create a beautiful pattern. 屋頂上疊覆排列的瓦片創造了美麗的圖案。
The imbricated leaves of the plant overlap like fish scales. 植物的疊覆葉片像魚鱗一樣重疊。
The petals were imbricately arranged to protect the flower's center. 花瓣以疊覆的方式排列，以保護花的中心。
The tiles were imbricately laid to prevent water from seeping through. 瓦片以鱗狀方式鋪設，防止水滲入。
The imbrication of the scales allows the snake to move smoothly. 鱗片的疊覆排列使蛇能夠流暢移動。
The architect studied natural imbrication patterns for the roof design. 建築師研究自然疊覆排列模式用於屋頂設計。

meaning: 疊覆性的；有疊覆作用的
sentences: The imbricative structure of the bird's feathers helps repel water. 鳥類羽毛的疊覆結構有助於防水。
Imbricative design is common in both nature and architecture. 疊覆設計在自然界和建築中都很常見。

meaning: 混亂局面；糾紛；複雜的困境
sentences: The political imbroglio surrounding the election lasted for months. 圍繞選舉的政治混亂局面持續了數月。
The diplomats worked tirelessly to resolve the international imbroglio. 外交官們不辭辛勞地努力解決這一國際糾紛。
The battlefield would imbrue the earth with the blood of fallen soldiers. 戰場將用陣亡士兵的鮮血浸染大地。
He refused to imbrue his hands with corruption. 他拒絕讓自己的雙手染上腐敗。
The imbruement of the river with industrial waste concerned locals. 工業廢料對河流的污染令當地居民感到擔憂。
Historians wrote of the imbruement of the land during ancient wars. 歷史學家描述了古代戰爭期間土地的浸染。
Years of isolation in harsh conditions seemed to imbrute him. 多年在惡劣條件下的孤立似乎使他變得野蠻。
The author warned that neglect of arts and culture can imbrute society. 作者警告，忽視藝術和文化可能使社會獸化。
The imbrutement of the prisoners under the cruel regime was well-documented. 殘酷政權下囚犯的野蠻化有充分的文獻記載。
Critics saw the show's violence as contributing to the imbrutement of society. 批評者認為這節目的暴力內容助長了社會的野蠻化。

meaning: 使充滿；灌輸（思想或感情）
sentences: She tried to imbue her students with a love of literature. 她試圖在學生心中灌輸對文學的熱愛。
The ceremony was imbued with a sense of tradition and solemnity. 這個儀式充滿了傳統感和莊嚴感。
The imbuement of courage in the soldiers was the general's greatest skill. 在士兵心中灌輸勇氣是將軍最大的技能。
The painting's imbuement with sorrow moved all who viewed it. 這幅畫充滿悲傷的特質感動了所有觀看它的人。

meaning: 放入錢袋；支付；償還（古體詞）
sentences: The merchant was asked to imburse the amount owed for the goods. 商人被要求支付所欠貨物的金額。
In old English commerce, to imburse meant to reimburse or pay a sum. 在古代英語商業中，imburse 意味著償還或支付一筆款項。

meaning: 放入錢袋；支付款項（古體詞）
sentences: The imbursement of the debt was arranged through the notary. 債務的支付通過公證人安排。
In medieval trade, imbursement referred to the act of placing coins into a purse. 在中世紀貿易中，imbursement 指的是將硬幣放入錢袋的行為。

meaning: 伊梅爾（地名，喬治亞西部地區名稱）
sentences: Imer is an older name for the region known today as Imereti in Georgia. 伊梅爾是今天喬治亞西部以伊梅列季聞名地區的舊稱。
Historical texts often reference Imer in accounts of Caucasian kingdoms. 歷史文獻中經常在高加索王國的記述中提到伊梅爾。

meaning: 伊梅里納（馬達加斯加中央高原歷史王國）
sentences: Imerina was the powerful highland kingdom of the Merina people in Madagascar. 伊梅里納是馬達加斯加梅里納人的強大高原王國。
The capital Antananarivo lies in the heart of historic Imerina. 首都塔那那利佛位於歷史上的伊梅里納中心。

meaning: 伊梅列季的；伊梅列季人（喬治亞西部地區）
sentences: The Imeritian wine tradition dates back thousands of years. 伊梅列季的葡萄酒傳統可追溯數千年。
Imeritian cuisine features distinctive flavors of the Caucasus region. 伊梅列季的料理具有高加索地區獨特的風味。

meaning: 一種太平洋島嶼的水下陷阱捕魚法
sentences: Imi is a traditional Polynesian method of trapping fish using underwater enclosures. 伊米是一種傳統的玻里尼西亞捕魚方法，使用水下圍欄捕魚。
The imi technique has been practiced for generations in Pacific island communities. 伊米技術在太平洋島嶼社區已被實踐了幾代人。

meaning: 咪唑（一種有機化合物，重要的雜環結構）
sentences: Imidazole is a key component of the amino acid histidine. 咪唑是胺基酸組胺酸的關鍵成分。
Many pharmaceuticals contain an imidazole ring in their structure. 許多藥物的結構中含有咪唑環。

meaning: 咪唑基（咪唑的衍生基團）
sentences: The imidazolyl group is responsible for many of histidine's biological functions. 咪唑基負責組胺酸的許多生物功能。
Chemists synthesized new compounds with an imidazolyl substituent. 化學家合成了含有咪唑基取代基的新化合物。

meaning: 亞醯胺（含有C(=O)NH(=O)C基的有機化合物）
sentences: Imide compounds are used in the synthesis of heat-resistant polymers. 亞醯胺化合物被用於合成耐熱聚合物。
The chemical formula of an imide contains two carbonyl groups bonded to nitrogen. 亞醯胺的化學式包含兩個與氮鍵合的羰基。

meaning: 亞醯胺的；與亞醯胺相關的
sentences: Imidic acid is an intermediate in the synthesis of many nitrogen-containing compounds. 亞醯胺酸是許多含氮化合物合成的中間體。
The imidic structure contributes to the compound's stability at high temperatures. 亞醯胺結構有助於化合物在高溫下的穩定性。

meaning: 亞醯基（化學自由基 NH）
sentences: Imidogen is a reactive intermediate in nitrogen chemistry. 亞醯基是氮化學中的活性中間體。
Researchers observed imidogen formation during the combustion of nitrogenous compounds. 研究人員在含氮化合物燃燒過程中觀察到亞醯基的形成。
Iminazole was the earlier name for what is now known as imidazole. 咪唑的舊稱是 iminazole，現在已通稱 imidazole。
The iminazole ring structure appears in many biological molecules. 咪唑環結構出現在許多生物分子中。

meaning: 亞胺（含有碳氮雙鍵的有機化合物）
sentences: Imines are formed by the condensation of aldehydes with primary amines. 亞胺由醛與伯胺縮合而成。
The imine bond is important in biological systems, including enzyme reactions. 亞胺鍵在生物系統中很重要，包括酶反應。

meaning: 亞胺基（含有=NH基的化學基團）
sentences: Imino groups play an important role in protein structure. 亞胺基在蛋白質結構中扮演重要角色。
The imino tautomer of cytosine is involved in DNA mutation mechanisms. 胞嘧啶的亞胺互變異構體參與DNA突變機制。

meaning: 亞胺醇（含有亞胺基和羥基的化合物）
sentences: Iminohydrin compounds are intermediates in various organic synthesis pathways. 亞胺醇化合物是各種有機合成途徑中的中間體。
The stability of iminohydrin depends on the surrounding molecular structure. 亞胺醇的穩定性取決於周圍的分子結構。
The imitability of the artist's style made her works easy to forge. 藝術家風格的可模仿性使她的作品容易被偽造。
High imitability of successful business models leads to market competition. 成功商業模式的高可仿效性導致市場競爭。
Her leadership style was highly imitable and widely copied. 她的領導風格高度可模仿，被廣泛效仿。
The technique is easily imitable once the basic principles are understood. 一旦理解了基本原則，這種技術很容易模仿。

meaning: 可模仿性；可仿效的性質
sentences: The imitableness of the design was seen as a flaw by the inventors. 設計的可模仿性被發明者視為一個缺陷。
The imitableness of the style contributed to its widespread adoption. 風格的可仿效性促進了其廣泛採用。

meaning: 模仿傾向；仿效的傾向（罕見詞）
sentences: Children show a strong imitancy toward adult behaviors. 孩子對成人行為表現出強烈的模仿傾向。
The imitancy of fashion trends drives rapid change in the industry. 時尚趨勢的仿效傾向推動了行業的快速變化。
As an imitant, he could mimic any accent perfectly. 作為一個模仿者，他能完美地模仿任何口音。
The imitant behavior of young animals helps them learn survival skills. 幼小動物的模仿行為幫助它們學習生存技能。
The little boy likes to imitate his father's walk and speech. 那個小男孩喜歡模仿（模擬）他父親的走路與說話方式。
The new software is designed to imitate human brain functions. 這款新軟體旨在模擬人類大腦功能。

meaning: 被模仿者；被效仿的對象
sentences: The famous artist was the imitatee of countless art students. 這位著名藝術家是無數藝術學生效仿的對象。
When the imitatee changes their style, their followers quickly adapt. 當被模仿者改變風格時，他們的追隨者很快就適應了。
Trust and communication are the foundations, not just imitation. 信任與溝通是基礎，而不僅僅是模仿。
The store sells high-quality imitations of famous designer bags. 這家店銷售知名品牌手提包的高品質仿製品（模仿）。
Young children engage in imitational play as part of their development. 幼兒進行模仿性遊戲作為其發展的一部分。
The imitational style of the painting was immediately apparent to experts. 這幅畫的模仿風格對專家們來說是立即顯而易見的。

meaning: 模仿主義者；提倡藝術模仿的人
sentences: The imitationist believed that great art must replicate nature faithfully. 模仿主義者認為偉大的藝術必須忠實地複製自然。
As an imitationist, she spent years copying the masters before developing her own style. 作為模仿主義者，她花了多年時間臨摹大師作品，然後才發展出自己的風格。
Children's imitative behavior helps them learn language and social norms. 孩子的模仿行為幫助他們學習語言和社交規範。
The imitative style of the composition lacked original creativity. 這首作品的模仿風格缺乏原創性。
She imitatively copied the master's brushstrokes to learn the technique. 她以模仿的方式複製了大師的筆觸來學習這種技術。
The parrot imitatively repeated every phrase it heard. 鸚鵡以模仿的方式重複它聽到的每一個短語。
The imitativeness of young children is a key part of their cognitive development. 幼兒的模仿性是其認知發展的關鍵部分。
An excessive imitativeness can inhibit the development of original thought. 過度的模仿性可能會阻礙原創思維的發展。
Every successful innovator attracts a crowd of imitators. 每位成功的創新者都會吸引一群模仿者。
The imitator performed a flawless impression of the celebrity. 這位模仿者對名人進行了完美的模仿表演。
His imitatorship of famous politicians earned him a following on social media. 他對著名政治人物的模仿使他在社交媒體上獲得了追隨者。
The imitatorship tradition in comedy has produced many famous performers. 喜劇中的模仿者傳統培養了許多著名表演者。
As an imitatress, she specialized in mimicking famous female politicians. 作為一名女性模仿者，她專門模仿著名的女性政治人物。
The imitatress won the talent show with her hilarious impressions. 這位女性模仿者以她搞笑的模仿贏得了才藝比賽。

meaning: 女性模仿者（拉丁語形式）
sentences: The imitatrix performed for the royal court with great skill. 這位女性模仿者以高超的技巧為皇室表演。
In ancient Rome, an imitatrix might perform comic impersonations. 在古羅馬，女性模仿者可能會進行搞笑的模仿表演。
The immaculacy of the white dress impressed all the wedding guests. 白色禮服的無瑕疵性令所有婚禮賓客印象深刻。
She strived for immaculacy in her academic work. 她在學術工作中努力追求完美無瑕。
The monk prayed for immaculance of thought and spirit. 僧侶為思想和精神的純潔而祈禱。
The child's immaculance of character was admired by all who knew her. 這個孩子性格的純潔受到所有認識她的人的欽佩。

meaning: 無瑕疵或污點；絕對乾淨整潔。
sentences: Something described as immaculate is having no blemish or stain; absolutely clean and tidy. 完美無瑕的事物是指沒有任何瑕疵或污點；絕對乾淨整潔。
The word immaculate is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 完美一詞通常用來形容人、事物或情況。
He was always immaculately dressed for business meetings. 他在商務會議上總是穿著整潔無瑕。
The house was immaculately clean for the inspection. 房子在檢查時整潔得無可挑剔。

meaning: 無瑕疵；潔白無瑕的狀態
sentences: The immaculateness of the surgery exceeded all expectations. 手術的完美無瑕超越了所有預期。
Guests marveled at the immaculateness of the hotel room. 客人對酒店房間的無可挑剔的整潔感到驚嘆。

meaning: 不可錘打成形的；不可延展的
sentences: The immalleable material could not be shaped by conventional metalworking. 這種不可延展的材料無法通過傳統金屬加工成形。
Some attitudes are immalleable and resistant to change. 某些態度是不可改變的，抗拒改變。
The guards would immanacle the prisoners before transport. 守衛在運送前會給囚犯戴上手銬。
In the story, the villain tried to immanacle the hero with magical chains. 在故事中，反派試圖用魔法鎖鏈束縛英雄。

meaning: 從內部流出；內在湧現（神學術語）
sentences: The theologian described divine grace as an immanation from God's essence. 神學家將神聖恩典描述為從神的本質內在湧現。
Immanation differs from emanation in that it flows from within rather than from beyond. 內在湧現與放射不同，因為它從內部而非外部流出。

meaning: 巨大的；殘忍的；極度邪惡的（古體詞）
sentences: The immane cruelty of the tyrant was recorded by horrified historians. 暴君的極度殘忍被驚恐的歷史學家記錄下來。
The medieval knight faced an immane beast in the forest. 這位中世紀騎士在森林中面對了一頭巨大的怪獸。
The soldiers behaved immanely during the siege. 士兵們在圍城期間表現得極度殘忍。
The invaders immanely destroyed everything in their path. 侵略者殘忍地摧毀了他們路上的一切。

meaning: 內在性；（神）內在於世界中（哲學/神學術語）
sentences: The immanence of God refers to the divine presence within creation. 神的內在性指的是神在創造物中的存在。
Spinoza's philosophy emphasizes the immanence of God in nature. 斯賓諾莎的哲學強調神在自然中的內在性。

meaning: 內在性；固有性（immanence 的變體）
sentences: The concept of immanency suggests that divine power operates from within. 內在性的概念表明神聖力量從內部運作。
Philosophers debate the immanency of consciousness in the material world. 哲學家討論意識在物質世界中的內在性。
The immaneness of the destruction shocked all who witnessed it. 破壞的巨大性震驚了所有目睹者。
Chronicles of the war noted the immaneness of the violence. 戰爭編年史記錄了暴力的殘忍性。

meaning: 內在的；固有的；遍及萬物的（哲學/神學）
sentences: Many religions describe God as immanent, present within all creation. 許多宗教將神描述為內在的，存在於所有創造物中。
The immanent logic of history was a central idea in Hegel's philosophy. 歷史的內在邏輯是黑格爾哲學中的核心思想。

meaning: 內在論的；與內在性哲學相關的
sentences: The immanental worldview sees divinity as woven into the fabric of existence. 內在論的世界觀將神性視為編織在存在結構中的。
Immanental philosophy contrasts with transcendentalist views of reality. 內在論哲學與超驗主義對現實的看法形成對比。

meaning: 內在論（哲學立場，認為神或精神存在於自然之內）
sentences: Immanentism holds that the divine is not separate from but within the universe. 內在論認為神聖不是與宇宙分離的，而是在宇宙內部的。
Critics of immanentism argue it blurs the line between creator and creation. 內在論的批評者認為它模糊了創造者和創造物之間的界限。

meaning: 內在論者；持內在論觀點的人
sentences: As an immanentist, she believed nature itself was the ultimate reality. 作為內在論者，她相信自然本身就是最終的現實。
The immanentist rejected the idea of a God separate from the world. 內在論者拒絕了一個與世界分離的神的概念。
God is immanently present in all living things according to pantheism. 根據泛神論，神在所有生命體中以內在的方式存在。
The capacity for empathy is immanently human. 移情能力是人類固有的。

meaning: 兇猛者（古羅馬術語，指被認為野蠻或殘忍的民族）
sentences: Roman writers called certain barbarian tribes Immanes for their ferocity. 羅馬作家因某些蠻族的兇猛而稱之為 Immanes。
The Immanes were feared along the northern frontiers of the empire. 帝國北部邊境的人們對 Immanes 感到恐懼。

meaning: 不明顯的；隱藏的；未顯現的
sentences: The immanifest potential of the student surprised her teachers. 這位學生未顯現的潛力讓她的老師感到驚訝。
Some philosophical schools hold that true reality is immanifest to the senses. 一些哲學流派認為，真正的現實對感官來說是不明顯的。
The immanifestness of the hidden talent amazed the talent scout. 隱藏才能的不明顯性令星探感到驚訝。
The immanifestness of the risk was precisely what made it dangerous. 風險的隱藏性正是使其危險的原因。
The immanity of the war crimes shocked the international community. 戰爭罪行的殘忍性震驚了國際社會。
Chronicles recorded the immanity of the natural disaster. 編年史記錄了自然災害的巨大性。
The knight would immantle himself in armor before battle. 騎士在戰鬥前會把自己包裹在盔甲中。
Fog began to immantle the mountains as dusk fell. 黃昏降臨時，霧氣開始覆蓋山脈。

meaning: 以馬內利（希伯來名，意為「神與我們同在」）
sentences: Immanuel is a name of Hebrew origin meaning 'God is with us'. 以馬內利是希伯來語名字，意思是「神與我們同在」。
In Christianity, Immanuel is one of the names given to Jesus Christ. 在基督教中，以馬內利是耶穌基督的名字之一。

meaning: 使成大理石般堅硬；冷凍
sentences: The sculptor worked to immarble the clay into a durable statue. 雕塑家努力將黏土變成耐久的雕像。
Grief seemed to immarble her face into an expressionless mask. 悲傷似乎讓她的臉變成了沒有表情的面具。

meaning: 不凋謝的；永不消逝的（詩意用法）
sentences: The immarcescible glory of true virtue outlasts all earthly achievements. 真正美德的不凋謝的光榮超越了所有塵世成就。
Poets wrote of immarcescible love that endures through eternity. 詩人們描寫了能夠超越永恆的不凋謝的愛。
Her legacy lives on immarcescibly in the hearts of her students. 她的遺產永不凋謝地活在學生的心中。
The monument stands immarcescibly as a symbol of national pride. 這座紀念碑永不凋謝地作為民族自豪感的象徵而矗立。

meaning: 不凋謝性；永久性（罕見詞）
sentences: The immarcibleness of true friendship is its greatest virtue. 真正友誼的不凋謝性是其最大的美德。
Theologians spoke of the immarcibleness of spiritual reward. 神學家談到精神獎賞的永久性。

meaning: 無邊緣的；沒有明顯邊界的（生物學）
sentences: The immarginate leaf of the plant lacked a distinct border. 這株植物的無邊緣葉片沒有明顯的邊界。
Biologists described the specimen as immarginate in their classification notes. 生物學家在分類筆記中將該標本描述為無邊緣的。
The clouds began to immask the mountain peaks. 雲朵開始遮蔽山峰。
She used humor to immask her true feelings of sadness. 她用幽默掩蓋了她真實的悲傷感受。

meaning: 無法匹敵的；無與倫比的（罕見詞）
sentences: Her immatchable skill at chess won her every tournament. 她無法匹敵的國際象棋技巧讓她贏得了每場比賽。
The immatchable beauty of the Northern Lights left all visitors speechless. 北極光無與倫比的美麗讓所有訪客沉默不語。

meaning: 沒有物質或物質；無形的。
sentences: Some believe that because ghosts are immaterial, they can pass through walls. 有些人認為，由於鬼魂是無形的，因此它們可以穿過牆壁。
The report describes the result as immaterial. 報告稱這項結果無關緊要。

meaning: 非物質主義；唯心論（認為物質世界不存在的哲學）
sentences: George Berkeley's immaterialism holds that only minds and ideas truly exist. 喬治·柏克萊的非物質主義認為只有心智和思想才真正存在。
Immaterialism challenges the materialist assumption that physical objects are real. 非物質主義挑戰了物質論關於物理對象是真實的假設。

meaning: 非物質主義者；唯心論者
sentences: As an immaterialist, Berkeley argued that matter has no independent existence. 作為非物質主義者，柏克萊認為物質沒有獨立的存在。
The immaterialist philosopher claimed reality is mind-dependent. 這位非物質主義哲學家聲稱現實依賴於心智。
The immateriality of the soul is a central claim in many religions. 靈魂的非物質性是許多宗教的核心主張。
Philosophers debate the immateriality of consciousness and mental states. 哲學家討論意識和心理狀態的非物質性。

meaning: 使非物質化；去除物質性
sentences: The artist sought to immaterialize her sculpture by making it transparent. 藝術家試圖通過使雕塑透明來去除其物質性。
Some spiritual practices aim to immaterialize one's attachment to physical things. 一些靈性修練旨在去除對物質事物的執著。
His concern was immaterially minor compared to the main crisis. 與主要危機相比，他的關切顯得無關緊要。
The soul is believed by many to exist immaterially beyond the body. 許多人相信靈魂以非物質的方式存在於身體之外。
The immaterialness of the detail made it easy to overlook. 這個細節的無關緊要使它很容易被忽視。
Theologians speak of the immaterialness of the divine essence. 神學家談到神聖本質的非物質性。

meaning: 非物質事物；無形的事物（複數）
sentences: The philosopher classified thoughts and emotions as immaterials. 哲學家將思想和情感歸類為非物質事物。
Art, music, and ideas are among the great immaterials of human culture. 藝術、音樂和思想是人類文化中偉大的無形事物之一。

meaning: 非物質的；無形的（罕見詞）
sentences: The immateriate nature of music makes it both universal and ephemeral. 音樂的非物質性使其既是普遍的又是短暫的。
Spiritual traditions often posit an immateriate soul distinct from the body. 靈性傳統通常假設有一個與身體不同的無形靈魂。

meaning: 入學登記；使成為正式成員（古體詞）
sentences: New students were required to immatriculate before the semester began. 新學生被要求在學期開始前進行入學登記。
The guild would immatriculate new members in a formal ceremony. 行會在正式儀式中接受新成員。

meaning: 入學登記；正式入學手續
sentences: Immatriculation ceremonies have welcomed students to universities for centuries. 入學典禮幾個世紀以來一直歡迎學生進入大學。
The immatriculation process required verification of all academic documents. 入學手續需要核實所有學術文件。
You're only young once, but you can be immature the rest of your life. 你的青春只有一次，但你可能不成熟一輩子。
The man was immature for throwing a tantrum. 這個男人發脾氣實在太不成熟了。

meaning: 未成熟的；發育不完全的
sentences: The immatured fruit was picked too early and lacked flavor. 這個未成熟的水果過早被採摘，缺乏風味。
The immatured plan was rejected by the committee as insufficient. 這個不完善的計劃被委員會以不充分為由拒絕。
He reacted immaturely to the criticism instead of reflecting on it. 他對批評的反應幼稚，而不是加以反省。
She immaturely stormed out of the meeting when challenged. 當受到挑戰時，她幼稚地衝出了會議室。
His immatureness in handling conflicts cost him several friendships. 他在處理衝突中的不成熟使他失去了幾段友誼。
The immatureness of the product's design required significant rework. 產品設計的不成熟需要大量返工。
His immaturity was evident in how he handled disagreements. 他的不成熟從他處理分歧的方式中顯而易見。
With time and experience, immaturity naturally gives way to wisdom. 隨著時間和經驗的積累，不成熟自然會讓位給智慧。
The immeability of the barrier prevented any fluid from passing through. 屏障的不透性防止任何液體穿過。
Engineers tested the immeability of the new waterproof material. 工程師測試了這種新型防水材料的不透性。
The immeasurability of the universe fills scientists with wonder. 宇宙的無法測量性讓科學家充滿驚嘆。
The immeasurability of human suffering in war defies simple statistics. 戰爭中人類苦難的無法測量性讓簡單的統計數字無能為力。
The damage caused by the hurricane was immeasurable. 颶風造成的損失是無法估量的。
She felt an immeasurable sense of gratitude after being rescued. 獲救後，她感到一種無限的感激之情。
The immeasurableness of the ocean inspires both awe and humility. 海洋的無限性既激發敬畏又帶來謙遜。
Philosophers reflect on the immeasurableness of time and space. 哲學家們思考時間和空間的無限性。

meaning: 無法測量地；極其；無限地
sentences: Her life was immeasurably improved after the successful surgery. 成功手術後，她的生活得到了無限的改善。
The loss of a loved one can be immeasurably painful. 失去摯愛可以是極其痛苦的。

meaning: 未經測量的；無限制的（古體詞）
sentences: The immeasured wealth of the ancient kingdom was a source of legend. 這個古代王國未計量的財富成為了傳說的來源。
The poet described the immeasured vastness of the night sky. 詩人描述了夜空的無限廣闊。

meaning: 非機械性的；不遵循機械規律的
sentences: Human creativity is considered immechanical and cannot be fully automated. 人類的創造力被認為是非機械性的，不能完全自動化。
The immechanical behavior of the system confused the engineers. 這個系統的非機械性行為讓工程師感到困惑。
The dancer moved immechanically, with a fluidity that defied physics. 舞者以非機械性的方式移動，帶著一種挑戰物理的流動性。
Intuition operates immechanically, beyond logical processing. 直覺以非機械性的方式運作，超越了邏輯處理。
The immediacy of the crisis demanded an instant response. 危機的緊迫性要求立即做出回應。
Digital news has brought a new sense of immediacy to reporting. 數字新聞為報導帶來了一種新的即時性。

meaning: 直接的；無媒介的（古體詞）
sentences: Immedial knowledge comes directly from experience, not through intermediaries. 直接知識來自於直接體驗，而不是通過中介。
The immedial relationship between teacher and student is most effective. 老師和學生之間的直接關係最為有效。
The government needs to take immediate action to solve the problem. 政府需要立即採取行動來解決問題。
She gave an immediate reply to my important text message. 她立刻回覆了我那則重要的簡訊。
We reviewed the message immediately to avoid mistakes. 我們很immediately地檢查訊息，以避免出錯。
Our teacher replied immediately and solved the issue. 我們老師immediately地回應，並解決了問題。
The immediateness of the solution surprised the entire team. 解決方案的即時性令整個團隊感到驚訝。
The immediateness of news in the digital age transforms how we perceive events. 數字時代新聞的即時性改變了我們感知事件的方式。

meaning: 即時主義（要求立即廢除奴隸制等的運動）
sentences: Immediatism was the radical abolitionist demand for the instant end to slavery. 即時主義是廢奴主義者要求立即結束奴隸制的激進運動。
William Lloyd Garrison championed immediatism in the anti-slavery movement. 威廉·劉易斯·加里森在反奴隸制運動中倡導即時主義。

meaning: 即時主義者；主張立即廢除奴隸制的人
sentences: As an immediatist, she demanded the immediate abolition of slavery. 作為即時主義者，她要求立即廢除奴隸制。
The immediatists clashed with gradualists over the pace of reform. 即時主義者與漸進主義者在改革的速度上發生了衝突。

meaning: 無法醫治的；不可救藥的
sentences: The wound was declared immedicable by the physician of the time. 當時的醫生宣布這個傷口是無法醫治的。
The corruption was immedicable without a complete overhaul of the system. 如果不對系統進行徹底改革，腐敗問題是不可救藥的。

meaning: 無法醫治的性質；不可救藥性
sentences: The immedicableness of the disease led to despair among patients. 這種疾病的無法醫治性讓患者感到絕望。
Philosophers reflected on the immedicableness of certain moral flaws. 哲學家們思考某些道德缺陷的不可救藥性。

meaning: 無法醫治地；不可救藥地
sentences: The patient was immedicably ill, according to the doctors. 根據醫生的說法，這位患者是無法醫治地生病了。
The institution had become immedicably corrupt. 這個機構已經變得不可救藥地腐敗。
The immelodious sound of the construction work disturbed the neighbors. 建設工程發出的不悅耳聲音打擾了鄰居。
Critics called his early compositions immelodious and dissonant. 批評者稱他早期的作品不悅耳且不和諧。

meaning: 使成為成員；加入（古體詞）
sentences: New citizens were formally immembered into the republic after their oath. 新公民在宣誓後正式成為共和國的成員。
The guild would immember skilled craftsmen after a period of apprenticeship. 行會在學徒期滿後接受熟練工匠成為成員。

meaning: 不值得記憶的；平凡的；難以記憶的
sentences: The meeting was utterly immemorable and left no lasting impression. 這次會議完全不值得記憶，沒有留下任何持久的印象。
His speech was so immemorable that no one could recall it a day later. 他的演講如此平凡，以至於沒有人在一天後能回憶起它。
From time immemorial, humans have looked up at the stars in wonder. 自古以來，人類就以驚嘆的眼神仰望星星。
The village has celebrated this festival since immemorial times. 這個村莊自古以來就慶祝這個節日。

meaning: 自遠古時代；從時間難以記憶的古時
sentences: The tradition had been practiced immemorially long before written records. 這一傳統在書面記錄出現之前就已被實踐了很久。
These lands have immemorially belonged to the indigenous communities. 這些土地自遠古時代以來就屬於原住民社區。
The project will require an immense amount of time and resources to complete. 該專案將需要巨大的時間和資源才能完成。
They felt an immense sense of relief when they heard that everyone was safe. 聽到大家都平安無事，他們感到極大的欣慰（巨大）。

meaning: 大大;極大；極度;極大；在很大程度上。
sentences: I enjoyed the party immensely. 我非常喜歡這個聚會。
This question is immensely difficult. 這個問題非常困難。
The immenseness of the storm system was visible from space. 這個風暴系統的龐大規模從太空中都可以看到。
The immenseness of the task was daunting but not impossible. 這項任務的龐大規模令人望而生畏，但並非不可能。
The immensity of the ocean filled her with both wonder and humility. 海洋的廣闊無垠讓她既充滿驚嘆又感到謙遜。
The immensity of the universe is difficult for the human mind to comprehend. 宇宙的龐大對人類的思維來說難以理解。
The immensive scale of the empire required a vast bureaucracy to manage. 帝國的龐大規模需要一個龐大的官僚機構來管理。
The immensive landscape of the Arctic left the explorer awestruck. 北極的廣闊景觀讓探險者敬畏不已。

meaning: 不可測量性；無法比較性
sentences: The immensurability of two artistic masterpieces makes comparison futile. 兩件藝術傑作的無法比較性使比較毫無意義。
Philosophers debate the immensurability of happiness across cultures. 哲學家討論不同文化間幸福感的不可測量性。

meaning: 無法測量的；不可比較的
sentences: The depth of human love is immensurable by any scientific instrument. 人類愛的深度是任何科學儀器都無法測量的。
Some cultural values are immensurable and defy simple comparison. 一些文化價值觀是無法測量的，無法進行簡單比較。

meaning: 不可測量性；無法比較的性質
sentences: The immensurableness of suffering makes it difficult to quantify loss. 苦難的不可測量性使得量化損失變得困難。
Mystics spoke of the immensurableness of divine grace. 神秘主義者談到神聖恩典的不可測量性。
The punishment was immensurate with the minor offense committed. 懲罰與所犯的輕微過失不成比例。
The reward was immensurate with the extraordinary effort they had put in. 獎勵與他們付出的非凡努力不相稱。
The soldiers feared being immerded in the swamps during the retreat. 士兵們在撤退中害怕陷入沼澤的泥泞中。
The scandal threatened to immerd the reputation of the whole department. 醜聞威脅玷污整個部門的聲譽。

meaning: 浸入；沉入（古體詞，同 immerse）
sentences: The diver would immerge into the dark waters of the cave. 潛水員潛入洞穴的黑暗水域。
She immerged herself in the study of ancient languages. 她沉浸於古代語言的研究中。
The immergence of the submarine was completed within seconds. 潛水艇的潛入在幾秒鐘內完成。
Immergence in a new culture accelerates language learning. 沉浸於新文化中能加速語言學習。
The immergent diver signaled to the surface crew before going deeper. 正在下潛的潛水員在繼續深潛前向水面人員發出信號。
The immergent culture of the settlers gradually blended with the indigenous one. 定居者正在融入的文化逐漸與原住民文化融合。

meaning: 缺乏功績；不值得（古體詞）
sentences: His immerit in the field of poetry was apparent to all critics. 他在詩歌領域缺乏功績，這一點對所有評論家來說都是顯而易見的。
She was aware of her immerit and continued to study diligently. 她意識到自己的不足，繼續努力學習。

meaning: 不值得的；未獲應得的（古體詞）
sentences: He received immerited praise for work that was largely plagiarized. 他因大量抄襲的作品而獲得了不值得的讚揚。
The immerited reward caused resentment among the other workers. 不值得的獎勵引起了其他工人的怨恨。

meaning: 無功績的；不值得讚揚的
sentences: The immeritorious performance drew criticism from the judges. 無功績的表現引來了評審們的批評。
He was dismissed as immeritorious by his peers in the academy. 他被學術界的同行視為無功績之人。

meaning: 以無功績的方式；不值得地
sentences: He immeritoriously claimed credit for the group's success. 他不值得地聲稱對整個小組的成功有功。
The award was immeritoriously given, prompting public outrage. 獎項被不值得地授予，引發了公眾的憤慨。

meaning: 無功績的；不值得的（古體詞）
sentences: The immeritous candidate was rejected despite his powerful connections. 儘管有強大的關係網，這位無功績的候選人仍被拒絕。
Critics described the book as immeritous and forgettable. 批評者描述這本書無功績且令人遺忘。

meaning: 放置在流體中（通常是液體，但也可以是氣體）。
sentences: Archimedes determined the volume of objects by immersing them in water. 阿基米德透過將物體浸入水中來確定其體積。
People often immerse when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會沉浸其中。
The immersement of the cloth in the dye created a deep blue color. 將布料浸入染料中產生了深藍色。
Total immersement in another language is the fastest way to learn it. 完全沉浸於另一種語言中是學習它最快的方式。

meaning: 可浸入的；防水的（可完全浸入液體中）
sentences: The new watch is immersible up to 50 meters underwater. 這款新手錶可在水下50米深處防水使用。
The immersible heater is designed for use in aquariums. 這種可浸入的加熱器是為水族箱設計的。

meaning: 將一個人完全浸入水中作為洗禮的行為。
sentences: The term immersion refers to the total submerging of a person in water as an act of baptism. 浸沒一詞是指將人完全浸入水中作為洗禮的行為。
The lesson introduced immersion as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了沉浸式這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 浸禮主義（主張洗禮必須全身浸入水中）
sentences: Immersionism holds that baptism is only valid when performed by full immersion. 浸禮主義認為洗禮只有在全身浸入時才有效。
Baptist churches are often associated with immersionism. 浸信會教會通常與浸禮主義相關聯。

meaning: 浸禮主義者；主張全身浸禮的人
sentences: As an immersionist, he insisted that baptism required full submersion in water. 作為浸禮主義者，他堅持洗禮需要全身浸入水中。
The immersionist tradition is particularly strong in Baptist communities. 浸禮主義傳統在浸信會社群中特別強烈。

meaning: 沉浸式的、讓人身歷其境的。常用來形容體驗（體驗感很強）、環境（包覆感/臨場感）、科技（VR/AR）、展覽、課程等，讓你「很投入、像在其中」。
sentences: The museum offers an immersive virtual reality tour of ancient Rome. 這間博物館提供了古羅馬的沉浸式虛擬實境導覽。
The sound system provides an immersive audio experience for movie lovers. 這套音響系統為電影愛好者提供了身歷其境的音效體驗。
His immethodic approach to studying led to poor exam results. 他無系統的學習方法導致了糟糕的考試成績。
The immethodic research lacked structure and clear objectives. 這項無系統的研究缺乏結構和明確的目標。
The immethodical filing system made it impossible to find anything. 這種無條理的歸檔系統讓任何東西都難以找到。
Her immethodical thinking led to brilliant but unpredictable results. 她無條理的思維方式帶來了出色但不可預測的結果。
He worked immethodically, jumping between tasks without finishing any. 他無條理地工作，在各任務之間跳來跳去，沒有完成任何一個。
The data was immethodically collected and proved unreliable. 數據被無條理地收集，證明不可靠。

meaning: 缺乏系統性；無條理的狀態
sentences: The immethodicalness of the investigation frustrated the team. 調查的無條理性讓整個團隊感到沮喪。
Her immethodicalness, while creative, often caused practical problems. 她的無條理性雖然富有創意，卻常常造成實際問題。
Constant interruptions tend to immethodize even the best-organized workflow. 不斷的打擾往往會打亂即使是最有條理的工作流程。
The sudden change in leadership served to immethodize the entire project. 領導層的突然更替打亂了整個項目的系統。

meaning: 不符合韻律的；不規整的（詩歌）
sentences: The immetrical verses of the poem gave it a rough, raw quality. 詩歌的不符合韻律的詩句賦予了它粗糙、原始的品質。
Critics praised the immetrical style as bold and innovative. 批評者稱讚這種不規整的風格大膽而富有創新性。

meaning: 不符合韻律地；無節奏地
sentences: The poem was written immetrically to reflect the chaos of the era. 這首詩是以不符合韻律的方式寫成的，以反映那個時代的混亂。
She sang immetrically, which added an eerie quality to the song. 她唱歌時沒有節奏，這給歌曲增添了一種詭異的特質。

meaning: 不規整性；缺乏韻律（詩歌）
sentences: The immetricalness of the composition was seen as a flaw by traditionalists. 這首作品的不規整性被傳統主義者視為缺陷。
Modern poetry often celebrates immetricalness as a form of freedom. 現代詩歌常常將不規整性視為一種自由形式加以稱頌。
The falconer would immew the hawk during molting season. 獵鷹師在換羽季節會將老鷹關入籠中。
To immew a falcon is to confine it for rest and recovery. 關入籠中是為了讓獵鷹休息和恢復。
The immi community organized festivals to celebrate their cultural heritage. 移民社群組織了節慶活動以慶祝他們的文化遺產。
He was a recent immi who had just arrived from Southeast Asia. 他是一位剛從東南亞抵達的新移民。
The city is a fascinating blend of various immigrant groups. 這座城市是各個移民群體的迷人融合。
The company is planning to hire additional staff from immigrants. 公司正計劃從移民中雇用額外的人員。
They decided to immigrate to Canada for a better life and work. 他們為了更好的生活與工作決定移民到加拿大。
Millions of people managed to immigrate to the country lately. 最近有數百萬人竟然（能）移民到了這個國家。
The government is taking steps to control illegal immigration now. 政府現在正採取措施管制非法移民。
The city center is always crowded with new immigration services. 市中心總是擠滿了新的移民服務（機構）。
As an immigrator, he adapted quickly to the new country's customs. 作為一名移民者，他迅速適應了新國家的習俗。
Early immigrators to the region faced tremendous hardships. 該地區的早期移民面臨了巨大的困難。
Immigratory patterns shifted dramatically after the industrial revolution. 工業革命後，移民模式發生了巨大變化。
The government studied immigratory trends to shape future policy. 政府研究移民趨勢以制定未來政策。

meaning: 迫近性；即將發生的危險
sentences: The imminence of the storm caused widespread panic along the coast. 風暴的迫近在沿海地區引發了廣泛的恐慌。
The imminence of war was felt by all citizens of the city. 所有城市居民都感受到了戰爭迫近的緊張氣氛。

meaning: 迫近性；即將來臨（imminence 的變體）
sentences: The imminency of the deadline forced everyone to work overtime. 截止日期的迫近迫使每個人都加班工作。
She sensed the imminency of change in the political climate. 她感受到了政治氣候中即將到來的變化。
The dark clouds suggested that a heavy storm was imminent. 烏雲預示著一場強風暴即將來臨。
The government warned citizens of an imminent threat to national security. 政府向公民發出了關於國家安全迫在眉睫的威脅的警告。
The volcano was reported to be imminently dangerous. 這座火山被報告為即將爆發的危險。
The deal was imminently close to being signed. 這筆交易即將被簽署。

meaning: 即將發生的狀態；迫近性
sentences: The imminentness of the crisis was apparent from early warning signs. 危機的即將發生從早期預警信號中就很明顯了。
Citizens were not fully aware of the imminentness of the disaster. 市民們沒有完全意識到災難的迫近。
The rivers immingle at the delta before reaching the sea. 這些河流在河口匯合，然後流入大海。
Cultures immingle in multicultural cities to create new traditions. 文化在多元文化城市中融合，創造出新的傳統。
The imminution of resources forced the settlers to ration supplies. 資源的減少迫使定居者對物資進行配給。
There was a gradual imminution of the army's strength over the long campaign. 在漫長的戰役中，軍隊的實力逐漸減弱。

meaning: 不相溶性；無法混合的性質
sentences: The immiscibility of oil and water is a fundamental principle in chemistry. 油和水的不相溶性是化學中的基本原理。
Immiscibility of the two compounds made separation straightforward. 兩種化合物的不相溶性使分離變得簡單直接。
Oil and water are immiscible liquids that refuse to mix. 油和水是不相溶的液體，拒絕混合。
The two chemicals were immiscible and formed two distinct layers. 這兩種化學物質不相溶，形成了兩個不同的層。
The solutions separated immiscibly into clearly distinct phases. 這些溶液以不相溶的方式分離成清晰的不同相。
The two substances existed immiscibly side by side in the container. 這兩種物質在容器中以不相溶的方式並排存在。
The immission of pollutants into the atmosphere is regulated by law. 向大氣注入污染物受法律監管。
Controlled immission of gases is used in some industrial processes. 在某些工業過程中使用受控的氣體注入。
The technician would immit a small amount of gas into the chamber. 技術員會向腔室注入少量氣體。
To immit foreign elements into a system can cause instability. 向系統引入外來元素可能導致不穩定。

meaning: 不可緩和性；無法減輕的性質
sentences: The immitigability of the punishment shocked the public. 懲罰的不可緩和性震驚了公眾。
Philosophers debated the immitigability of certain moral wrongs. 哲學家討論某些道德錯誤的不可緩和性。

meaning: 無法緩和的；不可減輕的
sentences: The grief he felt was immitigable and consumed years of his life. 他感受到的悲傷是無法緩和的，消耗了他多年的生命。
The judge declared the sentence immitigable under current law. 法官宣布根據現行法律判決不可減輕。

meaning: 無法緩和地；不可減輕地
sentences: The wound remained immitigably painful even after medication. 即使在用藥後，傷口仍然無法緩和地疼痛。
The sentence was immitigably harsh, drawing widespread criticism. 這個判決不可減輕地嚴酷，引發了廣泛批評。
The painter would immix different pigments to achieve the desired shade. 畫家會混合不同顏料以達到所需的色調。
The chef decided to immix herbs and spices for a unique flavor. 廚師決定混合草藥和香料以創造獨特的風味。
The two liquids were immixable and combined easily in the blender. 這兩種液體可以混合，在攪拌機中很容易結合。
The immixable ingredients were added one by one to the batter. 可混合的食材被逐一加入麵糊中。
The immixture of cultures in the city created a vibrant atmosphere. 城市中文化的混合創造了充滿活力的氛圍。
The immixture of traditional and modern design gave the building a unique character. 傳統和現代設計的混合使建築具有獨特的特色。
The patient was left immobile after the accident. 事故後，患者陷入了靜止不動的狀態。
The statue stood immobile in the center of the plaza for centuries. 這座雕像在廣場中心靜止屹立了幾個世紀。
Long periods of immobility can lead to muscle atrophy. 長時間的靜止不動可能導致肌肉萎縮。
The immobility of the markets during the crisis worried investors. 危機期間市場的靜止讓投資者感到擔憂。
Immobilization of the broken arm prevented further injury. 固定骨折的手臂防止了進一步的傷害。
Financial immobilization of assets is sometimes required in legal disputes. 在法律糾紛中，有時需要對資產進行凍結。
The doctor used a cast to immobilize the fractured bone. 醫生用石膏固定骨折部位。
The virus can immobilize an entire computer network within hours. 這種病毒可以在幾小時內癱瘓整個電腦網絡。
His immoderacy in eating and drinking led to serious health problems. 他在飲食方面的無節制導致了嚴重的健康問題。
The immoderacy of the ruler's ambition brought ruin to the kingdom. 統治者野心的無節制給王國帶來了毀滅。
Immoderate consumption of alcohol is harmful to the liver. 過度飲酒對肝臟有害。
The immoderate demand for raises created tension in the negotiations. 過度的加薪要求在談判中製造了緊張局面。
He spent immoderately on luxury goods and soon went broke. 他在奢侈品上過度消費，很快就破產了。
The politician spoke immoderately, alienating even his supporters. 這位政客說話過度，甚至疏遠了他的支持者。
The immoderateness of his lifestyle was evident to everyone around him. 他生活方式的過度對周圍所有人來說都是顯而易見的。
Immoderateness in any endeavor tends to lead to burnout. 任何事業中的過度都容易導致精疲力竭。
Immoderation in diet was identified as the cause of his illness. 飲食過度放縱被確定為他生病的原因。
The philosophers warned against immoderation in all passions. 哲學家們警告要避免在所有激情中過度放縱。

meaning: 不謙虛的；不得體的；放肆的
sentences: His immodest boasting about his achievements turned people away. 他對自己成就的不謙虛誇耀讓人們疏遠了他。
The immodest dress code was criticized by the school administration. 不得體的著裝規範受到學校管理層的批評。
He immodestly declared himself the greatest chef in the region. 他不謙虛地宣稱自己是該地區最偉大的廚師。
She immodestly took full credit for the team's success. 她放肆地將整個團隊成功的功勞歸於自己。
His immodesty made him difficult to work with despite his talent. 儘管有才華，他的不謙遜使他難以合作。
Immodesty in speech can offend those who value humility. 言語上的放肆可能冒犯那些重視謙遜的人。
The immodulated signal caused interference in the communication system. 未調制的信號在通信系統中造成了干擾。
His immodulated tone of voice made it hard to read his emotions. 他未調節的語調使人難以讀出他的情緒。
The ancient ritual required that a sacrifice be immolated on the altar. 古代儀式要求在祭壇上獻祭一個犧牲品。
Several protesters chose to immolate themselves as an act of political protest. 幾名抗議者選擇自焚作為政治抗議行動。
The immolation of the monk shocked the international media. 這位僧侶的自焚震驚了國際媒體。
In ancient Rome, immolation of animals was a common religious practice. 在古羅馬，焚化動物是一種常見的宗教實踐。
The immolator believed his sacrifice would inspire political change. 這位自焚者相信他的犧牲將激勵政治變革。
Ancient texts describe the immolator as a sacred role in religious ceremonies. 古代文獻將獻祭者描述為宗教儀式中的神聖角色。

meaning: 不重要的；微不足道的（古體詞）
sentences: The immoment details of the contract were overlooked in the rush. 合約中微不足道的細節在匆忙中被忽視了。
Shakespeare used immoment to describe trivial matters in his plays. 莎士比亞在他的戲劇中使用 immoment 來描述瑣碎的事情。
The debate devolved into immomentous arguments about minor details. 辯論演變成關於次要細節的無意義爭論。
Critics dismissed the film as immomentous and forgettable. 批評者稱這部電影不重要且令人遺忘。

meaning: 被收入修道院的（古體詞）
sentences: The immonastered scholars preserved ancient texts for future generations. 被收入修道院的學者為後代保存了古代文獻。
Orphaned children were sometimes immonastered during the medieval period. 在中世紀，孤兒有時會被收入修道院。

meaning: 四 不道德的,邪惡的
sentences: That is a immoral way to handle the list. 那是處理清單時很immoral的方法。
We need a more immoral plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更immoral的計畫。

meaning: 非道德主義；否定道德規範的哲學
sentences: Nietzsche's immoralism challenged conventional moral values of his time. 尼采的非道德主義挑戰了他那個時代的傳統道德價值觀。
Immoralism does not promote wrongdoing but questions the basis of moral systems. 非道德主義不提倡做壞事，而是質疑道德體系的基礎。

meaning: 非道德主義者；不信奉道德規範的人
sentences: The immoralist rejected all conventional ethical frameworks as arbitrary. 這位非道德主義者拒絕所有傳統倫理框架，認為它們是任意的。
Philosophers classify Nietzsche as a notable immoralist thinker. 哲學家將尼采歸類為著名的非道德主義思想家。
Without immorality, the team could not finish on time. 沒有immorality，團隊就無法準時完成。
We need more immorality to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多immorality才能有效解決這個問題。
Critics claimed that certain media content could immoralize young viewers. 批評者聲稱某些媒體內容可能腐化年輕觀眾的道德。
The scandal threatened to immoralize the entire institution. 這場醜聞威脅使整個機構道德敗壞。

meaning: 區 不道德地,邪惡地
sentences: Our teacher spoke immorally during the discussion. 我們老師在討論時說話很immorally。
Please read the instructions immorally before you start. 開始前請先immorally地閱讀說明。

meaning: 不服從的；無禮的（古體詞）
sentences: The immorigerous student was repeatedly disciplined for defiance. 這位不服從的學生因反抗而多次受到紀律處分。
Medieval texts describe immorigerous subjects as threats to social order. 中世紀文獻將不服從的臣民描述為社會秩序的威脅。
The immorigerousness of the defendant frustrated the court proceedings. 被告的不服從性使法庭程序受到阻礙。
Chronicles recorded the immorigerousness of the rebellious nobles. 編年史記錄了反叛貴族的不服從性。

meaning: 不死性；永生的能力（罕見詞）
sentences: Philosophers debate whether immortability is a coherent concept. 哲學家討論不死性是否是一個連貫的概念。
Alchemists believed they could achieve immortability through their formulas. 鍊金術士相信他們可以通過自己的配方實現不死性。

meaning: 不死的；可以長生的（罕見詞）
sentences: The legend described a spring whose waters made the drinker immortable. 傳說描述了一個泉水，其水能讓飲用者長生不死。
Ancient myths are filled with tales of heroes seeking to become immortable. 古代神話中充滿了英雄試圖變得長生不死的故事。

meaning: 永遠不會被遺忘；值得永遠記得的。
sentences: his immortal words 他不朽的話語
Something described as immortal is never to be forgotten; that merits being always remembered. 所謂不朽的東西是永遠不會被忘記的；這值得永遠記得。

meaning: 長生主義；追求永生的哲學或運動
sentences: Immortalism has gained traction in modern transhumanist circles. 長生主義在現代超人文主義圈子中獲得了關注。
Ancient immortalism often involved religious rituals to attain eternal life. 古代長生主義通常涉及宗教儀式以實現永生。

meaning: 長生主義者；追求永生的人
sentences: As an immortalist, she invested in research to extend human lifespan. 作為長生主義者，她投資於延長人類壽命的研究。
The immortalist believed technology would eventually conquer death. 這位長生主義者相信技術最終將征服死亡。
In Greek mythology, Tithonus was granted immortality but not eternal youth. 在希臘神話中，提托諾斯被賦予了永生，但並沒有獲得永恆的青春。
The term immortality refers to the condition of being immortal. Never dying. 不朽這個字是指不朽的狀態。永遠不會死。

meaning: 可以使永垂不朽的；可以永久保存的
sentences: Great deeds are immortalizable through literature and art. 偉大的事業可以通過文學和藝術使之永垂不朽。
The moment was immortalizable, worthy of being preserved for all time. 那個時刻是值得永久保存的，值得被永遠銘記。
The immortalization of her legacy was achieved through her biographies. 她的遺產通過傳記實現了永垂不朽。
The artist's immortalization in the museum honored her lifelong work. 藝術家在博物館中的永垂不朽榮耀了她一生的工作。

meaning: 使永垂不朽；使流傳後世
sentences: The poet sought to immortalize the bravery of the soldiers in verse. 詩人試圖用詩句使士兵的勇敢永垂不朽。
A great photograph can immortalize a fleeting moment in time. 一張精彩的照片可以使時間中的瞬間永垂不朽。

meaning: 使事物永垂不朽的人或物
sentences: Art is the greatest immortalizer of human experience. 藝術是人類經驗最偉大的永垂不朽者。
She was known as the immortalizer of the mountain people's traditions. 她被稱為山地人民傳統的永垂不朽者。
Her name will be immortally linked with the discovery of penicillin. 她的名字將永恆地與青黴素的發現聯繫在一起。
His music will live on immortally long after his death. 他的音樂將在他死後永恆地流傳下去。
The immortalness attributed to the gods set them apart from mortals. 歸因於神祇的不死性使他們與凡人區別開來。
True legacy is the closest humans come to immortalness. 真正的遺產是人類最接近不死性的東西。

meaning: 不朽的地位；被奉為不朽者的身份
sentences: The general was elevated to immortalship in the annals of history. 這位將軍在歷史年鑑中被提升到不朽的地位。
Artists strive their whole lives to achieve immortalship through their work. 藝術家們一生都在努力通過作品實現不朽的地位。

meaning: 永生花；蠟菊（一種乾燥後顏色不變的花）
sentences: The immortelle retains its golden color long after being cut and dried. 永生花在被切割和乾燥後很長時間仍保持其金黃色。
Dried immortelles are often used in wreaths placed on graves. 乾燥的永生花常被用於放置在墓地的花環中。

meaning: 缺乏自我克制；縱欲（宗教術語）
sentences: The monk warned that immortification of the flesh leads to spiritual weakness. 僧侶警告說，缺乏對肉體的自我克制會導致精神上的軟弱。
Immortification was considered a spiritual failing in medieval Christianity. 在中世紀基督教中，縱欲被認為是一種精神上的失敗。

meaning: 未受約束的；缺乏自我克制的（宗教術語）
sentences: The immortified spirit was said to be vulnerable to temptation. 未受約束的靈魂據說容易受到誘惑的侵害。
Religious guides warned against living an immortified life. 宗教指導者警告要避免過一種缺乏自我克制的生活。

meaning: 不能移動的；靜止的（生物學）
sentences: Immotile cilia are a cause of chronic respiratory infections. 不能移動的纖毛是慢性呼吸道感染的原因。
Some bacterial spores are immotile and remain stationary in their environment. 一些細菌孢子是不能移動的，在其環境中保持靜止。

meaning: 靜止的；無運動的（罕見詞）
sentences: The immotioned stars in ancient astronomy were thought to be fixed in the sky. 古代天文學中靜止的星星被認為固定在天空中。
The immotioned figure in the painting conveys stillness and calm. 畫中靜止的人物傳達了寧靜和平和。

meaning: 缺乏動機的；無驅動力的
sentences: The immotive student struggled to complete even simple assignments. 缺乏動機的學生甚至難以完成簡單的作業。
An immotive workforce can signal deeper organizational problems. 缺乏動力的工作隊伍可能預示著更深層的組織問題。
Workers were hired to immound the flooded area to prevent further spread. 工人被雇來築堤圍住洪水地區，以防止進一步蔓延。
The settlers would immound their camp to protect against wildlife. 定居者會在營地周圍築堤以防止野生動物入侵。
The immovability of the boulder made it a natural landmark. 這塊巨石的不動性使它成為一個天然地標。
The immovability of his convictions made him an inspiring leader. 他信念的不動搖性使他成為一位鼓舞人心的領袖。

meaning: 無法進行身體移動；固定的
sentences: The report describes the result as immovable. 報告稱這一結果是不可改變的。
Everyone noticed the immovable tone of the message. 大家都注意到了這則訊息的語氣不動聲色。

meaning: 不可移動的性質；固定性
sentences: The immovableness of the ancient stone structure astonished archaeologists. 這座古代石制結構的不可移動性讓考古學家驚嘆。
Judges valued the immovableness of the law in maintaining order. 法官重視法律的固定性，以維護秩序。
She stood immovably by her principles despite intense pressure. 儘管承受著巨大壓力，她仍堅定地堅守自己的原則。
The mountain remained immovably fixed against the changing seasons. 這座山在季節更替中依然固定不動。
Medieval texts described the immund conditions of the city during the plague. 中世紀文獻描述了瘟疫期間城市中骯髒不潔的狀況。
The immund alley was avoided by residents due to its filth. 這條骯髒的小巷因其臭氣而被居民所避免。
Immundity of the water supply was the main cause of disease in the town. 水源的不潔是鎮上疾病的主要原因。
Reformers sought to address the immundity of urban slums in the 19th century. 改革者試圖在19世紀解決城市貧民窟的骯髒問題。
Vaccinations help your body build a strong immune system against diseases. 接種疫苗有助於你的身體建立強大的免疫系統來對抗疾病。
High-level officials are not immune from criticism for their business decisions. 高層官員並不能免於對其業務決策的批評。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "immune system" for next week. 老師要我們把「immune system」背起來，下週要用。
I heard "immune system" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「immune system」，就把它記進筆記本。

meaning: 主張免疫特權的人；免疫學研究者
sentences: As an immunist, he advocated for the rights of the clergy from civil prosecution. 作為一名主張免疫特權的人，他倡導神職人員免受民事檢控的權利。
The immunist published groundbreaking research on vaccine development. 這位免疫學研究者發表了疫苗開發的突破性研究。
Without immunity, the team could not finish on time. 沒有immunity，團隊就無法準時完成。
The engineer's immunity made the plan easier to follow. 工程師的immunity讓計畫更容易執行。

meaning: 一個人以受控方式安全地接觸某種材料的過程，該材料旨在增強其免疫系統抵抗該材料的能力。
sentences: Immunization against influenza is important for all child-care workers. Immunization against influenza is important for all child-care workers.

The term immunization refers to the process by which a person is safely exposed in a controlled manner to a material that is designed to prime their immune system against that material. 術語「免疫」是指一個人以受控方式安全地接觸某種材料的過程，該材料旨在激發他們的免疫系統針對該材料的抵抗力。
Our team immunizes this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會immunize這個步驟。
If you immunize every day, your skills improve quickly. 如果你每天都immunize，能力會進步得很快。

meaning: 免疫化學（研究抗體和抗原化學特性的學科）
sentences: Immunochemistry is used in clinical laboratories to diagnose diseases. 免疫化學被用於臨床實驗室診斷疾病。
Advances in immunochemistry have revolutionized cancer detection methods. 免疫化學的進步徹底改變了癌症檢測方法。

meaning: 免疫原；可引起免疫反應的物質
sentences: Vaccines contain an immunogen that triggers the body's immune response. 疫苗含有一種免疫原，能觸發身體的免疫反應。
Researchers developed a novel immunogen for use in the new vaccine. 研究人員為新疫苗開發了一種新型免疫原。

meaning: 免疫遺傳的；與免疫遺傳學相關的
sentences: Immunogenetic differences explain why some individuals are more susceptible to certain diseases. 免疫遺傳差異解釋了為什麼某些人對某些疾病更易感。
Immunogenetic research has led to better organ transplant matching methods. 免疫遺傳學研究導致了更好的器官移植配型方法。

meaning: 免疫遺傳學（研究免疫系統遺傳基礎的學科）
sentences: Immunogenetics combines the fields of immunology and genetics. 免疫遺傳學結合了免疫學和遺傳學兩個領域。
Advances in immunogenetics have improved our understanding of autoimmune diseases. 免疫遺傳學的進步加深了我們對自身免疫疾病的理解。

meaning: 能引起免疫反應的；有免疫原性的
sentences: The new protein was found to be highly immunogenic in clinical trials. 這種新蛋白質在臨床試驗中被發現具有高度免疫原性。
Scientists are testing immunogenic compounds for vaccine development. 科學家正在測試用於疫苗開發的免疫原性化合物。

meaning: 以引起免疫反應的方式
sentences: The compound was shown to work immunogenically in animal models. 這種化合物在動物模型中被證明能以引起免疫反應的方式發揮作用。
Immunogenically active molecules are the basis of modern vaccines. 具有免疫原性活性的分子是現代疫苗的基礎。

meaning: 免疫原性；引起免疫反應的能力
sentences: Immunogenicity testing is a critical step in vaccine development. 免疫原性測試是疫苗開發的關鍵步驟。
High immunogenicity ensures that the vaccine produces a strong immune response. 高免疫原性確保疫苗產生強烈的免疫反應。

meaning: 免疫學的；與免疫學相關的
sentences: Immunologic tests can identify the presence of autoimmune disorders. 免疫學測試可以識別自身免疫疾病的存在。
The patient showed an immunologic response to the new therapy. 患者對新療法表現出免疫學反應。
Immunological research is crucial to developing treatments for HIV. 免疫學研究對開發愛滋病治療方法至關重要。
The immunological profile of the patient was analyzed by specialists. 患者的免疫學特徵由專科醫生進行分析。

meaning: 從免疫學角度；以免疫學方式
sentences: The patient was immunologically compromised due to the treatment. 患者因治療而在免疫學上受到損害。
The drug was tested immunologically to assess its effect on the immune system. 這種藥物從免疫學角度進行了測試，以評估其對免疫系統的影響。

meaning: 免疫學家；免疫學研究者
sentences: The immunologist developed a new vaccine for the disease. 免疫學家為這種疾病開發了一種新疫苗。
She consulted an immunologist after repeatedly falling ill. 她在反覆生病後諮詢了免疫學家。
We discussed the term immunology in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 immunology 這個詞。
Mia wrote down immunology with the note "免疫學". Mia把 immunology 記下來，並註記「免疫學」。

meaning: 免疫反應；抗體與抗原的結合反應
sentences: The immunoreaction was detected using a specialized laboratory test. 通過專業實驗室測試檢測到了免疫反應。
Elevated immunoreaction can indicate an autoimmune disorder. 免疫反應升高可能表明存在自身免疫疾病。

meaning: 免疫毒素（連接於抗體的毒素，用於靶向殺死細胞）
sentences: Immunotoxins are being studied as a targeted therapy for cancer. 免疫毒素正被研究作為癌症的靶向療法。
The immunotoxin specifically attacks tumor cells while sparing healthy tissue. 免疫毒素專門攻擊腫瘤細胞，同時保留健康組織。
Immuration, or walling someone in, was a rare but brutal medieval punishment. 監禁（即將人用牆圍住）在中世紀是一種罕見但殘酷的懲罰。
The immuration of the prisoners lasted for decades. 囚犯的監禁持續了數十年。
The king ordered that the traitor be immured in the dungeon. 國王下令將叛徒關進地牢。
She chose to immure herself in her studio to finish the novel. 她選擇將自己關在工作室裡完成小說。

meaning: 監禁；囚禁（尤指封閉於牆內）
sentences: The immurement of the monk was ordered as punishment for heresy. 僧侶的監禁是作為異端罪的懲罰而下令的。
Legends tell of immurement within castle walls as a form of execution. 傳說中有以封閉於城堡牆壁內作為一種處決方式。

meaning: 不具音樂性的；不悅耳的
sentences: The immusical banging on the pipes disturbed all the residents. 管道上不悅耳的敲打聲打擾了所有居民。
Critics called the composition immusical and unworthy of the stage. 批評者稱這首作品不具音樂性，不值得登上舞台。

meaning: 以不具音樂性的方式；不悅耳地
sentences: The instruments were played immusically during the poorly rehearsed concert. 在排練不充分的音樂會上，樂器被不具音樂性地演奏。
He sang immusically, yet the audience admired his passion. 他唱得不悅耳，但觀眾欽佩他的熱情。

meaning: 不變性；永恆不變的特質
sentences: The immutability of the laws of physics underpins all scientific inquiry. 物理定律的不變性支撐著所有科學探究。
Many religions believe in the immutability of God's nature. 許多宗教相信上帝本性的不變性。
The government has enacted an immutable law. 政府制定了不可改變的法律。
The report describes the result as immutable. 該報告將結果描述為不可變的。

meaning: 不變性；恆常性（immutability 的變體）
sentences: The immutableness of the contract was upheld by the court. 合約的不變性得到了法院的維護。
The immutableness of natural laws gives science its predictive power. 自然定律的恆常性賦予了科學預測能力。
The laws of mathematics are immutably fixed. 數學定律是永恆不變的。
She remained immutably committed to her beliefs throughout her life. 她一生都不變地堅守自己的信念。

meaning: 變化（罕見詞）；不變性（古體詞）
sentences: The immutation of the landscape over millennia fascinated geologists. 數千年來景觀的變化令地質學家著迷。
Philosophers debated whether immutation was possible in the physical world. 哲學家討論物理世界中是否可能存在不變性。

meaning: 使不變；保持不變（古體詞）
sentences: Some believe the soul can immute while the body changes. 有些人相信靈魂可以保持不變，而身體則會改變。
Ancient philosophers sought to immute the moral principles of their society. 古代哲學家試圖使社會的道德原則保持不變。
The surgeon's goal was to immutilate the patient's hand while removing the tumor. 外科醫生的目標是在切除腫瘤的同時保持患者手部的完整。
Ancient healers tried to immutilate the wounded while curing infection. 古代治療師試圖在治療感染的同時保持傷者的完整。

meaning: 非互惠的；單向的（罕見詞）
sentences: The immutual arrangement benefited only one party in the contract. 這種非互惠的安排只對合同中的一方有利。
Their immutual friendship was recognized only when one left without saying goodbye. 他們單向的友誼在其中一人不辭而別時才被認識到。

meaning: 伊摩根（女性名，莎士比亞《辛白林》中的人物）
sentences: Imogen is the heroine of Shakespeare's play Cymbeline. 伊摩根是莎士比亞戲劇《辛白林》中的女主角。
Imogen has become a popular girl's name in English-speaking countries. 伊摩根已成為英語國家中一個流行的女孩名字。

meaning: 伊莫琳達（Aphra Behn 小說《奧魯諾科》中的角色）
sentences: Imolinda is a central character in Aphra Behn's 17th-century novel Oroonoko. 伊莫琳達是阿芙拉·班恩17世紀小說《奧魯諾科》中的核心人物。
The tragedy of Imolinda has moved readers for over three centuries. 伊莫琳達的悲劇感動了讀者超過三個世紀。

meaning: 亞銨離子（有機化學中含氮的帶電離子）
sentences: Imonium ions are important intermediates in the Mannich reaction. 亞銨離子是曼尼希反應中的重要中間體。
Chemists utilized imonium chemistry to synthesize new drug candidates. 化學家利用亞銨離子化學合成了新的候選藥物。

meaning: 小惡魔；調皮的孩子；嫁接（植物）
sentences: The mischievous child was called a little imp by his grandmother. 這個調皮的孩子被祖母稱為小惡魔。
In medieval folklore, an imp was a small devil who served a witch. 在中世紀民間傳說中，小惡魔是服侍女巫的小魔鬼。

meaning: 不可安撫性；無法平息的狀態（罕見詞）
sentences: The impacability of the rioters terrified the authorities. 暴徒的不可安撫性使當局感到恐懼。
Philosophers discuss the impacability of certain moral wrongs. 哲學家討論某些道德錯誤的無法平息的特性。

meaning: 無法平息的；不可安撫的（古體詞）
sentences: The impacable anger of the crowd forced the governor to resign. 人群不可安撫的憤怒迫使州長辭職。
His impacable grief lingered long after his wife's passing. 他的妻子去世後，他不可安撫的悲傷持續了很長時間。
The workers had to impack the goods tightly into the crates for shipping. 工人們不得不將貨物緊緊塞入板條箱中以便運輸。
Snow was impacked into the crevices of the rocks by the storm. 風暴將雪壓縮進岩石的縫隙中。
The impackment of the joint caused significant pain and reduced mobility. 關節的嵌頓造成了嚴重疼痛並降低了活動能力。
The impackment of earth around the foundation improved its stability. 地基周圍土壤的壓緊改善了其穩定性。
Environmental pollution has a devastating impact on our world. 環境污染對我們的世界產生了毀滅性的影響。
The new policy managing to have a significant impact on economy. 新政策竟然對經濟產生了顯著影響。
Being the last teeth to erupt in the oral cavity, many wisdom teeth are impacted. 作為口腔中最後萌出的牙齒，許多智齒都會受到阻生。
The report describes the result as impacted. 該報告將結果描述為「受到影響」。
The dentist diagnosed an impaction of the wisdom tooth. 牙醫診斷出智齒嵌頓。
Fecal impaction is a serious medical condition requiring immediate treatment. 糞便嵌頓是需要立即治療的嚴重醫學狀況。

meaning: 造成嵌頓；使壓縮（罕見詞）
sentences: Long periods without bowel movement can impactionize the colon. 長時間不排便可能使結腸發生嵌頓。
The heavy load threatened to impactionize the compressed soil. 重負荷威脅使壓縮土壤進一步嵌頓。
The impactment of the new policy on low-income families was significant. 新政策對低收入家庭的影響是顯著的。
Scientists measured the impactment of the asteroid on the planet's surface. 科學家測量了小行星對星球表面的衝擊。

meaning: 有衝擊力的；有影響的（罕見詞）
sentences: The impactual speech by the president changed public opinion overnight. 總統有衝擊力的演講在一夜之間改變了公眾輿論。
An impactual work of art can shift cultural attitudes for generations. 一件有影響力的藝術作品可以改變幾代人的文化態度。
The wave impages against the cliff face with tremendous force. 海浪以巨大的力量衝擊懸崖面。
Light impages upon the crystal and creates a spectrum of colors. 光衝擊晶體並創造出顏色光譜。
The artist sought to impaint the scene exactly as he saw it. 藝術家試圖精確描繪他所看到的場景。
Poets and painters alike sought to impaint the beauty of the natural world. 詩人和畫家都試圖描繪自然界的美麗。
Alcohol can impair judgment and reaction time when driving. 酒精可以在駕駛時損害判斷力和反應時間。
The illness began to impair her ability to work effectively. 疾病開始削弱她有效工作的能力。
Vision is an impairable sense that requires regular monitoring. 視力是一種容易受損的感官，需要定期監測。
The fragile ecosystem is impairable by even minor human interference. 這個脆弱的生態系統甚至會因輕微的人類干預而受到損害。
Noise pollution is a major impairer of cognitive function in urban areas. 噪音污染是城市地區認知功能的主要損害者。
Alcohol is a known impairer of motor skills and coordination. 酒精是已知的運動技能和協調能力的損害者。
visual impairment 視力障礙
The term impairment refers to a disability or handicap. 術語“損傷”是指殘疾或障礙。

meaning: 一種非洲羚羊，Aepyceros melampus，以其跳躍能力而聞名；雄性有脊狀、彎曲的角。
sentences: The term impala refers to an African antelope, Aepyceros melampus, noted for its leaping ability; the male has ridged, curved horns. 黑斑羚一詞指的是非洲羚羊 Aepyceros melampus，因其跳躍能力而聞名。雄性有脊狀、彎曲的角。
The lesson introduced impala as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了黑斑羚作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The queen chose to impalace the foreign dignitary in the west wing. 女王選擇將外國貴賓安置在西翼宮殿中。
In the story, the wizard sought to impalace the princess in an enchanted tower. 在故事中，巫師試圖將公主封鎖在一座魔法塔中。

meaning: 難以入口的；難以接受的（古體詞）
sentences: The overcooked meal was impalatable and left untouched. 煮過頭的餐點難以入口，被原封不動地留下。
The terms of the agreement were impalatable to both parties. 協議條款對雙方來說都難以接受。
The knight was nearly impaled by his opponent's lance. 騎士幾乎被對手的長矛刺穿。
The butterfly was impaled on a pin and mounted for display. 蝴蝶被插針固定並展示。

meaning: 穿刺；以尖物貫穿的刑罰
sentences: Impalement was a brutal form of execution used in medieval times. 穿刺是中世紀使用的一種殘酷處決方式。
The impalement of the specimen on the display board preserved it for study. 將標本插針固定在展示板上以便研究保存。
Vlad the Impaler was a 15th-century ruler feared for his brutal methods. 穿刺者弗拉德是15世紀以殘酷手段著稱的統治者。
The impaler prepared the stakes for the coming execution. 行刺穿者為即將到來的處決準備了木樁。
Darkness began to impall the forest as night fell. 夜幕降臨時，黑暗開始籠罩森林。
Grief seemed to impall her spirit after the loss. 悲傷似乎在失去之後籠罩了她的精神。

meaning: 握在手掌中；暗中將…放入手中
sentences: The magician would impalm a coin while distracting the audience. 魔術師在分散觀眾注意力的同時將一枚硬幣握在手掌中。
She impalmed the note quickly before anyone could see it. 她在任何人看到之前迅速將紙條握在手掌中。

meaning: 不可感觸性；無法用手觸摸感知的特質
sentences: The impalpability of the mist made it impossible to grasp. 薄霧的不可感觸性使人無法抓住。
The impalpability of social norms makes them hard to define precisely. 社會規範的不可感觸性使其難以精確定義。

meaning: 觸摸不到的；無形的；難以理解的
sentences: The impalpable quality of her grief was hard to express in words. 她悲傷的難以理解的特質難以用言語表達。
The powder was ground so fine it was almost impalpable to the touch. 這種粉末研磨得如此精細，觸感幾乎感覺不到。
The spirit moved impalpably through the room, leaving a sense of calm. 靈魂無形地穿過房間，留下一種平靜的感覺。
The influence of early childhood experiences impalpably shapes adult behavior. 童年早期經歷的影響無形地塑造了成年行為。

meaning: 使癱瘓；造成麻痺（古體詞）
sentences: The venom of the snake threatened to impalsy his entire arm. 蛇的毒液威脅使他整條手臂癱瘓。
Fear began to impalsy her limbs as she approached the edge. 當她走近邊緣時，恐懼開始使她的四肢癱瘓。
Impaludism was a major killer in tropical regions before the development of quinine. 奎寧研製出來之前，瘧疾是熱帶地區的主要殺手。
Early medical texts often referred to malaria as impaludism. 早期醫學文獻常將瘧疾稱為 impaludism。

meaning: 體入麵包中的（基督教神學術語）；以麵包包裹
sentences: Some Lutheran theologians held that Christ's body is impanate in the bread of communion. 一些路德宗神學家認為基督的身體在聖餐的麵包中體入。
The impanate doctrine was debated extensively during the Reformation. 體入麵包說在宗教改革期間被廣泛討論。

meaning: 體入麵包說（神學理論，基督的身體存在於聖餐麵包中）
sentences: Impanation was a theological position held by some Protestant reformers. 體入麵包說是一些新教改革者持有的神學立場。
The doctrine of impanation differs from transubstantiation in key ways. 體入麵包說與變質說在關鍵方面有所不同。
The impanator believed that Christ's presence was physically united with the bread. 體入麵包說者相信基督的存在與麵包物質性地結合。
Theologians classified the Reformer as an impanator based on his writings. 神學家根據他的著作將這位改革者分類為體入麵包說者。

meaning: 嵌入玻璃；裝入窗格（古體詞）
sentences: The craftsman would impane the stained glass into the church window frame. 工匠將彩色玻璃嵌入教堂窗框中。
In the restoration project, artisans worked to impane the ancient glass. 在修復項目中，工匠努力將古老的玻璃嵌入窗格。

meaning: 選入陪審團；組成陪審員名單
